imn: Ei jienv ninh nyei lingc zoux.

eng: (See also Isa. 43:20b, 21; Mal. 3:17; Col. 1:13.)
imn: (Yaac mangc Iˆsaaˆyaa 43:20b, 21; Maaˆlaaˆki 3:17; Koˆloˆsi 1:13.)

eng: (1 Thessalonians 5:18)
imn: (1 Teˆsaaˆloˆniˆgaa 5:18)

eng: 1. We thank you, Jehovah, each day and each night,
imn: 1. Yie mbuo hnoi-hnoi laengz zingh meih, Yeˆhoˆwaa aah,

eng: That you shed upon us your precious light.
imn: Dongh meih bun meih nyei jaaix haic nyei dang ziux.

eng: We thank you that we have the priv’lege of prayer,
imn: Yie mbuo laengz zingh meih muangx yie mbuo daux gaux waac,

eng: That we can approach you with ev’ry care.
imn: Dongh meih hnamv bun yie mbuo haih mingh lorz meih.

eng: 2. We thank you, Jehovah, for your loving Son,
imn: 2. Laengz zingh, Yeˆhoˆwaa, meih paaiv meih nyei Dorn daaih;

eng: Who conquered the world; by his faith he won.
imn: Ninh duqv hingh lungh ndiev weic maaih sienx fim longx.

eng: We thank you for guidance in doing your will.
imn: Laengz zingh meih dorh yie mbuo haih zoux meih nyei eix

eng: You lovingly help us our vows fulfill.
imn: Yaac tengx yie mbuo zoux horpc laengz daaih nyei waac.

eng: 3. We thank you, our God, for the honor to preach
imn: 3. Laengz zingh Tin-Hungh meih, bun yie mbuo duqv zunh doz

eng: About your great name and the truth to teach.
imn: Gorngv taux meih nyei mengh hoc yaac njaaux zien leiz.

eng: We thank you that soon all earth’s woes will be past,
imn: Laengz zingh meih, maiv lauh yietc zungv kouv naanc jiex nzengc,

eng: While your Kingdom blessings forever last.
imn: Meih nyei Guoqv ceix daaih nyei ziouc yietc liuz yiem.
(Yaac mangc Singx Nzung 50:14; 95:2; 147:7; Koˆloˆsi 3:15.)

eng: 1. There was a time we did not know
imn: 1. Wuov zanc ziangh hoc mbuo maiv hiuv duqv

eng: The way a Christian ought to go.
imn: Zien jauv Giduc Mienh horpc zuqc yangh.

eng: Then Jehovah sent the light,
imn: Liuz Yeˆhoˆwaa fungx dang daaih,

eng: His Kingdom truth so clear and bright.
imn: Ziux jienv ninh nyei zien leiz njiang gau.

eng: Our Father’s will we then could see
imn: Zangc Diex nyei eix mbuo cingx mangc buatc

eng: To serve the grand Theocracy,
imn: Aa zuqc fu-sux Tin-Hungh nyei Guoqv,

eng: To declare Jehovah’s fame,
imn: Zuqc zunh Yeˆhoˆwaa nyei mengh,

eng: And help to glorify his holy name.
imn: Yaac zuqc longc hnyiouv ceng ninh nyei

eng: We witness now to all we meet,
imn: cing-nzengc mbuox.

eng: From door to door and on the street.
imn: Mbuo ziouc mbuox taux dauh dauh mbuo buangh,

eng: We take the time to help them see;
imn: Yiem biauv jiex biauv yaac yiem wuov jauv.

eng: We teach the truth that sets us free.
imn: Mbuo zorqv ziangh hoc tengx mienh bieqc hnyiouv;

eng: And as we strive in ev’ry land
imn: Mbuo njaaux zien leiz bungx nqoi mienh camv.

eng: Jehovah’s worship to expand,
imn: Dongh mbuo longc hnyiouv yiem norm-norm deic

eng: May we serve our God as one
imn: Tengx mienh camv daaih zangc Yeˆhoˆwaa,

eng: Until Jehovah says the work is done.
imn: Tov bun mbuo yietc zungv dongh hnyiouv

eng: (See also Josh. 9:9; Isa. 24:15; John 8:12, 32.)
imn: Zuov taux Yeˆhoˆwaa gorngv naaiv gong

eng: (Romans 7:14-25)
1. We love Jehovah with heart, mind, and soul;
imn: 1. Mbuo longc nzengc mbuo nyei hnyiouv hnamv Yeˆhoˆwaa;

eng: But since we are sinful, we need self-control.
imn: Mv baac mbuo haih baamz zuiz, mbuo zuqc haih zanv ganh.

eng: Fleshly desires bring trouble and strife;
imn: Sin zaangc hanc nyei dorh mbuo buangh kouv naanc;

eng: Living by spirit brings peace and life.
imn: Gan longx Tin-Hungh nor, mbuo duqv baengh orn.

eng: 2. Satan’s temptations confront us each day,
imn: 2. Saadaan zoux nyei sic hnoi-hnoi nduov jienv mbuo;

eng: And sin’s law within us can lead us astray.
imn: Zuiz nyei leiz yiem jienv mbuo haih nduov mbuo zoux dorngc.

eng: Power of truth is greater than sin.
imn: Zien leiz nyei qaqv se gauh henv zuiz nyei.

eng: Thanks to Jehovah, our minds can win.
imn: Laengz zingh Yeˆhoˆwaa, mbuo haih duqv hingh.

eng: 3. Each word and action reflects on God’s name,
imn: 3. Haaix nyungc mbuo zoux se ceng fai daanh Tin-Hungh;

eng: So we must endeavor to keep free from blame.
imn: Mbuo aa zuqc longc hnyiouv zoux benx maiv maaih dorngx nqemh.

eng: In all we do, we make this our goal:
imn: Nyungc-nyungc mbuo zoux, oix zoux daaih hnangv naaiv:

eng: Always maintaining our self-control.
imn: Zanc-zanc zoux kuv sic haih zanv duqv ganh.

eng: (See also 1 Cor. 9:25; Gal. 5:23; 2 Pet. 1:6.)
imn: (Yaac mangc 1 Koˆlinˆto 9:25; Gaaˆlaaˆtie 5:23; 2 Bide 1:6.)

eng: Blessed is the one who does not walk in step with the wicked or stand in the way that sinners take or sit in the company of mockers, but whose delight is in the law of the Lord ,
imn: Maaih orn-lorqc nyei mienh se maiv muangx mienh waaic mienh nyei za'eix, maiv yangh zuiz-mienh nyei zaux-mbiec, yaac maiv caux huotv Tin-Hungh nyei mienh juangc jauv yangh. Daaux nzuonx ninh a'hneiv Ziouv nyei leiz-latc,

eng: and who meditates on his law day and night. That person is like a tree planted by streams of water,
imn: ziu yiex fei-fangv ninh nyei leiz. Ninh se hnangv diuh ndiangx zuangx wuov ndoqv-hlen,

eng: which yields its fruit in season and whose leaf does not wither— whatever they do prospers. Not so the wicked!
imn: ziux ziangh hoc cuotv biouv, normh yaac maiv nqaai. Yiem ninh zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc duqv longx. Mv baac mienh waaic mienh zungv maiv hnangv naaic.

eng: They are like chaff that the wind blows away. Therefore the wicked will not stand in the judgment,
imn: Ninh mbuo se hnangv mbieqv zuqc nziaaux buonc nzaanx mingh nor. Taux siemv zuiz nyei ziangh hoc

eng: nor sinners in the assembly of the righteous. For the Lord watches over the way of the righteous,
imn: mienh waaic mienh oix zuqc Tin-Hungh dingc zuiz, zuiz-mienh yaac maiv duqv caux gapv zunv nyei kuv mienh yiem. Weic zuqc Ziouv ziux goux kuv mienh nyei jauv,

eng: but the way of the wicked leads to destruction.
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei jauv-louc zungv oix zuqc mietc.

eng: Why do the nations conspire and the peoples plot in vain? The kings of the earth rise up
imn: Maanc guoqv nyei mienh weic haaix diuc faanv lunc? Maanc fingx mienh weic haaix diuc daav maiv lamh longc nyei za'eix? Lungh ndiev nyei zuangx hungh diex dongh hnyouv caangh laangh,

eng: and the rulers band together against the Lord and against his anointed, saying, “Let us break their chains
imn: gunv maanc guoqv nyei mienh lomh nzoih daav za'eix ngaengc Ziouv caux ninh longc youh orn daaih nyei hungh diex. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Mbuo oix zuqc cutv dangx ninh mbuo ndoh nyei limc,

eng: and throw off their shackles.” The One enthroned in heaven laughs;
imn: yaac jaiv nqoi ninh mbuo ndoh mbuo nyei hlaang.” Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh zueiz jienv weic jatv ninh mbuo,

eng: the Lord scoffs at them. He rebukes them in his anger
imn: yaac huotv ninh mbuo. Ninh qiex jiez jienv caux ninh mbuo gorngv waac,

eng: and terrifies them in his wrath, saying, “I have installed my king
imn: ninh nouz haic ziouc haeqv ninh mbuo gamh nziex. Ninh gorngv, “Yie zungv liepc yie ginv daaih nyei hungh,

eng: on Zion, my holy mountain.” I will proclaim the Lord ’s decree:
imn: yiem yie nyei cing-nzengc mbong, Si^on .” Hungh diex gorngv, “Yie oix zunh Ziouv njiec nyei lingc.

eng: He said to me, “You are my son; today I have become your father. Ask me,
imn: “Ninh gorngv mbuox yie, ‘Meih zoux yie nyei dorn, ih hnoi yie benx meih nyei die. Gunv tov yie maah!

eng: and I will make the nations your inheritance, the ends of the earth your possession. You will break them with a rod of iron ;
imn: Yie ziouc zorqv maanc guoqv jiu bun meih nzipc, zorqv nzengc lungh ndiev jiu benx meih nyei buonc. Meih ziouc longc hlieqv-biaav mborqv ninh mbuo huv,

eng: you will dash them to pieces like pottery.” Therefore, you kings, be wise;
imn: yaac zong ninh mbuo hnangv zong nie-mor huv muonc nzengc nor.’+” O zuangx hungh diex aah! Hnangv naaic oix zuqc maaih cong-mengh.

eng: be warned, you rulers of the earth. Serve the Lord with fear
imn: O gunv lungh ndiev nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc muangx naaiv deix donv nyei waac. Oix zuqc gamh nziex jienv fu-sux Ziouv,

eng: and celebrate his rule with trembling. Kiss his son, or he will be angry
imn: oix zuqc za'gengh taaih ninh. Oix zuqc puoqv njiec ninh nyei nza'hmien.

eng: and your way will lead to your destruction, for his wrath can flare up in a moment. Blessed are all who take refuge in him.
imn: Maiv zei aeqv, nziex ninh qiex jiez, meih mbuo ziouc haih zuqc mietc, weic zuqc ninh nyei ga'qiex haih siepv-siepv nyei baetv cuotv. Da'faanh ndaauh kaux ninh wuov deix maaih orn-lorqc.

eng: Lord , how many are my foes! How many rise up against me! Many are saying of me,
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie nyei win-wangv ndongc naaiv camv! Oix hoic yie wuov deix jaa camv jienv faaux. Maaih mienh camv hnangv naaiv gorngv yie,

eng: “God will not deliver him.” But you, Lord , are a shield around me,
imn: “Tin-Hungh maiv tengx ninh aqv.” Selaa Mv baac Ziouv aac, meih zoux yie nyei torngv-baaih weih gormx yie.

eng: my glory, the One who lifts my head high. I call out to the Lord ,
imn: Meih zoux yie nyei njang-laangc, tengx yie cau duqv m'nqorngv jiez. Yie heuc jienv tov Ziouv.

eng: and he answers me from his holy mountain. I lie down and sleep;
imn: Ninh yaac yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbong dau yie. Selaa Yie bueix njiec m'njormh mingh,

eng: I wake again, because the Lord sustains me. I will not fear though tens of thousands
imn: yie aengx nyie daaih, weic zuqc Ziouv beu jienv yie. Maiv gunv maaih waanc-waanc dauh win-wangv weih gormx yie,

eng: assail me on every side. Arise, Lord !
imn: yie yaac maiv gamh nziex. O Ziouv aah! Daaih maah!

eng: Deliver me, my God! Strike all my enemies on the jaw; break the teeth of the wicked. From the Lord comes deliverance.
imn: O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Njoux yie maah! Weic zuqc meih mbaix yie nyei yietc zungv win-wangv nyei kamx-bui, mborqv orqv mienh nyei nyaah nauv. Njoux en se yiem Ziouv daaih,

eng: May your blessing be on your people.
imn: tov ceix fuqv bun meih nyei baeqc fingx. Selaa

eng: Answer me when I call to you, my righteous God. Give me relief from my distress; have mercy on me and hear my prayer. How long will you people turn my glory into shame?
imn: O yie nyei baengh fim nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie heuc nyei ziangh hoc tov meih dau yie. Yie buangh zuqc kuonx naanh nyei ziangh hoc, meih bun yie maaih jauv cuotv. Tov korv-lienh yie, muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac. O meih mbuo naaiv deix mienh aah!

eng: How long will you love delusions and seek false gods ? Know that the Lord has set apart his faithful servant for himself;
imn: Meih mbuo oix mangc piex bun yie zuqc nyaiv taux haaix zanc? Meih mbuo oix longc maiv lamh longc nyei waac yaac lorz gorngv-baeqc nyei jauv taux haaix zanc? Selaa Oix zuqc hiuv duqv Ziouv ginv cuotv gan longx Tin-Hungh nyei mienh weic ninh ganh.

eng: the Lord hears when I call to him. Tremble and do not sin;
imn: Yie heuc Ziouv nyei ziangh hoc, ninh yaac muangx yie. Qiex jiez nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx baamz zuiz.

eng: when you are on your beds, search your hearts and be silent. Offer the sacrifices of the righteous
imn: Bueix jienv coux sekv nzieqc nyei, yiem hnyouv longx-longx nyei hnamv. Selaa Oix zuqc fongc horc dongh horpc zuqc fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: and trust in the Lord . Many, Lord , are asking, “Who will bring us prosperity?”
imn: yaac sienx kaux Ziouv. Maaih mienh camv gorngv, “Haaix dauh haih bun yie mbuo buatc haaix nyungc longx?”

eng: Let the light of your face shine on us. Fill my heart with joy
imn: O Ziouv, tov bun meih nyei hmien nyei njang ziux yie mbuo. Meih bun yie nyei hnyouv orn-lorqc gauh camv

eng: when their grain and new wine abound. In peace I will lie down and sleep,
imn: duqv mbiauh caux siang-a'ngunc diuv camv nyei mienh. Yie oix baengh orn nyei bueix njiec m'njormh

eng: for you alone, Lord , make me dwell in safety.
imn: weic zuqc Ziouv aac, kungx meih ganh bun yie duqv yiem longx.

eng: Listen to my words, Lord , consider my lament. Hear my cry for help,
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov meih baeng m'normh muangx yie nyei waac. Tov muangx haiz yie njunh nyei qiex. Yie nyei Hungh, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: my King and my God, for to you I pray. In the morning, Lord , you hear my voice;
imn: Tov muangx yie heuc jienv nyei qiex weic zuqc yie dorng jienv meih daux gaux. O Ziouv aac, lungh ndorm meih muangx duqv haiz yie nyei qiex,

eng: in the morning I lay my requests before you and wait expectantly. For you are not a God who is pleased with wickedness;
imn: lungh ndorm nziouv yie jouh meih yaac zuov meih dau yie. Meih se maiv zeiz a'hneiv waaic sic nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: with you, evil people are not welcome. The arrogant cannot stand
imn: Orqv mienh maiv haih caux meih yiem. Ceng-hlo nyei mienh maiv duqv souv meih nyei nza'hmien.

eng: in your presence. You hate all who do wrong; you destroy those who tell lies.
imn: Da'faanh zoux orqv nyei mienh meih nzorng haic. Meih mietc nzengc gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh.

eng: The bloodthirsty and deceitful you, Lord , detest. But I, by your great love,
imn: Daix mienh nyei mienh caux nduov mienh nyei mienh, Ziouv youx haic. Mv baac yie ganh aeqv, weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv haic mienh,

eng: can come into your house; in reverence I bow down toward your holy temple. Lead me, Lord , in your righteousness
imn: yie ziouc duqv bieqc meih nyei biauv. Yie oix taaih meih, yaac hungx jienv meih nyei cing-nzengc biauv baaix. O Ziouv aac, laaix yie nyei win-wangv,

eng: because of my enemies— make your way straight before me. Not a word from their mouth can be trusted;
imn: tov meih yienz yie gan meih zoux horpc nyei jauv. Tov bun yie yangh meih weic yie liuc leiz nyei jauv. Win-wangv nyei nzuih maiv maaih zien waac.

eng: their heart is filled with malice. Their throat is an open grave; with their tongues they tell lies. Declare them guilty, O God!
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv kungx oix zoux mietc. Ninh mbuo nyei jaang-hoh hnangv wetv tong nyei janx-daic zouv nor, ninh mbuo longc mbietc gorngv waac nduov mienh hnangv. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz,

eng: Let their intrigues be their downfall. Banish them for their many sins, for they have rebelled against you. But let all who take refuge in you be glad;
imn: bun ninh mbuo daav nyei za'eix hoic ninh mbuo ganh. Laaix ninh mbuo baamz nyei zuiz camv, zorqv ninh mbuo zunc cuotv mingh, weic zuqc ninh mbuo ngaengc meih. Mv baac da'faanh kaux meih wuov deix oix zuqc orn-lorqc,

eng: let them ever sing for joy. Spread your protection over them, that those who love your name may rejoice in you. Surely, Lord , you bless the righteous;
imn: bun ninh mbuo zanc-zanc njien-youh nyei baaux nzung. Tov beu jienv ninh mbuo, weic bun hnamv meih nyei mengh wuov deix kaux meih duqv njien-youh. O Ziouv aac, meih ceix fuqv bun zoux horpc nyei mienh.

eng: you surround them with your favor as with a shield.
imn: Meih korv-lienh, beu jienv ninh mbuo hnangv torngv-baaih nor.

eng: Lord , do not rebuke me in your anger or discipline me in your wrath. Have mercy on me, Lord , for I am faint;
imn: O Ziouv aah! Tov maiv dungx nouz jienv gorngv-hemx yie. Maiv dungx qiex jiez jienv dingc yie nyei zuiz. O Ziouv aac, tov meih korv-lienh yie, weic zuqc yie za'gengh mau haic.

eng: heal me, Lord , for my bones are in agony. My soul is in deep anguish.
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov zorc yie, weic zuqc yie maiv maaih yietc aax qaqv. Yie nyei hnyouv za'gengh kouv haic.

eng: How long, Lord , how long? Turn, Lord , and deliver me;
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie oix zuqc zuov taux haaix zanc meih cingx daaih tengx? O Ziouv aac, tov meih huin nzuonx daaih njoux yie nyei maengc,

eng: save me because of your unfailing love. Among the dead no one proclaims your name.
imn: weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie, tov njoux yie. Mienh daic mingh, maiv maaih haaix dauh haih jangx duqv meih.

eng: Who praises you from the grave? I am worn out from my groaning.
imn: Yiem yiemh gen maaih haaix dauh haih ceng meih? Yie njunh jienv yiem, haiz kouv haic.

eng: All night long I flood my bed with weeping and drench my couch with tears. My eyes grow weak with sorrow;
imn: Yie muonz-muonz nyiemv, wuom-mueic yiemx coux, yie nyei nzomz-dauh zuqc wuom-mueic dapc ndorn nzengc. Nzauh gau, yie nyei m'zing zungv maiv njang.

eng: they fail because of all my foes. Away from me, all you who do evil,
imn: Laaix win-wangv yie nyiemv, m'zing mbuov mi'aqv. Meih mbuo yietc zungv zoux orqv nyei mienh aah! Biaux nqoi yie,

eng: for the Lord has heard my weeping. The Lord has heard my cry for mercy;
imn: weic zuqc Ziouv muangx haiz yie nyiemv nyei qiex. Ziouv muangx haiz yie jouh nyei waac,

eng: the Lord accepts my prayer. All my enemies will be overwhelmed with shame and anguish;
imn: yie daux gaux nyei waac Ziouv yaac dau. Yie nyei yietc zungv win-wangv oix zuqc nyaiv, gamh nziex duqv kouv haic.

eng: they will turn back and suddenly be put to shame.
imn: Ninh mbuo oix zuqc tuix nzuonx, ndongc nziepv dangh m'zing zuqc nyaiv aqv.

eng: Lord my God, I take refuge in you; save and deliver me from all who pursue me, or they will tear me apart like a lion
imn: O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac, meih se yie ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Tov njoux yie biaux ndutv zunc yie nyei mienh. Tov njoux yie cuotv daaih. Nziex ninh mbuo hnangv sienh nor betv yie,

eng: and rip me to pieces with no one to rescue me. Lord my God, if I have done this
imn: tor yie mingh yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh njoux. O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac,

eng: and there is guilt on my hands— if I have repaid my ally with evil
imn: se gorngv yie hnangv naaiv zoux, se gorngv yie nyei buoz zoux dorngc haaix nyungc, se gorngv yie zoux waaic bun caux yie horpc nyei mienh,

eng: or without cause have robbed my foe— then let my enemy pursue and overtake me;
imn: fai luv yie nyei win-wangv yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx, tov bun win-wangv zunc zaaic yie,

eng: let him trample my life to the ground and make me sleep in the dust. Arise, Lord , in your anger;
imn: zorqv yie nyei maengc caaiv njiec ndau, bun yie nyei sin-sei yiem nie-mbung. Selaa O Ziouv aac, tov meih qiex jiez jienv jiez daaih,

eng: rise up against the rage of my enemies. Awake, my God; decree justice. Let the assembled peoples gather around you,
imn: mborqv yie nyei ciouv haic nyei win-wangv. O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov tengx yie. Se meih ganh dingc ziangx siemv zuiz. Tov bun maanc fingx gapv zunv weih gormx meih,

eng: while you sit enthroned over them on high. Let the Lord judge the peoples.
imn: tov meih yiem gu'nguaaic gunv ninh mbuo. Ziouv siemv maanc fingx.

eng: Vindicate me, Lord , according to my righteousness, according to my integrity, O Most High. Bring to an end the violence of the wicked
imn: O Ziouv aac, tov ziux yie zoux horpc nyei caux yie hnyouv zingx nyei siemv yie. Meih se zoux horpc nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: and make the righteous secure— you, the righteous God who probes minds and hearts. My shield is God Most High,
imn: Meih zaah mienh nyei hnyouv caux eix. Tov bun zoux orqv nyei mienh nyei jauv dangx, yaac liepc kuv mienh wuonv. Tin-Hungh se yie nyei torngv-baaih beu jienv yie,

eng: who saves the upright in heart. God is a righteous judge,
imn: ninh njoux hnyouv zaqc nyei mienh. Tin-Hungh se baengh fim nyei siemv zuiz jien,

eng: a God who displays his wrath every day. If he does not relent,
imn: Tin-Hungh yaac hnoi-hnoi dingc orqv mienh nyei zuiz. Se gorngv haaix dauh maiv goiv hnyouv,

eng: he will sharpen his sword; he will bend and string his bow. He has prepared his deadly weapons;
imn: Tin-Hungh oix nzioux laic ninh nyei nzuqc ndaauv, yaac liuc leiz ziangx juang-zinx. Ninh mbenc ziangx daix mienh nyei wuoqc ginc,

eng: he makes ready his flaming arrows. Whoever is pregnant with evil
imn: liuc leiz ninh maaih douz nyei forng-cang. Orqv mienh kungx hnamv cuotv orqv sic,

eng: conceives trouble and gives birth to disillusionment. Whoever digs a hole and scoops it out
imn: maaih orqv nyei sic yiem hnyouv beiv mienh maaih gu'nguaaz, yungz cuotv daaih benx gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh nyei sic hnangv. Ninh wetv ziangx kuotv, wetv ndo nyei,

eng: falls into the pit they have made. The trouble they cause recoils on them;
imn: ninh ganh yaac ndortv njiec ninh ganh wetv nyei kuotv. Ninh zoux nyei waaic sic daaux nzuonx daaih hoic ninh ganh.

eng: their violence comes down on their own heads. I will give thanks to the Lord because of his righteousness;
imn: Ninh zoux doqc nyei sic kungx ndortv zuqc ninh ganh hnangv. Yie oix dor-ziec Ziouv weic zuqc ninh baengh fim nyei.

eng: I will sing the praises of the name of the Lord Most High.
imn: Yie oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv, Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh, nyei mengh.

eng: Lord , our Lord, how majestic is your name in all the earth! You have set your glory in the heavens. Through the praise of children and infants
imn: O Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Ziouv aac, meih nyei mengh gengh hlo haic buangv lungh ndiev. Mienh ceng meih nyei njang-laangc, taux gu'nguaaic lungh. Fu'jueiv caux gu'nguaaz

eng: you have established a stronghold against your enemies, to silence the foe and the avenger. When I consider your heavens,
imn: heuc jienv ceng Ziouv. Laaix meih nyei win-wangv meih liepc dorngx wuonv nyei, bun ngaengc meih caux oix jaauv siouh wuov deix dingh njiec. Yie cau hmien mangc lungh,

eng: the work of your fingers, the moon and the stars, which you have set in place, what is mankind that you are mindful of them,
imn: buatc meih longc buoz zeix daaih nyei ga'naaiv, buatc hlaax caux hleix, se meih ganh bun ninh mbuo maaih ganh nyei dorngx yiem. Meih funx baamh mienh benx haaix nyungc cingx jangx taux ninh?

eng: human beings that you care for them? You have made them a little lower than the angels
imn: Funx seix zaangc mienh benx haaix nyungc cingx daaih goux ninh? Meih bun ninh zoux gauh aiv deix meih ganh,

eng: and crowned them with glory and honor. You made them rulers over the works of your hands;
imn: aengx taaih ninh, bun ninh maaih njang-laangc weic zoux hungh ningv. Meih paaiv ninh gunv meih nyei buoz zeix daaih nyei nyungc-nyungc,

eng: you put everything under their feet: all flocks and herds,
imn: yaac orn ninh zoux ziouv gunv maanc muotc, se gunv yietc zungv ngongh caux yungh,

eng: and the animals of the wild, the birds in the sky,
imn: caux yiem lomc nyei hieh zoih, yiem ndaamv-lungh nyei norqc,

eng: and the fish in the sea, all that swim the paths of the seas. Lord , our Lord,
imn: yiem koiv nyei mbiauz, caux yiem koiv mingh mingh daaih daaih nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv. O Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Ziouv aac,

eng: how majestic is your name in all the earth!
imn: meih nyei mbuox gengh hlo! haic buangv lungh ndiev.

eng: I will give thanks to you, Lord , with all my heart; I will tell of all your wonderful deeds. I will be glad and rejoice in you;
imn: Yie oix longc nzengc hnyouv dor-ziec Ziouv, yie oix zunh meih zoux yietc zungv mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. Yie oix weic meih a'hneiv njien-youh.

eng: I will sing the praises of your name, O Most High. My enemies turn back;
imn: O Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh aac, yie oix baaux nzung ceng meih nyei mengh. Yie nyei win-wangv daaux sin tuix nzuonx nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: they stumble and perish before you. For you have upheld my right and my cause,
imn: ninh mbuo yiem meih nyei nza'hmien ndiqv zuqc ndorpc yaac zuqc mietc. Meih zueiz jienv siemv zuiz nyei weic baengh fim nyei siemv,

eng: sitting enthroned as the righteous judge. You have rebuked the nations and destroyed the wicked;
imn: meih yaac baengh fim siemv bun yie duqv longx. Meih hemx ganh fingx mienh, bun orqv mienh zuqc mietc.

eng: you have blotted out their name for ever and ever. Endless ruin has overtaken my enemies,
imn: Meih sortv ninh mbuo nyei mbuox guangc taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Win-wangv zuqc baaic zuqc mbaang taux yietc liuz,

eng: you have uprooted their cities; even the memory of them has perished. The Lord reigns forever;
imn: meih baaic waaic ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv zingh hnangv liemh nzungh baeng cuotv nor, liemh maiv maaih haaix dauh jangx ninh mbuo. Mv baac Ziouv yietc liuz zueiz jienv ninh nyei weic gunv,

eng: he has established his throne for judgment. He rules the world in righteousness
imn: ninh liepc ninh nyei weic daaih siemv zuiz. Ninh baengh fim nyei siemv lungh ndiev mienh,

eng: and judges the peoples with equity. The Lord is a refuge for the oppressed,
imn: hnyouv zingx nyei siemv maanc fingx. Ziouv zoux wuonv nyei dorngx bun zuqc zeix zuqc hoic nyei mienh kaux,

eng: a stronghold in times of trouble. Those who know your name trust in you,
imn: zuqc kuonx naanh nyei ziangh hoc maaih lamh kaux dorngx. O Ziouv aac, nyiemc meih nyei mbuox wuov deix oix kaux meih,

eng: for you, Lord , have never forsaken those who seek you. Sing the praises of the Lord , enthroned in Zion;
imn: weic zuqc meih maiv guangc lorz meih wuov deix mienh. Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng yiem Si^on nyei Ziouv,

eng: proclaim among the nations what he has done. For he who avenges blood remembers;
imn: oix zuqc yiem maanc fingx mbu'ndongx zunh ninh zoux nyei jauv-louc. Weic zuqc ninh zoux jaauv mienh maengc win wuov dauh, yaac jangx ninh mbuo.

eng: he does not ignore the cries of the afflicted. Lord , see how my enemies persecute me!
imn: Ninh maiv la'kuqv zuqc zeix zuqc hoic, heuc jienv tov nyei mienh. O Ziouv aah! Tov meih korv-lienh yie.

eng: Have mercy and lift me up from the gates of death, that I may declare your praises
imn: Tov meih mangc nzorng yie wuov deix mienh bun yie zuqc nyei kouv naanc. Se meih njoux yie yiem zuqc daic nyei gaengh cuotv daaih, weic bun yie yiem Si^on nyei zingh gaengh,

eng: in the gates of Daughter Zion, and there rejoice in your salvation. The nations have fallen into the pit they have dug;
imn: zunh yaangh ceng meih nyei sic, yaac orn-lorqc haic weic zuqc meih njoux yie. Maanc fingx mienh ndortv njiec ninh mbuo ganh wetv nyei kuotv.

eng: their feet are caught in the net they have hidden. The Lord is known by his acts of justice;
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei zaux yaac zuqc ninh mbuo ganh zaeng nyei mungz nzenc jienv. Ziouv bun mienh hiuv duqv ninh ganh,

eng: the wicked are ensnared by the work of their hands. The wicked go down to the realm of the dead,
imn: ninh baengh fim nyei siemv zuiz. Orqv mienh nyei buoz zoux nyei sic hlopv jienv ninh mbuo ganh. Hikv^gai^on, Selaa Orqv mienh, se la'kuqv Tin-Hungh nyei fingx-fingx mienh,

eng: all the nations that forget God. But God will never forget the needy;
imn: zungv zuqc mingh yiem yiemh gen. Ninh maiv zeiz yietc liuz la'kuqv dangx-donx nyei mienh.

eng: the hope of the afflicted will never perish. Arise, Lord , do not let mortals triumph;
imn: Mienh jomc mienh maiv zeiz yietc liuz maiv lamh hnamv dorngx. O Ziouv aah! Daaih maah! Maiv dungx bun baamh mienh duqv hingh.

eng: let the nations be judged in your presence. Strike them with terror, Lord ;
imn: Tov bun maanc fingx yiem meih nyei nza'hmien zuqc siemv. O Ziouv aah! Tov bun ninh mbuo gamh nziex.

eng: let the nations know they are only mortal.
imn: Tov bun maanc fingx zieqv duqv ninh mbuo benx baamh mienh hnangv. Selaa

eng: Why, Lord , do you stand far off? Why do you hide yourself in times of trouble? In his arrogance the wicked man hunts down the weak,
imn: Ziouv aah! Meih weic haaix diuc leih yie mbuo ndongc naaiv go? Yie mbuo zuqc kouv naanc meih weic haaix diuc bingx? Orqv mienh zoux maux zeix mienh jomc mienh.

eng: who are caught in the schemes he devises. He boasts about the cravings of his heart;
imn: Tov bun ninh mbuo daav cuotv nyei za'eix hoic zuqc ninh mbuo ganh. Orqv mienh ceng ganh hnyouv hanc zoux nyei sic,

eng: he blesses the greedy and reviles the Lord . In his pride the wicked man does not seek him;
imn: mauv ga'naaiv nyei mienh zioux yaac mangc piex Ziouv. Mienh waaic mienh hnyouv maux ziouc maiv lorz ninh.

eng: in all his thoughts there is no room for God. His ways are always prosperous;
imn: Orqv mienh kungx hnamv maiv maaih Tin-Hungh. Orqv mienh zoux nyei jauv zanc-zanc duqv longx,

eng: your laws are rejected by him; he sneers at all his enemies. He says to himself, “Nothing will ever shake me.”
imn: meih siemv zuiz nyei jauv hlang haic, orqv mienh maiv bieqc hnyouv. Ninh huotv ninh nyei yietc zungv win-wangv. Ninh yiem hnyouv hnamv, “Yie yietc liuz maiv zuqc kouv,

eng: He swears, “No one will ever do me harm.” His mouth is full of lies and threats;
imn: doic jiex doic yie maiv buangh zeqc naanc.” Zioux mienh, nduov mienh, hoic mienh nyei waac buangv nzengc ninh nyei nzuih.

eng: trouble and evil are under his tongue. He lies in wait near the villages;
imn: Yiem ninh nyei mbietc ga'ndiev maaih doqc nyei, orqv nyei waac. Ninh yiem laangz gu'nyuoz mbueiz nyei dorngx,

eng: from ambush he murders the innocent. His eyes watch in secret for his victims; like a lion in cover he lies in wait.
imn: yiem bingx nyei dorngx daix maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh. Ninh nyei m'zing cienh mangc maiv maaih dorngx kaux nyei mienh. Ninh bingx jienv yiem mbueiz nyei dorngx, hnangv sienh yiem ninh nyei kuotv.

eng: He lies in wait to catch the helpless; he catches the helpless and drags them off in his net. His victims are crushed, they collapse;
imn: Ninh bingx jienv oix caangv doh naanc mienh, ninh baeng ninh nyei mungz guaatv mienh jomc mienh mingh. Maiv maaih dorngx kaux nyei mienh zuqc zatv njiec,

eng: they fall under his strength. He says to himself, “God will never notice;
imn: ninh mbuo zuqc orqv mienh nyei qaqv hoic ninh mbuo ndortv jienv njiec. Orqv mienh yiem hnyouv hnamv, “Tin-Hungh la'kuqv mi'aqv.

eng: he covers his face and never sees.” Arise, Lord ! Lift up your hand, O God.
imn: Ninh bingx jienv ninh nyei hmien, yietc liuz maiv mangc aqv.” O Ziouv aah! Daaih maah! Tov meih sung buoz tengx,

eng: Do not forget the helpless. Why does the wicked man revile God?
imn: maiv dungx la'kuqv kouv naanc nyei mienh. Orqv mienh weic haaix diuc nqemh Tin-Hungh?

eng: Why does he say to himself, “He won’t call me to account”? But you, God, see the trouble of the afflicted;
imn: Orqv mienh yiem hnyouv hnamv, “Ninh maiv longc yie nyei sic.” Mv baac meih buatc nyei,

eng: you consider their grief and take it in hand. The victims commit themselves to you; you are the helper of the fatherless. Break the arm of the wicked man;
imn: meih zungv hiuv duqv mienh zuqc kouv naanc, hnyouv nzauh nyei sic, ziouc njiec buoz tengx. Maiv lamh kaux dorngx nyei mienh zorqv ganh jiu bun meih, weic zuqc meih m'daaih tengx guh hanh fu'jueiv. Tov meih wuotv mienh waaic mienh caux orqv mienh nyei buoz nauv.

eng: call the evildoer to account for his wickedness that would not otherwise be found out. The Lord is King for ever and ever;
imn: Tov wetv cuotv ninh nyei waaic sic taux maiv maaih yietc deix. Ziouv yietc liuz zoux hungh taux maanc gouv maanc doic.

eng: the nations will perish from his land. You, Lord , hear the desire of the afflicted;
imn: Maanc fingx mienh yiem ninh nyei ndau-beih zuqc mietc nzengc. O Ziouv aac, meih muangx haiz nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei mienh oix jouh nyei waac.

eng: you encourage them, and you listen to their cry, defending the fatherless and the oppressed,
imn: Meih oix liepc wuonv ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv yaac baeng m'normh muangx ninh mbuo tov nyei waac, weic bun guh hanh fu'jueiv caux zuqc zeix wuov deix duqv baengh fim,

eng: so that mere earthly mortals will never again strike terror.
imn: weic bun baamh mienh maiv haih zoix aengx haeqv ninh mbuo gamh nziex.

eng: In the Lord I take refuge. How then can you say to me: “Flee like a bird to your mountain. For look, the wicked bend their bows;
imn: Yie ndaauh kaux Ziouv, wuov nyungc, meih mbuo hnangv haaix nor haih gorngv mbuox yie, “Meih oix zuqc hnangv norm norqc biaux mingh taux meih nyei mbong.” Mangc maah! Orqv mienh baeng juang-zinx,

eng: they set their arrows against the strings to shoot from the shadows at the upright in heart. When the foundations are being destroyed,
imn: zorqv forng paanx jienv hlaang, oix yiem hmuangx nyei dorngx, buonv hnyouv zingx nyei mienh. Se gorngv gorn-ndoqv zuqc baaic waaic,

eng: what can the righteous do?” The Lord is in his holy temple;
imn: kuv mienh haih zoux haaix nyungc?” Ziouv yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc biauv gu'nyuoz,

eng: the Lord is on his heavenly throne. He observes everyone on earth; his eyes examine them. The Lord examines the righteous,
imn: Ziouv nyei weic yiem gu'nguaaic lungh. Ninh nyei m'zing zaah mangc baamh mienh, ziouc hiuv duqv ninh mbuo zoux nyei sic. Ziouv kauv kuv mienh caux orqv mienh,

eng: but the wicked, those who love violence, he hates with a passion. On the wicked he will rain
imn: ninh nzorng haic a'hneiv zoux doqc nyei mienh. Ninh oix zorqv zieqc jienv nyei douz-taanx caux hungh bungx njiec mienh waaic mienh gu'nguaaic,

eng: fiery coals and burning sulfur; a scorching wind will be their lot. For the Lord is righteous,
imn: yaac bun nziaaux-jorm benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc. Weic zuqc Ziouv zoux duqv horpc,

eng: he loves justice; the upright will see his face.
imn: ninh yaac a'hneiv mienh zoux horpc nyei sic. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh ziouc duqv buatc ninh nyei hmien.

eng: Help, Lord , for no one is faithful anymore; those who are loyal have vanished from the human race. Everyone lies to their neighbor;
imn: O Ziouv aah! Tov meih tengx yie mbuo, weic zuqc maiv maaih kuv mienh aqv. Yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh zutc nzengc mi'aqv. Dauh dauh gorngv-baeqc nduov ganh nyei juangc laangz mienh.

eng: they flatter with their lips but harbor deception in their hearts. May the Lord silence all flattering lips
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv waac mbiaangc ceng mienh, yaac maaih i diuc hnyouv. Tov Ziouv gaatv guangc ceng weic nduov mienh a'hneiv nyei yietc zungv nzuih meix

eng: and every boastful tongue— those who say,
imn: caux bungx waac-maux, ceng-hlo wuov deix mienh nyei mbietc. Ninh mbuo gorngv, “Yie mbuo haih bangc yie mbuo nyei mbietc hingh jiex.

eng: “By our tongues we will prevail; our own lips will defend us—who is lord over us?” “Because the poor are plundered and the needy groan,
imn: Yie mbuo nyei nzuih meix benx yie mbuo ganh nyei. Haaix dauh zoux yie mbuo nyei ziouv?” Ziouv gorngv, “Yie ih zanc oix jiez daaih

eng: I will now arise,” says the Lord . “I will protect them from those who malign them.” And the words of the Lord are flawless,
imn: weic zuqc jomc nyei mienh zuqc zeix, doh naanc mienh njunh jienv yiem. Yie oix bun ninh mbuo baengh orn nyei yiem dongh ninh mbuo maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv yiem nyei dorngx.” Ziouv nyei waac se cing-nzengc nyei waac,

eng: like silver purified in a crucible, like gold refined seven times. You, Lord , will keep the needy safe
imn: hnangv longc louh douz sinx jiex siec nzunc zien haic nyei nyaanh nor. O Ziouv aac, meih zungv beu jienv yie mbuo,

eng: and will protect us forever from the wicked, who freely strut about
imn: meih oix goux jienv yie mbuo, bun yie mbuo biaux ndutv naaiv doic mienh. Baamh mienh ceng orqv nyei, waaic nyei jauv wuov zanc,

eng: when what is vile is honored by the human race.
imn: orqv mienh youh jienv mingh faam-bung feix louc.

eng: How long, Lord ? Will you forget me forever? How long will you hide your face from me? How long must I wrestle with my thoughts
imn: O Ziouv aac, meih oix la'kuqv yie taux haaix zanc? Oix yietc liuz la'kuqv fai? Meih oix buang jienv hmien maiv mangc yie taux haaix zanc? Yie oix zuqc yiem hnyouv diev mun ndongc haaix lauh?

eng: and day after day have sorrow in my heart? How long will my enemy triumph over me? Look on me and answer, Lord my God.
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv oix zuqc nzauh taux haaix zanc? Yie nyei win-wangv oix hingh jiex yie taux haaix zanc? O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Tov mangc yie yaac dau yie.

eng: Give light to my eyes, or I will sleep in death, and my enemy will say, “I have overcome him,”
imn: Tov bun yie maaih qaqv hnangv loz wuov nor. Maiv zei aeqv, nziex yie zuqc daic. Nziex yie nyei win-wangv gorngv, “Yie hingh jiex ninh mi'aqv.”

eng: and my foes will rejoice when I fall. But I trust in your unfailing love;
imn: Nziex yie nyei win-jaa njien-youh a'hneiv weic zuqc yie zuqc ndortv. Mv baac yie kaux meih weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie.

eng: my heart rejoices in your salvation. I will sing the Lord ’s praise,
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv weic meih nyei njoux en orn-lorqc haic. Yie oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv,

eng: for he has been good to me.
imn: weic zuqc ninh za'gengh zoux longx bun yie.

eng: The fool says in his heart, “There is no God.” They are corrupt, their deeds are vile; there is no one who does good. The Lord looks down from heaven
imn: Mienh hngongx mienh yiem hnyouv gorngv, “Maiv maaih Tin-Hungh lorqc.” Ninh mbuo yietc zungv waaic nzengc, ninh mbuo zoux orqv haic, waaic haic nyei sic. Maiv maaih yietc dauh zoux longx. Ziouv yiem tin-dorngh mangc njiec,

eng: on all mankind to see if there are any who understand, any who seek God. All have turned away, all have become corrupt;
imn: mangc baamh mienh, oix mangc gaax, maaih haaix dauh maaih cong-mengh, maaih haaix dauh lorz Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo yietc zungv yangh pien jauv,

eng: there is no one who does good, not even one. Do all these evildoers know nothing?
imn: dauh dauh fih hnangv nyei waaic nzengc. Maiv maaih haaix dauh zoux longx, yietc dauh yaac maiv maaih. Yietc zungv zoux orqv nyei mienh maiv hiuv haaix nyungc fai?

eng: They devour my people as though eating bread; they never call on the Lord . But there they are, overwhelmed with dread,
imn: Ninh mbuo naqv yie nyei baeqc fingx hnangv ninh mbuo nyanc hnaangx. Ninh mbuo yaac maiv tov Ziouv. Mv baac ninh mbuo yiem wuov gengh! gamh nziex haic,

eng: for God is present in the company of the righteous. You evildoers frustrate the plans of the poor,
imn: weic zuqc Tin-Hungh caux kuv mienh yiem. Meih mbuo zoux orqv nyei mienh oix bun mienh jomc mienh nyei za'eix ndortv,

eng: but the Lord is their refuge. Oh, that salvation for Israel would come out of Zion!
imn: mv baac Ziouv zoux ninh mbuo ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Tov bun I^saa^laa^en Mienh nyei njoux en yiem Si^on cuotv daaih.

eng: When the Lord restores his people, let Jacob rejoice and Israel be glad!
imn: Ziouv bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx nzuonx daaih duqv longx hnangv zinh ndaangc wuov zanc, Yaakopv nyei zeiv-fun ziouc maaih orn-lorqc, I^saa^laa^en Mienh oix njien-youh.

eng: Lord , who may dwell in your sacred tent? Who may live on your holy mountain? The one whose walk is blameless,
imn: O Ziouv aac, haaix dauh haih yiem zaangc meih nyei ndopv-liuh? Haaix dauh haih yiem meih nyei cing-nzengc mbong? Dongh yiem seix zaangc zoux nyei sic maiv maaih dorngx daanh wuov dauh.

eng: who does what is righteous, who speaks the truth from their heart; whose tongue utters no slander,
imn: Ninh haaix zanc yaac kungx zoux horpc hnangv. Ninh hnyouv zingx gorngv zien waac nyei mienh. Ninh maiv longc ninh nyei mbietc gorngv doqc mienh,

eng: who does no wrong to a neighbor, and casts no slur on others; who despises a vile person
imn: maiv zoux dorngc ninh nyei gorx-youz, yaac maiv zunh mienh nyei mengh dauh waaic. Ninh mangc piex waaic haic, orqv haic nyei mienh,

eng: but honors those who fear the Lord ; who keeps an oath even when it hurts, and does not change their mind; who lends money to the poor without interest;
imn: mv baac taaih dongh taaih Ziouv wuov deix. Ninh haaix zanc ei ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac zoux, maiv gunv kuei zuqc ninh ganh, ninh yaac maiv hnamv-nzuonx. Ninh bungx zaeqv, maiv longc leic zinh,

eng: who does not accept a bribe against the innocent. Whoever does these things will never be shaken.
imn: yaac maiv nyanc nyaanh hmuangx maaic maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh nyei m'nqorngv. Zoux naaiv deix sic nyei mienh yietc liuz nqamv maiv dongz.

eng: Keep me safe, my God, for in you I take refuge. I say to the Lord , “You are my Lord;
imn: O Tin-Hungh aac, tov meih beu jienv yie, weic zuqc yie ndaauh kaux meih. Yie gorngv mbuox Ziouv, “Meih zoux yie nyei Ziouv,

eng: apart from you I have no good thing.” I say of the holy people who are in the land,
imn: cuotv liuz meih yie maiv maaih haaix nyungc longx.” Yiem baamh gen nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx,

eng: “They are the noble ones in whom is all my delight.” Those who run after other gods will suffer more and more.
imn: se gauh longx jiex, dongh yie gauh a'hneiv jiex nyei mienh. Ginv gan nyiec nyei zienh wuov deix jaa nzauh camv.

eng: I will not pour out libations of blood to such gods or take up their names on my lips. Lord , you alone are my portion and my cup;
imn: Ninh mbuo dox ziec zienh nyei nziaamv, yie maiv dox. Yie nyei nzuih meix yaac maiv gorngv cuotv naaiv deix zienh nyei mbuox. Ziouv se yie nzipc nyei buonc, dongh meih paaiv ziangx bun yie nyei buonc.

eng: you make my lot secure. The boundary lines have fallen for me in pleasant places;
imn: Yie oix duqv nyei buonc meih tengx yie goux. Longc hlaang ndorqc bun yie nyei gapv-jaaix ndortv zuqc kuh yiem nyei dorngx.

eng: surely I have a delightful inheritance. I will praise the Lord , who counsels me;
imn: Yie duqv nzipc longx haic nyei buonc. Yie oix ceng Ziouv weic zuqc ninh dorh yie.

eng: even at night my heart instructs me. I keep my eyes always on the Lord .
imn: Lungh muonz zanc yie nyei hnyouv yaac njaaux yie. Yie zanc-zanc bun Ziouv yiem yie nyei nza'hmien.

eng: With him at my right hand, I will not be shaken. Therefore my heart is glad and my tongue rejoices;
imn: Weic zuqc ninh yiem yie nyei mbiaauc maengx maiv maaih haaix nyungc ging-dongz yie. Weic naaiv yie nyei hnyouv njien-youh a'hneiv haic.

eng: my body also will rest secure, because you will not abandon me to the realm of the dead,
imn: Yie nyei sin yaac yiem duqv wuonv nyei, weic zuqc meih maiv guangc yie yiem yiemh gen,

eng: nor will you let your faithful one see decay. You make known to me the path of life;
imn: yaac maiv bun meih nyei Cing-Nzengc Mienh zuqc huv. Meih oix bun yie hiuv duqv ziangh maengc nyei jauv.

eng: you will fill me with joy in your presence, with eternal pleasures at your right hand.
imn: Yiem meih nyei nza'hmien meih bun yie maaih njien-youh taux daauh. Yiem meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz maaih yietc liuz nyei orn-lorqc.

eng: Hear me, Lord , my plea is just; listen to my cry. Hear my prayer— it does not rise from deceitful lips. Let my vindication come from you;
imn: O Ziouv aah! Tov meih muangx haiz yie tov baengh fim nyei jauv. Tov muangx yie heuc jienv gorngv. Baeng m'normh muangx yie daux gaux nyei waac, se maiv zeiz yiem gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Tov meih bun cing yie se maiv dorngc,

eng: may your eyes see what is right. Though you probe my heart,
imn: tov bun meih nyei m'zing mangc buatc haaix nyungc se horpc. Meih zungv kauv yie nyei hnyouv, lungh muonz zanc yaac zaah yie,

eng: though you examine me at night and test me, you will find that I have planned no evil; my mouth has not transgressed. Though people tried to bribe me,
imn: meih seix liuz yie, meih maiv buatc yie dorngc haaix nyungc. Yie nyei nzuih yaac maiv gorngv orqv nyei sic. Gorngv taux mienh zoux nyei sic,

eng: I have kept myself from the ways of the violent through what your lips have commanded. My steps have held to your paths;
imn: yie bangc meih nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Yie simv jienv, maiv gan zoux doqc nyei mienh nyei jauv. Yie nyei zaux-mbiec kungx gan meih nyei jauv mingh,

eng: my feet have not stumbled. I call on you, my God, for you will answer me;
imn: yie nyei zaux yaac maiv caaiv piatv. O Tin-Hungh aah! Yie jouh meih weic zuqc meih zungv oix dau yie.

eng: turn your ear to me and hear my prayer. Show me the wonders of your great love,
imn: Tov baeng m'normh muangx yie nyei waac. Meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh,

eng: you who save by your right hand those who take refuge in you from their foes. Keep me as the apple of your eye;
imn: tov bun meih hnamv nyei jauv hinc cuotv daaih. Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz njoux ndaauh kaux meih wuov deix biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei win-wangv. Tov beu yie hnangv beu meih nyei m'zing-mienh nor,

eng: hide me in the shadow of your wings from the wicked who are out to destroy me,
imn: tov bun yie bingx yiem meih nyei ndaatv-ndiev, bun yie biaux ndutv zeix yie wuov deix orqv mienh nyei buoz-ndiev

eng: from my mortal enemies who surround me. They close up their callous hearts,
imn: caux weih gormx oix hoic yie nyei maengc wuov deix win-wangv. Ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv maiv korv-lienh mienh,

eng: and their mouths speak with arrogance. They have tracked me down, they now surround me,
imn: ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv waac-maux. Ninh mbuo zimh jienv yie mingh, ih zanc weih gormx yie.

eng: with eyes alert, to throw me to the ground. They are like a lion hungry for prey,
imn: Ninh mbuo bungx m'zing cienh mangc, fongv yie king njiec ndau. Ninh mbuo hnangv sienh nor, oix betv yie,

eng: like a fierce lion crouching in cover. Rise up, Lord , confront them, bring them down;
imn: yaac hnangv sienh lunx bingx jienv mbueiz nyei dorngx oix hoic yie. Ziouv aah! Tov daaih caux ninh mbuo mborqv jaax, bun ninh mbuo zuqc suei.

eng: with your sword rescue me from the wicked. By your hand save me from such people, Lord ,
imn: Tov longc meih nyei nzuqc ndaauv njoux yie nyei maengc biaux ndutv orqv mienh. O Ziouv aah! Tov longc meih nyei buoz njoux yie leih ndutv

eng: when I awake, I will be satisfied with seeing your likeness.
imn: Yie nyie daaih nyei ziangh hoc, yie duqv buatc meih ziouc buangv hnyouv aqv.

eng: I love you, Lord , my strength. The Lord is my rock, my fortress and my deliverer;
imn: O Ziouv aac, meih zoux yie nyei qaqv. Yie hnamv meih. Ziouv zoux yie nyei la'bieiv, yie kaux wuonv nyei dorngx caux njoux yie wuov dauh.

eng: my God is my rock, in whom I take refuge, my shield and the horn of my salvation, my stronghold. I called to the Lord , who is worthy of praise,
imn: Yie nyei Tin-Hungh, se yie nyei la'bieiv, dongh yie ndaauh kaux wuov dauh. Ninh zoux yie nyei torngv-baaih, zoux qaqv njoux yie, zoux wuonv nyei dorngx beu yie. Yie heuc Ziouv, dongh puix duqv mienh ceng wuov dauh.

eng: and I have been saved from my enemies. The cords of death entangled me;
imn: Ninh yaac njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv. Maaih haih daic nyei qaqv hnangv hlaang nzenc jienv yie,

eng: the torrents of destruction overwhelmed me. The cords of the grave coiled around me;
imn: zuqc mietc nyei jauv hnangv wuom-laangc beqv yiemx jienv yie. Yiemh gen nyei hlaang nzenc jienv yie,

eng: the snares of death confronted me. In my distress I called to the Lord ;
imn: haih daic nyei qaqv hnangv mungz nor zaaux jienv yie. Zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc yie heuc jienv tov Ziouv.

eng: I cried to my God for help. From his temple he heard my voice; my cry came before him, into his ears. The earth trembled and quaked,
imn: Yie heuc jienv tov yie nyei Tin-Hungh tengx. Ninh yiem ninh nyei singx dinc gu'nyuoz muangx haiz yie nyei qiex. Yie heuc jienv ninh nyei qiex bieqc taux ninh nyei m'normh. Wuov zanc ndau-beih zuqc mbungh mbungh mbienv-mbienv nyei,

eng: and the foundations of the mountains shook; they trembled because he was angry. Smoke rose from his nostrils;
imn: mbong nyei gorn-ndoqv yaac zuqc ndanc dongz nyanh nyanh nyei, weic zuqc ninh qiex jiez. Douz-sioux yangh ninh nyei mba'zorng cuotv.

eng: consuming fire came from his mouth, burning coals blazed out of it. He parted the heavens and came down;
imn: Ninh nyei nzuih cuotv haih buov qui nyei douz, douz-taanx yaac zuqc wuov deix douz zieqc jienv. Ninh bun lungh nqoi ziouc njiec daaih,

eng: dark clouds were under his feet. He mounted the cherubim and flew;
imn: maaih mbuonx-jieqv yiem ninh nyei zaux-ndiev. Ninh geh ke^lu^mbim ndaix mingh,

eng: he soared on the wings of the wind. He made darkness his covering, his canopy around him—
imn: ninh bangc nziaaux nyei qaqv siepv-siepv nyei daaih. Ninh bun hmuangx om ninh nyei sin,

eng: the dark rain clouds of the sky. Out of the brightness of his presence clouds advanced,
imn: maaih wuom nyei mbuonx-jieqv torngv jienv ninh. Yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien nyei njang,

eng: with hailstones and bolts of lightning. The Lord thundered from heaven;
imn: maaih borqc caux zieqc jienv douz nyei taanx cunx tong ninh nyei mouc. Ziouv yiem gu'nguaaic lungh gorngv cuotv hnangv mba'ong mbui.

eng: the voice of the Most High resounded. He shot his arrows and scattered the enemy,
imn: Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh heuc cuotv ziouc maaih borqc caux zieqc jienv douz nyei douz-taanx. Ninh buonv cuotv ninh nyei forng-cang zoux bun win-wangv nzaanx.

eng: with great bolts of lightning he routed them. The valleys of the sea were exposed
imn: Ninh borngz mba'lingc njapc njapc nyei, haeqv win-wangv lunc nzengc. O Ziouv aac, meih hatc hniev nyei,

eng: and the foundations of the earth laid bare at your rebuke, Lord , at the blast of breath from your nostrils. He reached down from on high and took hold of me;
imn: meih biomv meih nyei qiex yangh meih nyei mba'zorng cuotv. Koiv-ndoqv ziouc hinc cuotv daaih, ndau nyei gorn-ndoqv yaac cuotv daaih nqaengc nyei. Ninh yiem gu'nguaaic hlang nyei dorngx sung buoz zorqv yie,

eng: he drew me out of deep waters. He rescued me from my powerful enemy,
imn: yiem wuom-ndo nyei dorngx baeng cuotv daaih. Ninh njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei henv haic nyei win-wangv

eng: from my foes, who were too strong for me. They confronted me in the day of my disaster,
imn: caux nzorng yie wuov deix mienh, weic zuqc ninh mbuo gauh henv jiex yie. Yie zuqc zeqc naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc ninh mbuo daaih hoic yie,

eng: but the Lord was my support. He brought me out into a spacious place;
imn: mv baac Ziouv zoux yie kaux nyei dorngx. Ninh dorh yie cuotv daaih taux norm jangv nyei dorngx.

eng: he rescued me because he delighted in me. The Lord has dealt with me according to my righteousness;
imn: Ninh njoux yie weic zuqc ninh a'hneiv yie. Ziux yie zoux duqv horpc, Ziouv bun zingh nyeic yie.

eng: according to the cleanness of my hands he has rewarded me. For I have kept the ways of the Lord ;
imn: Ziux yie maiv zoux dorngc, ninh winh bun yie. Weic zuqc yie gan nzengc Ziouv nyei doz

eng: I am not guilty of turning from my God. All his laws are before me;
imn: yie maiv zoux waaic ngaengc yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh nyei yietc zungv leiz yiem yie nyei nza'hmien,

eng: I have not turned away from his decrees. I have been blameless before him
imn: yie yaac maiv guangc ninh nyei leiz-nyeic. Yie yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien maiv maaih dorngc nyei dorngx.

eng: and have kept myself from sin. The Lord has rewarded me according to my righteousness,
imn: Yie yaac goux longx ganh, maiv zoux dorngc zuiz. Weic naaiv, ziux yie zoux duqv horpc,

eng: according to the cleanness of my hands in his sight. To the faithful you show yourself faithful,
imn: yaac ziux ninh mangc, buatc yie cing-nzengc, Ziouv winh bun yie. Weic ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh meih ziepc zuoqv nyei daaix ninh mbuo.

eng: to the blameless you show yourself blameless, to the pure you show yourself pure,
imn: Weic maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh, meih bun cing meih ganh maiv maaih dorngx nqemh. Weic cing-nzengc wuov deix, meih bun cing meih ganh cing-nzengc.

eng: but to the devious you show yourself shrewd. You save the humble
imn: Weic hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh, meih yaac bun cing meih ngaengc ninh mbuo. Meih njoux nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: but bring low those whose eyes are haughty. You, Lord , keep my lamp burning;
imn: mv baac m'zing-jaax hlang wuov deix, meih zatv ninh mbuo njiec. Meih diemv zieqc yie nyei dang.

eng: my God turns my darkness into light. With your help I can advance against a troop ;
imn: Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh, ziux yie hmuangx nyei dorngx njang daaih. Yie bangc meih ziouc haih mborqv duqv jun-baeng.

eng: with my God I can scale a wall. As for God, his way is perfect:
imn: Yie kaux yie nyei Tin-Hungh haih biu jiex zingh laatc. Naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh, ninh nyei doz dunh yunh nyei.

eng: The Lord ’s word is flawless; he shields all who take refuge in him. For who is God besides the Lord ?
imn: Ziouv laengz nyei waac, buatc za'gengh zien nyei. Ninh zoux torngv-baaih weic yietc zungv ndaauh kaux ninh nyei mienh. Cuotv liuz Ziouv, haaix dauh zoux Tin-Hungh?

eng: And who is the Rock except our God? It is God who arms me with strength
imn: Cuotv liuz mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh, haaix dauh benx wuov norm La'bieiv ? Naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh bun yie maaih qaqv

eng: and keeps my way secure. He makes my feet like the feet of a deer;
imn: yaac bun yie nyei jauv baengh orn. Ninh bun yie nyei zaux hnangv njaih nyeiz nyei deih nor caaiv duqv jienv,

eng: he causes me to stand on the heights. He trains my hands for battle;
imn: yaac bun yie haih yiem hlang nyei dorngx souv duqv wuonv. Ninh njaaux yie hoqc linc mborqv jaax,

eng: my arms can bend a bow of bronze. You make your saving help my shield,
imn: yie nyei buoz cingx daaih haih baeng dongh siqv juang-zinx. Meih bun meih nyei njoux en weic zoux yie nyei torngv-baaih.

eng: and your right hand sustains me; your help has made me great. You provide a broad path for my feet,
imn: Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz baav jienv yie. Meih tengx yie, bun yie duqv zoux hlo. Meih bun yie nyei zaux caaiv nyei dorngx jangv,

eng: so that my ankles do not give way. I pursued my enemies and overtook them;
imn: yie nyei zaux ziouc maiv piatv. Yie zunc yie nyei win-wangv yaac zunc zaaic ninh mbuo.

eng: I did not turn back till they were destroyed. I crushed them so that they could not rise;
imn: Yie maiv daaux sin nzuonx taux ninh mbuo zuqc baaic nzengc. Yie mborqv ninh mbuo, ninh mbuo ziouc maiv haih jiez sin.

eng: they fell beneath my feet. You armed me with strength for battle;
imn: Ninh mbuo king njiec yie nyei zaux-hlen. Weic zuqc meih bun yie maaih qaqv mborqv jaax,

eng: you humbled my adversaries before me. You made my enemies turn their backs in flight,
imn: meih bun daaih mborqv yie wuov deix zuqc yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev. Meih yaac bun yie nyei win-wangv huin nqaang biaux.

eng: and I destroyed my foes. They cried for help, but there was no one to save them—
imn: Yie duqv mietc nzengc nzorng yie wuov deix. Ninh mbuo heuc jienv tov tengx, mv baac maiv maaih mienh njoux ninh mbuo.

eng: to the Lord , but he did not answer. I beat them as fine as windblown dust;
imn: Ninh mbuo heuc Ziouv, mv baac ninh maiv dau ninh mbuo. Yie mborqv ninh mbuo muonc hnangv nziaaux buonc nyei nie-mbung.

eng: I trampled them like mud in the streets. You have delivered me from the attacks of the people;
imn: Yie zorqv ninh mbuo zoi guangc hnangv jauv zaangc nyei wuom-bamc ndorngh nor. Meih njoux yie biaux ndutv, maiv zuqc baeqc fingx fiuv-nzaeng nyei sic.

eng: you have made me the head of nations. People I did not know now serve me, foreigners cower before me;
imn: Meih bun yie zoux maanc guoqv nyei bieiv zeiv. Dongh yie maiv hiuv jiex nyei baeqc fingx fu-sux yie. Ninh mbuo yietv muangx haiz yie nyei mengh dauh ninh mbuo muangx yie.

eng: as soon as they hear of me, they obey me. They all lose heart;
imn: Ganh fingx mienh daaih mbaapv njiec yie nyei nza'hmien. Ganh fingx mienh hnyouv mau nzengc,

eng: they come trembling from their strongholds. The Lord lives! Praise be to my Rock!
imn: sin zinx nyanh nyanh nyei yiem ninh mbuo wuonv nyei dorngx cuotv daaih. Ziouv ziangh jienv. Oix zuqc ceng yie nyei La'bieiv .

eng: Exalted be God my Savior! He is the God who avenges me,
imn: Oix zuqc taaih yie nyei Tin-Hungh, dongh njoux yie wuov dauh. Se naaiv dauh Tin-Hungh tengx yie jaauv win,

eng: who subdues nations under me, who saves me from my enemies.
imn: yaac bun maanc fingx zuqc yiem yie nyei buoz-ndiev. Ninh njoux yie biaux ndutv yie nyei win-wangv,

eng: You exalted me above my foes; from a violent man you rescued me. Therefore I will praise you, Lord , among the nations;
imn: yaac bouh yie faaux gauh hlang jiex yie nyei win-jaa, meih njoux yie biaux ndutv doqc nyei mienh. O Ziouv aac, weic naaiv yie ziouc yiem maanc fingx mienh mbu'ndongx ceng meih,

eng: I will sing the praises of your name. He gives his king great victories;
imn: yaac baaux nzung ceng meih nyei mengh. Ninh ceix hlo haic nyei njoux en bun ninh nyei hungh diex,

eng: he shows unfailing love to his anointed, to David and to his descendants forever.
imn: yaac bun cing ninh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv ninh longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh , se Ndaawitv caux ninh nyei hoz doic taux yietc liuz.

eng: The heavens declare the glory of God; the skies proclaim the work of his hands. Day after day they pour forth speech;
imn: Lungh zunh yaangh Tin-Hungh nyei njang-laangc, lungh zaangc biux mengh ninh nyei buoz-dauh. Yietc hnoi zunh mbuox jiex yietc hnoi,

eng: night after night they reveal knowledge. They have no speech, they use no words;
imn: yietc muonz zunh wuonh zaang jiex yietc muonz. Mouc nyinh mouc waac,

eng: no sound is heard from them. Yet their voice goes out into all the earth,
imn: mouc sing-qiex maiv haiz, mv baac ninh nyei fienx mingh gormx baamh gen,

eng: their words to the ends of the world. In the heavens God has pitched a tent for the sun. It is like a bridegroom coming out of his chamber,
imn: ninh nyei nyinh nyouz mingh jomc lungh ndiev. Tin-Hungh yiem wuov lungh weic mba'hnoi corng ndopv-liuh. Mba'hnoi cuotv daaih hnangv siang-laangh yiem ninh nyei gen cuotv.

eng: like a champion rejoicing to run his course. It rises at one end of the heavens
imn: Yaac hnangv saaix tiux nyei mienh henv mienh njien-youh nyei gan saaix nyei jauv mingh. Mba'hnoi yiem naaiv bung lungh cuotv daaih,

eng: and makes its circuit to the other; nothing is deprived of its warmth. The law of the Lord is perfect,
imn: aengx youh taux wuov bung lungh. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc haih bingx duqv ninh jorm nyei qiex. Ziouv nyei leiz-latc se dunh yunh nyei,

eng: refreshing the soul. The statutes of the Lord are trustworthy, making wise the simple. The precepts of the Lord are right,
imn: bun mienh nyei hnyouv fingv jiez daaih. Ziouv nyei leiz-nyeic se kaux duqv wuonv nyei, bun maiv maaih cong-mengh nyei mienh maaih cong-mengh. Ziouv hatc nyei waac horpc nyei,

eng: giving joy to the heart. The commands of the Lord are radiant, giving light to the eyes. The fear of the Lord is pure,
imn: bun gan nyei mienh maaih njien-youh. Ziouv nyei lingc cing-nzengc nyei, bun mienh haih mengh baeqc. Mienh taaih Ziouv se longx haic,

eng: enduring forever. The decrees of the Lord are firm, and all of them are righteous. They are more precious than gold,
imn: oix zuqc taaih taux maanc gouv maanc doic. Ziouv nyei leiz se zien nyei, diuh diuh baengh fim nyei. Se gauh jaaix jiex jiem,

eng: than much pure gold; they are sweeter than honey, than honey from the honeycomb. By them your servant is warned;
imn: zungv gauh jaaix zien jiem. Yaac gauh gaam jiex mueiz-dorngh, dongh yiem mueiz-pengx liouc cuotv nyei mueiz-dorngh. Naaiv deix leiz-latc kuinx meih nyei bou.

eng: in keeping them there is great reward. But who can discern their own errors?
imn: Mienh ei jienv naaiv deix waac zoux ziouc maaih domh zingh nyeic. Haaix dauh haih zieqv duqv ganh zoux dorngc nyei jauv?

eng: Forgive my hidden faults. Keep your servant also from willful sins;
imn: Tov guangc nqoi yie zoux dorngc, zieqv maiv duqv nyei sic. Tov dangv jienv bun meih nyei bou maiv dungx duqv-eix baamz zuiz.

eng: may they not rule over me. Then I will be blameless, innocent of great transgression. May these words of my mouth and this meditation of my heart
imn: Maiv dungx bun naaiv deix zuiz gunv yie. Hnangv naaic yie ziouc maiv maaih dorngx nqemh, yaac biaux duqv ndutv domh zuiz. O Ziouv aac, meih zoux yie nyei La'bieiv ,

eng: be pleasing in your sight, Lord , my Rock and my Redeemer.
imn: yaac zoux Zuoqc Yie Wuov Dauh. Tov bun yie nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv nyei waac, caux yie yiem hnyouv hnamv nyei jauv, ziux meih mangc haih zoux duqv horpc.

eng: May the Lord answer you when you are in distress; may the name of the God of Jacob protect you. May he send you help from the sanctuary
imn: Meih buangh zuqc kouv naanc nyei hnoi-nyieqc tov Ziouv dau, tov Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh beu jienv meih. Tov ninh yiem singx dinc tengx meih,

eng: and grant you support from Zion. May he remember all your sacrifices
imn: yaac yiem Si^on Mbong beu jienv meih. Tov ninh jangx meih fongc horc nyei nyungc-nyungc ga'naaiv,

eng: and accept your burnt offerings. May he give you the desire of your heart
imn: yaac a'hneiv meih buov ziec nyei yietc zungv. Selaa Tov ninh bun meih duqv ziux meih nyei hnyouv oix nyei,

eng: and make all your plans succeed. May we shout for joy over your victory
imn: yaac ei jienv meih nyei yietc zungv za'eix zoux ziangx. Yie mbuo ziouc njien-youh nyei heuc weic meih hingh jiex,

eng: and lift up our banners in the name of our God. May the Lord grant all your requests. Now this I know:
imn: yie mbuo yaac dengv yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh nyei mbuox liepc yie mbuo nyei geh. Tov Ziouv dau meih tov nyei yietc zungv waac. Ih zanc yie hiuv duqv Ziouv oix tengx ninh longc youh orn daaih wuov dauh.

eng: The Lord gives victory to his anointed. He answers him from his heavenly sanctuary with the victorious power of his right hand. Some trust in chariots and some in horses,
imn: Ninh oix yiem ninh cing-nzengc nyei tin-dorngh dau. Ninh longc ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz nyei domh qaqv tengx hingh jiex. Maaih deix kaux ninh mbuo nyei mborqv jaax cie, maaih deix kaux ninh mbuo nyei maaz,

eng: but we trust in the name of the Lord our God. They are brought to their knees and fall,
imn: mv baac yie mbuo kaux Ziouv, yie mbuo nyei Tin-Hungh. Ninh mbuo ziouc ndorpc, king njiec,

eng: but we rise up and stand firm. Lord , give victory to the king!
imn: mv baac yie mbuo duqv jiez sin souv wuonv. O Ziouv aac, tov tengx hungh diex hingh jiex.

eng: Answer us when we call!
imn: Yie mbuo heuc nyei ziangh hoc, tov dau yie mbuo.

eng: The king rejoices in your strength, Lord . How great is his joy in the victories you give! You have granted him his heart’s desire
imn: Ziouv aac, hungh diex a'hneiv haic weic meih ceix bun nyei qaqv. Ninh orn-lorqc haic weic zuqc meih tengx ninh hingh jiex. Ziux ninh nyei hnyouv oix nyei meih ceix bun ninh.

eng: and have not withheld the request of his lips. You came to greet him with rich blessings
imn: Ziux ninh nyei nzuih tov nyei waac meih yaac dau. Selaa Meih ceix longx haic nyei fuqv bun ninh,

eng: and placed a crown of pure gold on his head. He asked you for life, and you gave it to him—
imn: meih zorqv zien jiem nyei ningv ndongx jienv ninh nyei m'nqorngv. Ninh tov meih bun ninh maaih siouc nyuonh, meih yaac ceix bun ninh,

eng: length of days, for ever and ever. Through the victories you gave, his glory is great;
imn: bun ninh nyei siouc nyuonh ndaauv yietc liuz taux yietc liuz. Weic meih tengx ninh, ninh duqv domh njang-laangc.

eng: you have bestowed on him splendor and majesty. Surely you have granted him unending blessings
imn: Meih yaac ceix bun ninh duqv mengh hoc yaac maaih haangh daauh. Meih bun ninh maaih fuqv taux yietc liuz,

eng: and made him glad with the joy of your presence. For the king trusts in the Lord ;
imn: weic zuqc meih caux ninh yiem ninh duqv njien-youh orn-lorqc. Hungh diex sienx kaux Ziouv,

eng: through the unfailing love of the Most High he will not be shaken. Your hand will lay hold on all your enemies;
imn: weic Yiem Hlang Jiex Wuov Dauh ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv ninh, ninh liemh maiv zuqc ndanc dongz. Meih nyei buoz oix lorz buatc meih nyei yietc zungv win-wangv.

eng: your right hand will seize your foes. When you appear for battle,
imn: Meih nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz haih lorz buatc nzorng meih nyei mienh. Meih hinc cuotv nyei ziangh hoc

eng: you will burn them up as in a blazing furnace. The Lord will swallow them up in his wrath, and his fire will consume them. You will destroy their descendants from the earth,
imn: meih ziouc bun ninh mbuo hnangv jorm haic nyei douz-louh. Ziouv nouz ninh mbuo ziouc oix naqv ninh mbuo. Douz yaac oix buov ninh mbuo qui nzengc. Meih ziouc bun ninh mbuo nyei zeiv-fun yiem lungh ndiev zutc nzengc,

eng: their posterity from mankind. Though they plot evil against you
imn: yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx mietc nzengc ninh mbuo nyei hoz doic. Maiv gunv ninh mbuo daav za'eix hoic meih,

eng: and devise wicked schemes, they cannot succeed. You will make them turn their backs
imn: maiv gunv ninh mbuo hnamv cuotv zoux waaic sic, ninh mbuo maiv haih zoux maiv ziangx. Weic zuqc meih baeng meih nyei juang-zinx hungx jienv ninh mbuo nyei hmien,

eng: when you aim at them with drawn bow. Be exalted in your strength, Lord ;
imn: meih ziouc bun ninh mbuo daaux nqaang biaux. O Ziouv aac, yie mbuo ceng meih weic zuqc meih henv haic.

eng: we will sing and praise your might.
imn: Yie mbuo oix baaux nzung ceng meih nyei qaqv.

eng: My God, my God, why have you forsaken me? Why are you so far from saving me, so far from my cries of anguish? My God, I cry out by day, but you do not answer,
imn: Yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie nyei Tin-Hungh! Meih weic haaix diuc guangc yie? Meih weic haaix diuc leih go, maiv njoux yie, maiv haiz yie njunh nyei waac? O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Lungh hnoi zanc yie heuc, meih yaac maiv dau yie.

eng: by night, but I find no rest. Yet you are enthroned as the Holy One;
imn: Lungh muonz zanc yie maiv dingh liouh nyei heuc yaac maiv duqv hitv kuonx. Mv baac meih zueiz weic benx Cing-Nzengc Wuov Dauh.

eng: you are the one Israel praises. In you our ancestors put their trust;
imn: Meih se I^saa^laa^en Mienh ceng wuov dauh. Yie mbuo nyei ong-taaix kaux meih,

eng: they trusted and you delivered them. To you they cried out and were saved;
imn: ninh mbuo bangc meih, meih yaac njoux ninh mbuo. Ninh mbuo heuc meih, ziouc duqv njoux aqv.

eng: in you they trusted and were not put to shame. But I am a worm and not a man,
imn: Ninh mbuo kaux meih, ninh mbuo yaac maiv piatv. Mv baac yie se hnangv norm gaeng-mau, maiv zeiz mienh.

eng: scorned by everyone, despised by the people. All who see me mock me;
imn: Yie zuqc mienh huotv, zuqc mienh mangc piex. Da'faanh buatc yie nyei mienh jatv yie,

eng: they hurl insults, shaking their heads. “He trusts in the Lord ,” they say,
imn: ninh mbuo zuo nzuih baengx bun yie, yaac huangx m'nqorngv gorngv, “Ninh kaux Ziouv,

eng: “let the Lord rescue him. Let him deliver him, since he delights in him.” Yet you brought me out of the womb;
imn: bun Ziouv njoux ninh maah! Bun Ziouv tengx ninh, weic zuqc Ziouv a'hneiv haic ninh.” Se dongh meih bun yie yiem maa nyei ga'sie cuotv seix,

eng: you made me trust in you, even at my mother’s breast. From birth I was cast on you;
imn: yie hopv maa nyei nyorx nyei ziangh hoc, meih yaac goux jienv yie. Yiem yie cuotv seix daaih yie kaux meih.

eng: from my mother’s womb you have been my God. Do not be far from me,
imn: Yiem yie nyei maa yungz yie daaih, meih zoux yie nyei Tin-Hungh. Tov meih maiv dungx leih go yie,

eng: for trouble is near and there is no one to help. Many bulls surround me;
imn: weic zuqc zeqc naanc taux fatv aqv, yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh tengx. Win-wangv camv hnangv ngongh gouv nor weih gormx yie,

eng: strong bulls of Bashan encircle me. Roaring lions that tear their prey
imn: yaac hnangv Mbaasaan henv haic nyei ngongh gouv ninh mbuo weih jienv biei bung. Ninh mbuo se hnangv njunh jienv nyei sienh

eng: open their mouths wide against me. I am poured out like water,
imn: morngx nzuih baengx oix betv yie. Yie zuqc dox cuotv hnangv wuom nor.

eng: and all my bones are out of joint. My heart has turned to wax; it has melted within me. My mouth is dried up like a potsherd,
imn: Yie nyei yietc zungv mbungv-daaux piatv nzengc. Yie nyei mba'nziu se hnangv mueiz-nzing, yiem yie nyei la'kuotv yuqc nzengc. Yie nyei qaqv nqaai nzengc hnangv hlengx nie-mor-huv nor,

eng: and my tongue sticks to the roof of my mouth; you lay me in the dust of death. Dogs surround me,
imn: yie nyei mbietc naetv jienv nzuih dungz. Meih zorqv yie guangc jienv hnangv ga'naaiv-daic. Maaih guanh orqv mienh huing jienv yie,

eng: a pack of villains encircles me; they pierce my hands and my feet. All my bones are on display;
imn: hnangv guanh juv weih gormx yie nor. Ninh mbuo yaac nzopv yie nyei buoz-zaux. Yie nyei mbungv yie zungv haih saauv nzengc,

eng: people stare and gloat over me. They divide my clothes among them
imn: ninh mbuo bungx m'zing nuqv-nuqv nyei mangc yaac jatv yie. Ninh mbuo bun nqoi yie nyei lui-houx,

eng: and cast lots for my garment. But you, Lord , do not be far from me.
imn: yaac weic yie nyei lui ndouv mangc gaax haaix dauh duqv. O Ziouv aah! Tov meih maiv dungx leih go yie.

eng: You are my strength; come quickly to help me. Deliver me from the sword,
imn: Tengx yie wuov dauh Ziouv aah! Siepv-siepv nyei daaih tengx yie. Tov njoux yie nyei maengc biaux ndutv nzuqc ndaauv.

eng: my precious life from the power of the dogs. Rescue me from the mouth of the lions;
imn: Tov njoux yie nyei maengc leih ndutv naaiv deix juv. Tov njoux yie biaux ndutv sienh nyei nzuih baengx,

eng: save me from the horns of the wild oxen. I will declare your name to my people;
imn: njoux yie leih ndutv hieh ngongh nyei jorng. Yie oix zunh meih nyei mengh mbuox yie nyei gorx-youz.

eng: in the assembly I will praise you. You who fear the Lord , praise him!
imn: Yie oix yiem gapv zunv nyei wuic mbu'ndongx ceng meih. Gamh nziex Ziouv nyei mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng ninh.

eng: All you descendants of Jacob, honor him! Revere him, all you descendants of Israel! For he has not despised or scorned
imn: Yaakopv nyei zuangx zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc taaih ninh. I^saa^laa^en nyei yietc zungv hoz doic zeiv-fun aah! Oix zuqc gamh nziex ninh. Weic zuqc ninh maiv mangc piex yaac maiv youx

eng: the suffering of the afflicted one; he has not hidden his face from him but has listened to his cry for help. From you comes the theme of my praise in the great assembly;
imn: siouc kouv nyei mienh zuqc siouc nyei kouv naanc. Ninh maiv buang jienv hmien maiv mangc ninh mbuo, mienh heuc jienv tov nyei ziangh hoc, ninh yaac muangx. Yiem mienh camv gapv zunv nyei dorngx yie ceng nyei waac yiem meih daaih.

eng: before those who fear you I will fulfill my vows. The poor will eat and be satisfied;
imn: Yiem taaih meih nyei mienh nyei nza'hmien yie oix jaauv sung yie laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Mienh jomc mienh duqv nyanc beuv.

eng: those who seek the Lord will praise him— may your hearts live forever! All the ends of the earth
imn: Haaix dauh lorz Ziouv zungv oix ceng ninh. Tov bun meih mbuo yietc liuz ziangh jienv. Jomc lungh ndiev norm-norm dorngx nyei mienh oix jangx Ziouv

eng: will remember and turn to the Lord , and all the families of the nations will bow down before him, for dominion belongs to the Lord
imn: ziouc huin nzuonx daaih lorz ninh. Maanc guoqv nyei maanc fingx oix yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien baaix ninh. Ziouv maaih hungh lingc,

eng: and he rules over the nations. All the rich of the earth will feast and worship;
imn: yaac gunv maanc guoqv. Yiem lungh ndiev zoux maux nyei mienh oix yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien gueic njiec baaix.

eng: all who go down to the dust will kneel before him— those who cannot keep themselves alive. Posterity will serve him;
imn: Da'faanh nzuonx benx nie-mbung nyei mienh, se maiv haih tengx ganh maaih maengc ziangh nyei mienh, oix gueic njiec baaix ninh. Doic-doic zeiv-fun oix fu-sux ninh.

eng: future generations will be told about the Lord. They will proclaim his righteousness,
imn: Mienh oix zorqv Ziouv nyei sic gorngv mbuox hoz doic mienh. Ninh mbuo oix zunh ninh zoux baengh fim nyei jauv

eng: declaring to a people yet unborn: He has done it!
imn: mbuox maiv gaengh cuotv seix nyei mienh, “Ninh njoux ninh nyei mienh aqv.”

eng: The Lord is my shepherd, I lack nothing. He makes me lie down in green pastures,
imn: Ziouv goux yie hnangv goux ba'gi yungh nyei mienh goux ninh nyei ba'gi yungh nor, yie ziouc maiv caa haaix nyungc. Ninh bun yie bueix njiec miev nyiemz nyei dorngx,

eng: he leads me beside quiet waters, he refreshes my soul.
imn: dorh yie yiem wuom sienc nyei ndoqv-hlen. Ninh bun yie nyei hnyouv fingv jiez daaih.

eng: He guides me along the right paths for his name’s sake. Even though I walk
imn: Weic ninh ganh nyei mbuox ninh yienz yie yangh zoux horpc nyei jauv. Maiv gunv yie yangh zuqc daic nyei dongh linh, hmuangx nyei horngz mingh,

eng: through the darkest valley, I will fear no evil, for you are with me; your rod and your staff, they comfort me. You prepare a table before me
imn: yie maiv gamh nziex zuqc haaix nyungc hoic, weic zuqc meih caux yie yiem. Meih longc biaav-mbiaac caux ndaangh ngau goux jienv yie. Meih yiem yie nyei win-wangv nyei nza'hmien

eng: in the presence of my enemies. You anoint my head with oil; my cup overflows. Surely your goodness and love will follow me
imn: meih mbenc nyanc hopv bun yie. Meih longc youh hietv yie nyei m'nqorngv, yie nyei zaanv buangv mienz nzengc. Yie hiuv dingc Ziouv yietc seix korv-lienh

eng: all the days of my life, and I will dwell in the house of the Lord forever.
imn: yaac zoux longx bun yie. Yie yaac duqv yiem Ziouv nyei biauv taux maanc gouv maanc doic.

eng: The earth is the Lord ’s, and everything in it, the world, and all who live in it; for he founded it on the seas
imn: Ndau-beih caux yiem ndau-beih nyei maanc muotc benx Ziouv nyei. Lungh ndiev caux lungh ndiev nyei maanc mienh yaac ninh nyei. Ninh ceix baamh gen jiez daaih yiem koiv gu'nguaaic,

eng: and established it on the waters. Who may ascend the mountain of the Lord ?
imn: se liepc jienv yiem wuom gu'nguaaic. Haaix dauh maaih leiz faaux Ziouv nyei mbong?

eng: Who may stand in his holy place? The one who has clean hands and a pure heart,
imn: Haaix dauh haih souv jienv yiem ninh nyei cing-nzengc dorngx? Se dongh zoux nyei sic caux hnamv nyei jauv cing-nzengc nyei mienh,

eng: who does not trust in an idol or swear by a false god. They will receive blessing from the Lord
imn: dongh maiv jiez hnyouv zoux jaav nyei sic, yaac maiv la'guaih houv jaav waac. Ninh oix duqv Ziouv ceix fuqv.

eng: and vindication from God their Savior. Such is the generation of those who seek him,
imn: Njoux ninh wuov dauh Tin-Hungh yaac oix bun cing ninh zoux duqv horpc. Se dongh naaiv nyungc mienh daaih lorz ninh,

eng: who seek your face, God of Jacob. Lift up your heads, you gates;
imn: daaih yiem Yaakopv nyei Tin-Hungh nyei nza'hmien. Selaa Koi nqoi laatc gaengh maah!

eng: be lifted up, you ancient doors, that the King of glory may come in. Who is this King of glory?
imn: Koi nqoi loz-hnoi nyei gaengh. Maaih njang-laangc nyei Hungh oix bieqc daaih. Naaiv dauh njang-laangc nyei Hungh dongh haaix dauh?

eng: The Lord strong and mighty, the Lord mighty in battle. Lift up your heads, you gates;
imn: Se dongh maaih qaqv henv haic nyei Ziouv, dongh mborqv jaax henv nyei Ziouv. Koi nqoi laatc gaengh maah!

eng: lift them up, you ancient doors, that the King of glory may come in. Who is he, this King of glory?
imn: Koi nqoi loz-hnoi nyei gaengh. Maaih njang-laangc nyei Hungh oix bieqc daaih. Naaiv dauh njang-laangc nyei Hungh dongh haaix dauh?

eng: The Lord Almighty— he is the King of glory.
imn: Se Nernh Jiex nyei Ziouv. Dongh naaiv dauh zoux njang-laangc nyei Hungh. Selaa

eng: In you, Lord my God, I put my trust. I trust in you;
imn: O Ziouv aac, yie bungx dingc hnyouv kaux meih. O yie nyei Tin-Hungh aac, yie kaux meih.

eng: do not let me be put to shame, nor let my enemies triumph over me. No one who hopes in you
imn: Tov maiv dungx bun yie zuqc nyaiv, yaac maiv dungx bun yie nyei win-wangv hingh jiex yie. Da'faanh zuov jienv meih nyei mienh

eng: will ever be put to shame, but shame will come on those who are treacherous without cause. Show me your ways, Lord ,
imn: yietc liuz maiv zuqc nyaiv. Mv baac ngaengc jienv meih yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx wuov deix zungv oix zuqc nyaiv aqv. O Ziouv aac, tov bun yie hiuv duqv meih nyei za'eix

eng: teach me your paths. Guide me in your truth and teach me,
imn: yaac njaaux yie hiuv duqv meih nyei jauv. Tov meih dorh yie gan meih nyei zien leiz yaac njaaux yie,

eng: for you are God my Savior, and my hope is in you all day long. Remember, Lord , your great mercy and love,
imn: weic zuqc meih zoux njoux yie wuov dauh Tin-Hungh. Yie ziangh hnoi ziangh muonz zuov meih. O Ziouv aac, tov meih jangx jienv meih korv-lienh mienh yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh,

eng: for they are from of old. Do not remember the sins of my youth
imn: weic zuqc loz-hnoi m'daaih hnangv naaic. Maiv dungx jangx yie lunx nyei ziangh hoc zoux dorngc, baamz nyei zuiz.

eng: and my rebellious ways; according to your love remember me, for you, Lord , are good. Good and upright is the Lord ;
imn: O Ziouv aac, ziux meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv mienh tov meih jangx yie, weic zuqc meih se longx haic. Ziouv se longx nyei, baengh fim nyei,

eng: therefore he instructs sinners in his ways. He guides the humble in what is right
imn: ninh ziouc njaaux zuiz-mienh yangh horpc nyei jauv. Ninh dorh nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei mienh zoux horpc nyei sic,

eng: and teaches them his way. All the ways of the Lord are loving and faithful
imn: yaac njaaux ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh nyei jauv. Da'faanh ei jienv Ziouv nyei ngaengc waac caux ninh gorngv nyei waac nyei mienh

eng: toward those who keep the demands of his covenant. For the sake of your name, Lord ,
imn: ninh hnamv yaac ziepc zuoqv nyei dorh. O Ziouv aah! Weic meih ganh nyei mengh

eng: forgive my iniquity, though it is great. Who, then, are those who fear the Lord ?
imn: tov guangc yie nyei zuiz, weic zuqc yie nyei zuiz hlo haic. Haaix dauh taaih Ziouv,

eng: He will instruct them in the ways they should choose. They will spend their days in prosperity,
imn: ninh oix njaaux wuov dauh ginv yangh horpc nyei jauv. Yiem ninh nyei seix zeiv ninh duqv siouc fuqv-loqc,

eng: and their descendants will inherit the land. The Lord confides in those who fear him;
imn: ninh nyei hoz doic yaac duqv nzipc naaiv norm deic-bung. Ziouv caux taaih ninh wuov deix zoux doic.

eng: he makes his covenant known to them. My eyes are ever on the Lord ,
imn: Ninh bun ninh mbuo hiuv duqv ninh laengz nyei ngaengc waac. Yie nyei m'zing zanc-zanc mangc Ziouv,

eng: for only he will release my feet from the snare. Turn to me and be gracious to me,
imn: weic zuqc kungx ninh ganh haih tengx yie nyei zaux leih ndutv, maiv zuqc mungz nzenc. Tov meih huin nzuonx daaih mangc yie, korv-lienh yie,

eng: for I am lonely and afflicted. Relieve the troubles of my heart
imn: weic zuqc yie ndoqc yaac kuonx naanh. Yie nyei hnyouv nzauh duqv kouv haic.

eng: and free me from my anguish. Look on my affliction and my distress
imn: Tov tengx yie biaux ndutv yie nyei kouv naanc. Tov meih tengx corngh yie nyei kouv naanc caux naanc zingh,

eng: and take away all my sins. See how numerous are my enemies
imn: aengx guangc yie nyei yietc zungv zuiz. Tov meih hnamv mangc gaax, yie nyei win-wangv ndongc haaix camv,

eng: and how fiercely they hate me! Guard my life and rescue me;
imn: yaac mangc gaax ninh mbuo nzorng duqv yie doqc haic. Tov meih beu jienv yie nyei maengc aengx njoux yie,

eng: do not let me be put to shame, for I take refuge in you. May integrity and uprightness protect me,
imn: bun yie maiv zuqc nyaiv, weic zuqc yie ndaauh kaux meih. Meih hnyouv zaqc hnyouv zingx nyei ziouc tov meih beu jienv yie,

eng: because my hope, Lord , is in you. Deliver Israel, O God,
imn: weic zuqc yie zuov jienv meih. O Tin-Hungh aah! Tov meih njoux I^saa^laa^en mienh

eng: from all their troubles!
imn: biaux ndutv ninh mbuo nyei yietc zungv kouv naanc.

eng: Vindicate me, Lord , for I have led a blameless life; I have trusted in the Lord and have not faltered. Test me, Lord , and try me,
imn: Ziouv aac, tov meih siemv bun cing yie maiv zoux dorngc, weic zuqc yie kungx zoux zingx nyei sic hnangv. Yie kaux Ziouv, hnyouv yaac maiv mbungh mbienv. O Ziouv aac, tov meih zaah mangc yie yaac seix yie,

eng: examine my heart and my mind; for I have always been mindful of your unfailing love
