imn: tov kauv yie nyei hnyouv caux yie hnamv nyei sic. Weic zuqc meih ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv yie yaac dorh yie,

eng: and have lived in reliance on your faithfulness. I do not sit with the deceitful,
imn: yie yaac zanc-zanc ei jienv meih nyei zien leiz yangh. Yie yaac maiv caux nduov mienh nyei mienh juangc jauv yangh,

eng: nor do I associate with hypocrites. I abhor the assembly of evildoers
imn: yaac maiv caux beih zaqc hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh zoux doic. Yie nzorng haic gapv zunv nyei orqv mienh,

eng: and refuse to sit with the wicked. I wash my hands in innocence,
imn: yaac simv nqoi mienh waaic mienh. O Ziouv aac, yie nzaaux yie nyei buoz bun cing yie maiv zoux dorngc.

eng: and go about your altar, Lord , proclaiming aloud your praise
imn: Yie yaac yangh huing meih nyei ziec-dorngh. Yie baaux nzung dor-ziec meih,

eng: and telling of all your wonderful deeds. Lord , I love the house where you live,
imn: nzamc jienv gorngv meih zoux nyei yietc zungv mbuoqc horngh nyei sic. O Ziouv aac, yie hnamv meih yiem nyei biauv,

eng: the place where your glory dwells. Do not take away my soul along with sinners,
imn: dongh meih nyei njang-laangc yiem nyei dorngx. Tov meih maiv dungx zorqv yie caux zuiz-mienh yietc njiec guaatv mingh.

eng: my life with those who are bloodthirsty, in whose hands are wicked schemes,
imn: Yaac maiv dungx zorqv yie nyei maengc caux daix mienh nyei mienh zuqc daic. Ninh mbuo nyei buoz zanc-zanc zoux orqv sic.

eng: whose right hands are full of bribes. I lead a blameless life;
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz kungx nzuiz nyaanh hmuangx hnangv. Mv baac yie ganh kungx zoux hnyouv zingx.

eng: deliver me and be merciful to me. My feet stand on level ground;
imn: Tov meih njoux yie, korv-lienh yie. Yie nyei zaux souv jienv ndau-baengh nyei dorngx,

eng: in the great congregation I will praise the Lord .
imn: yiem zuangx mienh gapv zunv nyei dorngx yie oix ceng Ziouv.

eng: The Lord is my light and my salvation— whom shall I fear? The Lord is the stronghold of my life— of whom shall I be afraid? When the wicked advance against me
imn: Ziouv zoux yie nyei njang caux njoux yie wuov dauh, yie oix zuqc gamh nziex haaix dauh? Ziouv se yie nyei maengc kaux wuonv nyei dorngx, yie oix zuqc gamh nziex haaix dauh? Zoux orqv nyei mienh daaih hoic yie,

eng: to devour me, it is my enemies and my foes who will stumble and fall. Though an army besiege me,
imn: oix nyanc yie nyei orv nyei ziangh hoc, se yie nyei win-jaa win-wangv daaih wuov zanc, ninh mbuo oix ndiqv zuqc ndorpc. Maiv gunv maaih jun-baeng daaih weih gormx yie,

eng: my heart will not fear; though war break out against me, even then I will be confident. One thing I ask from the Lord ,
imn: yie nyei hnyouv maiv gamh nziex. Maiv gunv zuqc mborqv domh jaax, yie corc kaux Tin-Hungh. Yie tengx Ziouv tov nduqc nyungc hnangv,

eng: this only do I seek: that I may dwell in the house of the Lord all the days of my life, to gaze on the beauty of the Lord and to seek him in his temple. For in the day of trouble
imn: wuov nyungc yie oix lorz, se yie yietc liuz yietc seix oix yiem Ziouv nyei biauv, yiem wuov mangc jienv Ziouv ndongc naaic longx yaac yiem ninh nyei biauv jouh ninh. Yie zuqc kouv nyei ziangh hoc

eng: he will keep me safe in his dwelling; he will hide me in the shelter of his sacred tent and set me high upon a rock. Then my head will be exalted
imn: ninh oix beu jienv yie yiem ninh ganh nyei dorngx. Se zorqv yie bingx jienv yiem ninh nyei ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz, ninh oix zorqv yie an jienv la'bieiv-zorng gu'nguaaic. Ih zanc yie oix cau jiez m'nqorngv,

eng: above the enemies who surround me; at his sacred tent I will sacrifice with shouts of joy; I will sing and make music to the Lord . Hear my voice when I call, Lord ;
imn: yiem weih gormx yie wuov deix win-wangv gu'nguaaic. Yie oix yiem Tin-Hungh nyei ndopv-liuh gu'nyuoz, njien-youh nyei heuc jienv fongc horc ziec. Yie oix baaux nzung, oix baaux nzung ceng Ziouv. O Ziouv aah! Yie heuc nyei ziangh hoc tov muangx yie,

eng: be merciful to me and answer me. My heart says of you, “Seek his face!”
imn: tov korv-lienh yie, yaac dau yie. Meih gorngv mbuox yie, “Daaih lorz yie maah!”

eng: Your face, Lord , I will seek. Do not hide your face from me,
imn: Yie nyei hnyouv gorngv mbuox meih, “ Ziouv aac, yie za'gengh oix lorz meih.” Tov maiv dungx bingx meih nyei hmien maiv mangc yie.

eng: do not turn your servant away in anger; you have been my helper. Do not reject me or forsake me, God my Savior. Though my father and mother forsake me,
imn: Maiv dungx qiex jiez jienv zunc meih nyei bou biaux nqoi, weic zuqc meih m'daaih zoux tengx yie wuov dauh. O yie nyei Njoux Ziouv, Tin-Hungh aah! Maiv dungx leih yie, maiv dungx guangc yie. Yie nyei diex maac guangc yie,

eng: the Lord will receive me. Teach me your way, Lord ;
imn: mv baac Ziouv oix zipv yie. O Ziouv aac, tov meih njaaux yie yangh meih nyei jauv,

eng: lead me in a straight path because of my oppressors. Do not turn me over to the desire of my foes,
imn: yaac dorh yie gan jauv-baengh mingh, weic zuqc yie maaih win-wangv camv. Tov meih maiv dungx zorqv yie jiu bun win-wangv.

eng: for false witnesses rise up against me, spouting malicious accusations. I remain confident of this:
imn: Maiv dungx sueih win-wangv nyei eix zoux bun yie. Weic zuqc zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei mienh cuotv daaih, ninh mbuo gorngv cuotv nyei waac hoic yie kouv. Yie sienx dingc yie corc yiem yaangh gen nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: I will see the goodness of the Lord in the land of the living. Wait for the Lord ;
imn: yie oix duqv buatc Ziouv zoux longx. Oix zuqc zuov Ziouv,

eng: be strong and take heart and wait for the Lord .
imn: oix zuqc henv yaac zungx jienv daamv, zungv oix zuqc zuov Ziouv.

eng: To you, Lord , I call; you are my Rock, do not turn a deaf ear to me. For if you remain silent, I will be like those who go down to the pit. Hear my cry for mercy
imn: O Ziouv aah! Yie heuc jienv meih, yie nyei La'bieiv aah! Tov meih muangx yie, maiv dungx zoux hnangv m'normh ndung. Nziex meih maiv dau yie, yie ziouc hnangv njiec yiemh gen wuov deix mienh nor. Tov muangx haiz yie daux gaux heuc jienv tov meih tengx,

eng: as I call to you for help, as I lift up my hands toward your Most Holy Place. Do not drag me away with the wicked,
imn: dongh yie sung jienv buoz hungx jienv meih Gauh Cing-Nzengc Jiex nyei Singx Dinc tov nyei ziangh hoc. Tov maiv dungx zorqv yie caux mienh waaic mienh

eng: with those who do evil, who speak cordially with their neighbors but harbor malice in their hearts. Repay them for their deeds
imn: caux zoux orqv nyei mienh yietc njiec dingc zuiz. Ninh mbuo caux juangc laangz mienh gorngv baengh orn nyei waac, mv baac hnyouv gu'nyuoz ninh mbuo oix zoux doqc. Tov meih ei ninh mbuo zoux nyei jauv,

eng: and for their evil work; repay them for what their hands have done and bring back on them what they deserve. Because they have no regard for the deeds of the Lord
imn: yaac ziux ninh mbuo zoux nyei orqv sic winh bun ninh mbuo. Ziux ninh mbuo nyei buoz zoux nyei, yaac ziux ninh mbuo horpc zuqc duqv nyei, tov winh bun ninh mbuo. Weic zuqc ninh mbuo maiv maaih hnyouv taaih Ziouv zoux nyei gong,

eng: and what his hands have done, he will tear them down and never build them up again. Praise be to the Lord ,
imn: fai ninh nyei buoz zoux daaih nyei, ninh oix baaic waaic ninh mbuo, yaac maiv ceix ninh mbuo jiez aqv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv,

eng: for he has heard my cry for mercy. The Lord is my strength and my shield;
imn: weic zuqc ninh muangx haiz yie tov nyei waac. Ziouv se yie nyei qaqv caux yie nyei torngv-baaih,

eng: my heart trusts in him, and he helps me. My heart leaps for joy, and with my song I praise him. The Lord is the strength of his people,
imn: yie nyei hnyouv kaux ninh, ninh ziouc tengx yie. Yie nyei hnyouv yaac njien-youh haic, yie ziouc baaux nzung dor-ziec ninh. Ziouv se ninh nyei baeqc fingx nyei qaqv,

eng: a fortress of salvation for his anointed one. Save your people and bless your inheritance;
imn: ninh se wuonv nyei dorngx njoux ninh longc youh orn daaih zoux hungh wuov dauh. Tov njoux meih nyei baeqc fingx,

eng: be their shepherd and carry them forever.
imn: yaac ceix fuqv bun meih nzipc nyei mienh. Tov meih goux ninh mbuo hnangv goux ba'gi yungh mienh goux ninh mbuo nyei yungh nor. Tov yietc liuz dorh ninh mbuo.

eng: Ascribe to the Lord , you heavenly beings, ascribe to the Lord glory and strength. Ascribe to the Lord the glory due his name;
imn: Yiem lungh nyei zuangx fin-mienh aah! Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv nyei njang-laangc caux qaqv. Oix zuqc ceng Ziouv puix ninh njang-laangc nyei mbuox.

eng: worship the Lord in the splendor of his holiness. The voice of the Lord is over the waters;
imn: Oix zuqc zaangc Ziouv weic ninh cing-nzengc nyei mbuox njang-laangc haic. Ziouv nyei sing-qiex yiem wuov koiv gu'nguaaic.

eng: the God of glory thunders, the Lord thunders over the mighty waters. The voice of the Lord is powerful;
imn: Njang-laangc nyei Tin-Hungh nyei qiex mbui hnangv mba'ong mbui nor, Ziouv nyei sing-qiex aengv buangv koiv. Ziouv nyei sing-qiex maaih domh qaqv,

eng: the voice of the Lord is majestic. The voice of the Lord breaks the cedars;
imn: Ziouv nyei sing-qiex maaih haangh daauh hlo haic. Ziouv nyei qiex wuotv nauv si^ndaa zongh ndiangx.

eng: the Lord breaks in pieces the cedars of Lebanon. He makes Lebanon leap like a calf,
imn: Ziouv wuotv nauv Le^mbaa^norn nyei si^ndaa zongh ndiangx. Ninh bun Le^mbaa^norn Geh dongz hnangv ngongh dorn ndiuh lungh,

eng: Sirion like a young wild ox. The voice of the Lord strikes
imn: yaac bun Si^li^on Mbong dongz hnangv hieh ngongh gouv caan biu nor. Ziouv nyei sing-qiex njopc cuotv benx douz-mbietc.

eng: with flashes of lightning. The voice of the Lord shakes the desert;
imn: Ziouv nyei sing-qiex ndanc dongz deic-bung-huaang.

eng: the Lord shakes the Desert of Kadesh. The voice of the Lord twists the oaks
imn: Ziouv nqamv dongz Kaa^ndetc nyei deic-bung-huaang. Ziouv nyei qiex ndanc domh mba'ong zuei ndiangx,

eng: and strips the forests bare. And in his temple all cry, “Glory!” The Lord sits enthroned over the flood;
imn: yaac bun lomc nyei ndiangx-normh bioh nzengc. Yiem ninh nyei singx dinc nyei yietc zungv mienh yaac heuc jienv, “Njang-laangc!” Ziouv zueiz jienv weic gunv mbiungc-suiv-imx.

eng: the Lord is enthroned as King forever. The Lord gives strength to his people;
imn: Ziouv zueiz jienv weic, yietc liuz zoux hungh. Tov Ziouv ceix qaqv bun ninh nyei baeqc fingx.

eng: the Lord blesses his people with peace.
imn: Tov Ziouv ceix fuqv bun ninh nyei mienh duqv baengh orn.

eng: I will exalt you, Lord , for you lifted me out of the depths and did not let my enemies gloat over me. Lord my God, I called to you for help,
imn: Ziouv aac, yie ceng meih weic zuqc meih zorqv yie yiem ndo nyei dorngx cuotv daaih, maiv bun yie nyei win-wangv jatv yie. O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah!

eng: and you healed me. You, Lord , brought me up from the realm of the dead;
imn: Yie heuc jienv meih tengx, meih yaac zorc yie longx. O Ziouv aac, meih njoux yie yiem yiemh gen cuotv daaih,

eng: you spared me from going down to the pit. Sing the praises of the Lord , you his faithful people;
imn: bun yie duqv maengc ziangh, maiv zuqc njiec yiemh gen. O Ziouv nyei cing-nzengc baeqc fingx aah!

eng: praise his holy name. For his anger lasts only a moment,
imn: Oix zuqc baaux nzung ceng ninh. Oix zuqc dor-ziec ninh nyei cing-nzengc mbuox. Ninh nouz mienh se weic nduqc dangh hnangv,

eng: but his favor lasts a lifetime; weeping may stay for the night, but rejoicing comes in the morning. When I felt secure, I said,
imn: mv baac ninh nyei en-zingh se weic yietc seix. Maiv gunv ziangh muonz nyiemv, mv baac taux lungh ndorm njien-youh aqv. Yie ganh aeqv, yiem maanc sic bungx-zuoqc nyei ziangh hoc yie gorngv,

eng: “I will never be shaken.” Lord , when you favored me,
imn: “Yie yietc liuz maiv zuqc ging-dongz.” O Ziouv aac, meih nyei en-zingh

eng: you made my royal mountain stand firm; but when you hid your face, I was dismayed. To you, Lord , I called;
imn: liepc yie hnangv norm wuonv nyei mbong nor. Mv baac meih buang meih nyei hmien maiv mangc yie, yie ziouc gamh nziex haic. O Ziouv aah! Yie heuc jienv meih.

eng: to the Lord I cried for mercy: “What is gained if I am silenced,
imn: Yie dorng jienv Ziouv tov meih tengx. “Se gorngv yie daic

eng: if I go down to the pit? Will the dust praise you? Will it proclaim your faithfulness? Hear, Lord , and be merciful to me;
imn: aengx zuqc mingh yiem yiemh gen, maaih haaix nyungc maaih lamh longc? Nie-mbung haih ceng meih nyei fai? Haih gorngv meih ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv fai? O Ziouv aah! Tov meih muangx yie yaac korv-lienh yie.

eng: Lord , be my help.” You turned my wailing into dancing;
imn: O Ziouv aah! Tov meih tengx yie. Yie nzauh nyiemv, meih bun yie cangx heix,

eng: you removed my sackcloth and clothed me with joy, that my heart may sing your praises and not be silent.
imn: meih jaiv nqoi yie nyei la'maah ndie-cou nyei lui, goiv benx njien-youh, bun yie nyei hnyouv haih ceng meih, zungv maiv haih sekv.

eng: Lord my God, I will praise you forever.
imn: O Ziouv, yie nyei Tin-Hungh aah! Yie oix zongc zingh meih taux yietc liuz.

eng: The proverbs of Solomon son of David, king of Israel: for gaining wisdom and instruction;
imn: Naaiv se Ndaawitv nyei dorn, I^saa^laa^en nyei hungh, Saa^lo^morn, nyei cong-mengh waac. Naaiv deix cong-mengh waac se weic bun mienh hiuv duqv cong-mengh caux njaaux nyei jauv,

eng: for understanding words of insight; for receiving instruction in prudent behavior,
imn: yaac bieqc hnyouv tengx mienh mengh baeqc nyei waac. weic njaaux mienh yiem naaiv seix zaangc longc cong-mengh,

eng: doing what is right and just and fair; for giving prudence to those who are simple,
imn: zoux duqv horpc, zoux duqv baengh fim, hnyouv zingx nyei, weic bun maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh haih guai,

eng: knowledge and discretion to the young— let the wise listen and add to their learning,
imn: yaac bun mienh lunx mienh guai, maaih hnyouv haih samx duqv cuotv, weic bun cong-mengh mienh muangx yaac haih jaa hoqc hiuv camv,

eng: and let the discerning get guidance— for understanding proverbs and parables,
imn: bieqc hnyouv nyei mienh yaac haih maaih banh zeic, weic bun mienh haih mengh baeqc cong-mengh waac caux meiv jienv gorngv nyei waac,

eng: the sayings and riddles of the wise. The fear of the Lord is the beginning of knowledge,
imn: yaac bieqc hnyouv cong-mengh mienh nyei waac caux ninh mbuo nyei waac-ormv. Wuonh zaang nyei gorn se oix zuqc taaih Ziouv.

eng: but fools despise wisdom and instruction. Listen, my son, to your father’s instruction
imn: Mienh hngongx mienh mangc piex cong-mengh caux njaaux nyei waac. Yie nyei dorn aah! Oix zuqc muangx meih nyei die kuinx nyei waac,

eng: and do not forsake your mother’s teaching. They are a garland to grace your head
imn: yaac maiv dungx guangc meih nyei maa njaaux nyei jauv, weic zuqc naaiv deix i nyungc benx nzueic haic nyei ningv ndongx jienv meih nyei m'nqorngv,

eng: and a chain to adorn your neck. My son, if sinful men entice you,
imn: yaac hnangv diuh jiem-limc dangh jienv meih nyei jaang nor. Yie nyei dorn aah! Se gorngv zuiz-mienh yuoqc meih,

eng: do not give in to them. If they say, “Come along with us;
imn: maiv dungx gan ninh mbuo. Se gorngv ninh mbuo gorngv, “Daaih maah!

eng: let’s lie in wait for innocent blood, let’s ambush some harmless soul; let’s swallow them alive, like the grave,
imn: Caux yie mbuo mingh zuov jienv daix mienh, mbuo dangv jienv maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh. Mbuo oix zorqv ninh mbuo liemh nangh naqv hnangv njiec yiemh gen,

eng: and whole, like those who go down to the pit; we will get all sorts of valuable things
imn: oix zorqv ninh mbuo ziangh dauh naqv hnangv njiec ndo haic nyei kuotv wuov deix mienh. Mbuo ziouc duqv nyungc-nyungc jaaix nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: and fill our houses with plunder; cast lots with us;
imn: yaac zorqv luv daaih nyei ga'naaiv dapv buangv mbuo nyei biauv. Meih gunv caux yie mbuo maaih buonc,

eng: we will all share the loot”— my son, do not go along with them,
imn: mbuo ziouc juangc yietc norm nyaanh mbuoqc.” Yie nyei dorn aah! Maiv dungx gan ninh mbuo mingh!

eng: do not set foot on their paths; for their feet rush into evil,
imn: Maiv dungx bun meih nyei zaux caaiv ninh mbuo yangh nyei jauv, weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei zaux tiux mingh zoux orqv,

eng: they are swift to shed blood. How useless to spread a net
imn: ninh mbuo beqv jienv oix daix mienh, bun nziaamv liouc cuotv. Norqc buatc jienv mienh zaeng mungz

eng: where every bird can see it! These men lie in wait for their own blood;
imn: se maiv lamh longc. Naaiv deix mienh zuov jienv bun ganh zuqc daic,

eng: they ambush only themselves! Such are the paths of all who go after ill-gotten gain;
imn: ninh mbuo zaeng mungz zorqv ganh nyei maengc. Da'faanh longc orqv nyei jauv lorz zinh nyaanh yaac hnangv naaiv nor,

eng: it takes away the life of those who get it. Out in the open wisdom calls aloud,
imn: zungv hoic nyaanh ziouv guangc maengc. Cong-mengh se hnangv dauh m'sieqv dorn yiem jaai-horngc heuc,

eng: she raises her voice in the public square; on top of the wall she cries out,
imn: yiem domh zuangx zaamc ninh heuc qiex hlo nyei. Ninh yiem nauc nyitc nyei jaai-daauh heuc,

eng: at the city gate she makes her speech: “How long will you who are simple love your simple ways?
imn: yaac yiem bieqc zingh gaengh nyei dorngx gorngv waac. Ninh gorngv, “Meih mbuo maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh aah!

eng: How long will mockers delight in mockery and fools hate knowledge? Repent at my rebuke!
imn: Meih mbuo oix a'hneiv maiv hiuv haaix nyungc taux haaix zanc? Huotv mienh nyei mienh a'hneiv huotv ndongc haaix lauh? Mienh hngongx mienh oix nzorng wuonh zaang ndongc haaix lauh? Yie gorngv-njaaux meih mbuo, meih mbuo oix zuqc muangx,

eng: Then I will pour out my thoughts to you, I will make known to you my teachings. But since you refuse to listen when I call
imn: yie ziouc bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie hnamv nyei jauv, yaac bun meih mbuo hiuv duqv yie nyei waac. Weic zuqc yie heuc meih mbuo, meih mbuo yaac maiv kangv muangx.

eng: and no one pays attention when I stretch out my hand, since you disregard all my advice
imn: Yie sung buoz yaapv, mienh yaac maiv guen maiv sic nyei. Meih mbuo nqemh yie kuinx nyei yietc zungv waac.

eng: and do not accept my rebuke, I in turn will laugh when disaster strikes you;
imn: Yie gorngv-njaaux, meih mbuo yaac maiv kangv muangx. Meih mbuo zuqc zeqc naanc yie ziouc jatv.

eng: I will mock when calamity overtakes you— when calamity overtakes you like a storm,
imn: Meih mbuo zuqc domh heiv sic haeqv meih mbuo, yie yaac huotv meih mbuo. Meih mbuo zuqc domh heiv sic hnangv domh nziaaux,

eng: when disaster sweeps over you like a whirlwind, when distress and trouble overwhelm you. “Then they will call to me but I will not answer;
imn: meih mbuo zuqc nyei zeqc naanc hnangv nziaaux-zunc. Meih mbuo zuqc kouv, zuqc hnyouv mun nyei ziangh hoc yie yaac huotv meih mbuo. “Wuov zanc meih mbuo oix heuc yie, yie yaac maiv dau.

eng: they will look for me but will not find me, since they hated knowledge
imn: Meih mbuo oix zimh lorz yie, yaac lorz maiv buatc, weic zuqc meih mbuo nzorng wuonh zaang,

eng: and did not choose to fear the Lord . Since they would not accept my advice
imn: meih mbuo yaac maiv ginv taaih Ziouv. Yie kuinx nyei waac meih mbuo maiv muangx yietc deix,

eng: and spurned my rebuke, they will eat the fruit of their ways
imn: daaux nzuonx meih mbuo mangc piex yie gorngv-njaaux nyei yietc zungv waac. Weic naaiv meih mbuo ziouc duqv puix meih mbuo zoux nyei sic,

eng: and be filled with the fruit of their schemes. For the waywardness of the simple will kill them,
imn: yaac zuqc ziux ganh daav nyei za'eix gaux haic aqv. Maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh nqemh cong-mengh ziouc zuqc daic,

eng: and the complacency of fools will destroy them; but whoever listens to me will live in safety
imn: mienh hngongx mienh maiv guen maiv sic ziouc zuqc mietc. Mv baac haaix dauh muangx yie, wuov dauh ziouc baengh orn nyei yiem.

eng: and be at ease, without fear of harm.”
imn: Ninh duqv yiem longx, maiv gamh nziex zuqc zeqc naanc.”

eng: My son, if you accept my words and store up my commands within you, turning your ear to wisdom
imn: Yie nyei dorn aah! Se gorngv meih zipv yie nyei waac, goux longx yie hatc nyei lingc, meih baeng m'normh muangx cong-mengh nyei waac,

eng: and applying your heart to understanding— indeed, if you call out for insight
imn: yaac za'gengh oix bieqc hnyouv. Zeiz nyei, se gorngv meih heuc jienv tov oix mengh baeqc,

eng: and cry aloud for understanding, and if you look for it as for silver
imn: yaac cuotv qiex tov bun bieqc hnyouv, se gorngv meih lorz cong-mengh hnangv lorz nyaanh,

eng: and search for it as for hidden treasure, then you will understand the fear of the Lord
imn: zimh lorz cong-mengh hnangv zimh lorz bingx jienv nyei zinh zoih, hnangv naaic meih ziouc mengh baeqc taaih Ziouv,

eng: and find the knowledge of God. For the Lord gives wisdom;
imn: yaac hiuv duqv Tin-Hungh. Weic zuqc Ziouv ceix cong-mengh bun mienh,

eng: from his mouth come knowledge and understanding. He holds success in store for the upright,
imn: ninh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac maaih wuonh zaang yaac bun mienh bieqc hnyouv. Ninh siou cong-mengh weic tengx hnyouv zingx wuov deix,

eng: he is a shield to those whose walk is blameless, for he guards the course of the just
imn: ninh hnangv torngv-baaih beu jienv ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh. Ninh goux baengh fim mienh nyei jauv,

eng: and protects the way of his faithful ones. Then you will understand what is right and just
imn: yaac beu jienv gan longx ninh wuov deix nyei jauv-louc. Wuov zanc meih ziouc mengh baeqc haaix nyungc horpc nyei, baengh fim nyei,

eng: and fair—every good path. For wisdom will enter your heart,
imn: zingx nyei, se yietc zungv longx nyei jauv, weic zuqc cong-mengh oix bieqc meih nyei hnyouv,

eng: and knowledge will be pleasant to your soul. Discretion will protect you,
imn: wuonh zaang yaac bun meih nyei hnyouv kuh yiem. Guai nyei jauv oix beu jienv meih,

eng: and understanding will guard you. Wisdom will save you from the ways of wicked men,
imn: bieqc hnyouv nyei jauv yaac goux jienv meih, aengx njoux meih biaux ndutv orqv mienh nyei jauv

eng: from men whose words are perverse, who have left the straight paths
imn: caux gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh. Naaiv nyungc mienh guangc zoux horpc nyei jauv,

eng: to walk in dark ways, who delight in doing wrong
imn: gan hmuangx nyei jauv-louc yangh. Ninh mbuo a'hneiv zoux orqv sic,

eng: and rejoice in the perverseness of evil, whose paths are crooked
imn: yaac oix haic orqv mienh zoux nyei jauv. Ninh mbuo nyei jauv ngau njuotv,

eng: and who are devious in their ways. Wisdom will save you also from the adulterous woman,
imn: ninh mbuo zoux nyei jauv pien mi'aqv. Meih ziouc duqv simv nqoi hienx nqox nyei auv,

eng: from the wayward woman with her seductive words, who has left the partner of her youth
imn: se biaux ndutv nzuih mbiaangc, yuoqc mienh nyei m'sieqv dorn. Ninh guangc hnyangx-jeiv lunx nyei ziangh hoc longc daaih nyei nqox,

eng: and ignored the covenant she made before God. Surely her house leads down to death
imn: yaac la'kuqv caux ninh nyei Tin-Hungh laengz jiex nyei ngaengc waac. Se gorngv mingh ninh nyei biauv, meih ziouc gan zuqc daic nyei jauv.

eng: and her paths to the spirits of the dead. None who go to her return
imn: Mingh ninh wuov se hungx jienv yiemh gen mingh. Da'faanh mingh ninh wuov nyei mienh maiv maaih yietc dauh duqv nzuonx,

eng: or attain the paths of life. Thus you will walk in the ways of the good
imn: yaac maiv maaih yietc dauh duqv nzuonx taux ziangh maengc nyei jauv. Weic naaiv meih oix zuqc yangh mienh longx mienh nyei jauv,

eng: and keep to the paths of the righteous. For the upright will live in the land,
imn: gan longx zoux horpc nyei jauv-louc. Weic zuqc hnyouv zingx nyei mienh duqv yiem deic-bung,

eng: and the blameless will remain in it; but the wicked will be cut off from the land,
imn: maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh yaac duqv yiem wuov. Mv baac orqv mienh oix zuqc pai guangc, maiv duqv yiem deic-bung.

eng: and the unfaithful will be torn from it.
imn: Hoic mienh nyei mienh oix zuqc mietc hnangv baeng miev nyei gorn nor.

eng: My son, do not forget my teaching, but keep my commands in your heart, for they will prolong your life many years
imn: Yie nyei dorn aah! Maiv dungx la'kuqv yie njaaux nyei waac. Meih nyei hnyouv oix zuqc gan longx yie nyei leiz-latc. meih yiem seix zaangc nyei hnoi-nyieqc caux hnyangx-soux ziouc haih ziangh duqv ndaauv,

eng: and bring you peace and prosperity. Let love and faithfulness never leave you;
imn: meih yaac haih duqv longx. Maiv dungx guangc hnamv nyei, ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv.

eng: bind them around your neck, write them on the tablet of your heart. Then you will win favor and a good name
imn: Oix zuqc zorqv daaih kuangx jienv meih nyei jaang, aengx fiev jienv meih nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz. Hnangv naaic ziux Tin-Hungh caux baamh mienh mangc,

eng: in the sight of God and man. Trust in the Lord with all your heart
imn: meih zoux duqv horpc yaac maaih mengh dauh longx. Oix zuqc longc nzengc hnyouv kaux Ziouv,

eng: and lean not on your own understanding; in all your ways submit to him,
imn: maiv dungx kaux ganh haih mengh baeqc. Yiem meih zoux nyei diuh diuh jauv oix zuqc nyiemc ninh,

eng: and he will make your paths straight. Do not be wise in your own eyes;
imn: ninh ziouc dorh meih yangh horpc nyei jauv-louc. Maiv dungx hnamv ganh maaih cong-mengh,

eng: fear the Lord and shun evil. This will bring health to your body
imn: oix zuqc taaih Ziouv yaac leih nqoi orqv nyei sic. Hnangv naaic ziouc hnangv longx haic nyei ndie zorc meih wangc siangx,

eng: and nourishment to your bones. Honor the Lord with your wealth,
imn: sin yaac kuh yiem. Oix zuqc longc meih nyei zinh zoih

eng: with the firstfruits of all your crops; then your barns will be filled to overflowing,
imn: caux meih nyei yietc zungv gaeng-zuangx nyei daauh torngx biouv taaih Ziouv. Hnangv naaic meih nyei lamz ziouc buangv nzengc,

eng: and your vats will brim over with new wine. My son, do not despise the Lord ’s discipline,
imn: meih nyei diuv-ongx maaih a'ngunc diuv buangv mienz cuotv. Yie nyei dorn aah! Maiv dungx mangc piex Ziouv mborqv njaaux nyei waac,

eng: and do not resent his rebuke, because the Lord disciplines those he loves,
imn: yaac maiv dungx youx ninh gorngv-njaaux, weic zuqc Ziouv hnamv wuov dauh ninh gorngv-njaaux wuov dauh,

eng: as a father the son he delights in. Blessed are those who find wisdom,
imn: hnangv die gorngv-njaaux ninh a'hneiv nyei dorn. Duqv cong-mengh yaac duqv bieqc hnyouv nyei mienh,

eng: those who gain understanding, for she is more profitable than silver
imn: za'gengh maaih orn-lorqc, weic zuqc duqv cong-mengh nyei ndaauv-daauh se gauh longx jiex nyaanh,

eng: and yields better returns than gold. She is more precious than rubies;
imn: ninh duqv nyei leic gauh longx jiex jiem. Cong-mengh gauh jaaix jiex la'bieiv-jaaix.

eng: nothing you desire can compare with her. Long life is in her right hand;
imn: Meih oix duqv nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv, maiv maaih yietc nyungc haih beiv duqv ninh. Yiem ninh nyei mbiaauc jieqv buoz maaih siouc nyuonh ndaauv,

eng: in her left hand are riches and honor. Her ways are pleasant ways,
imn: yiem ninh nyei zaaix jieqv buoz maaih zinh zoih caux njang-laangc. Ninh nyei jauv se bun mienh maaih orn-lorqc,

eng: and all her paths are peace. She is a tree of life to those who take hold of her;
imn: ninh nyei yietc zungv jauv-louc bun mienh duqv baengh orn. Cong-mengh beiv diuh ziangh maengc nyei ndiangx.

eng: those who hold her fast will be blessed. By wisdom the Lord laid the earth’s foundations,
imn: Haaix dauh nanv jienv ninh, wuov dauh ziouc duqv mienh heuc orn-lorqc. Ziouv longc cong-mengh liepc ndau,

eng: by understanding he set the heavens in place; by his knowledge the watery depths were divided,
imn: longc ninh nyei wuonh zaang liepc lungh. Ninh nyei wuonh zaang bun ndau-ndiev nyei wuom mbeux cuotv,

eng: and the clouds let drop the dew. My son, do not let wisdom and understanding out of your sight,
imn: bun lungh maaih mbiungc-suiv ndiepv njiec. Yie nyei dorn aah! Meih oix zuqc goux jienv cong-mengh caux haih samx duqv cuotv nyei jauv.

eng: preserve sound judgment and discretion; they will be life for you,
imn: Maiv dungx bun naaiv deix i nyungc leih nqoi meih nyei m'zing-ndaangc. I nyungc ziouc bun meih ziangh duqv maengc ndaauv,

eng: an ornament to grace your neck. Then you will go on your way in safety,
imn: yaac beiv dangh jaang nzueic nyei ga'naaiv. Meih ziouc baengh orn nyei gan meih nyei jauv yangh,

eng: and your foot will not stumble. When you lie down, you will not be afraid;
imn: meih nyei zaux yaac maiv ndiqv zuqc ndorpc. Meih bueix njiec nyei ziangh hoc maiv dungx gamh nziex,

eng: when you lie down, your sleep will be sweet. Have no fear of sudden disaster
imn: meih bueix njiec, meih ziouc m'njormh duqv kuv. Liemh zeih zuqc heiv sic maiv dungx gamh nziex,

eng: or of the ruin that overtakes the wicked, for the Lord will be at your side
imn: orqv mienh zuqc baaic waaic, maiv dungx gamh nziex. Weic zuqc Ziouv zoux meih kaux nyei dorngx,

eng: and will keep your foot from being snared. Do not withhold good from those to whom it is due,
imn: ninh oix goux jienv maiv bun meih nyei zaux caaiv zuqc hlaang hlopv. Meih maaih banh zeic tengx mienh nyei ziangh hoc,

eng: when it is in your power to act. Do not say to your neighbor,
imn: maiv dungx ngaengc zoux longx nyei sic bun qiemx zuqc tengx nyei mienh. Se gorngv meih ih zanc maaih jienv gaux tengx mienh nyei,

eng: “Come back tomorrow and I’ll give it to you”— when you already have it with you. Do not plot harm against your neighbor,
imn: maiv dungx gorngv mbuox juangc laangz mienh, “Mingh aqv, aengx daaih nzunc. Njang hnoi yie m'daaih bun meih.” Maiv dungx daav za'eix hoic juangc laangz mienh,

eng: who lives trustfully near you. Do not accuse anyone for no reason—
imn: ninh yiem meih ga'hlen bungx hnyouv meih. Se gorngv mienh maiv zoux haaix nyungc bun meih

eng: when they have done you no harm. Do not envy the violent
imn: yaac maiv maaih haaix nyungc gorn-baengx, maiv dungx caux ninh nzaeng. Maiv dungx mueic jieqv mienh doqc mienh,

eng: or choose any of their ways. For the Lord detests the perverse
imn: maiv dungx ginv ninh nyei haaix diuh jauv. Ziouv youx haic buv longh buv dangv nyei mienh,

eng: but takes the upright into his confidence. The Lord ’s curse is on the house of the wicked,
imn: mv baac ninh caux hnyouv zingx nyei mienh zuoqc haic. Ziouv zioux orqv mienh nyei jaa-dingh,

eng: but he blesses the home of the righteous. He mocks proud mockers
imn: mv baac Ziouv ceix fuqv bun kuv mienh yiem nyei dorngx. Ninh huotv zoux maux huotv mienh nyei mienh,

eng: but shows favor to the humble and oppressed. The wise inherit honor,
imn: mv baac ninh ceix en bun nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei mienh. Cong-mengh mienh duqv mienh taaih,

eng: but fools get only shame.
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh zungv zuqc mienh mangc piex.

eng: Listen, my sons, to a father’s instruction; pay attention and gain understanding. I give you sound learning,
imn: Zuangx fu'jueiv aac, oix zuqc muangx die njaaux nyei waac, oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx ziouc haih mengh baeqc. Yie njaaux meih mbuo se longx haic nyei leiz,

eng: so do not forsake my teaching. For I too was a son to my father,
imn: maiv dungx guangc yie njaaux nyei waac. Yie zoux fu'jueiv-faix caux yie nyei die yiem wuov zanc,

eng: still tender, and cherished by my mother. Then he taught me, and he said to me,
imn: yie se yie nyei maa hnamv nyei ndoqc dorn. Yie nyei die njaaux yie yaac gorngv mbuox yie,

eng: “Take hold of my words with all your heart; keep my commands, and you will live. Get wisdom, get understanding;
imn: “Oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx longx die njaaux nyei waac, ei jienv yie hatc nyei waac ziouc duqv maengc ziangh. Oix zuqc duqv cong-mengh, oix zuqc mengh baeqc,

eng: do not forget my words or turn away from them. Do not forsake wisdom, and she will protect you;
imn: maiv dungx la'kuqv yaac maiv dungx leih guangc yie nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Maiv dungx guangc cong-mengh, cong-mengh ziouc haih beu jienv meih.

eng: love her, and she will watch over you. The beginning of wisdom is this: Get wisdom.
imn: Oix zuqc hnamv ninh, ninh ziouc goux jienv meih. Cong-mengh nyei gorn se hnangv naaiv. Oix zuqc duqv cong-mengh,

eng: Though it cost all you have, get understanding. Cherish her, and she will exalt you;
imn: yaac maiv gunv meih aengx duqv haaix nyungc, oix zuqc duqv haih mengh baeqc nyei jauv. Oix zuqc taaih cong-mengh weih jaaix, ninh ziouc ceng meih.

eng: embrace her, and she will honor you. She will give you a garland to grace your head
imn: Se gorngv meih qam jienv ninh, ninh ziouc taaih meih. Ninh oix zorqv norm nzueic nyei ningv bun meih ndongx,

eng: and present you with a glorious crown.” Listen, my son, accept what I say,
imn: zorqv njang-laangc nyei ningv jiu bun meih.” Yie nyei dorn aac, meih oix zuqc muangx yaac zipv yie nyei waac,

eng: and the years of your life will be many. I instruct you in the way of wisdom
imn: weic bun meih ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc ndaauv. Yie njaaux cong-mengh nyei jauv bun meih.

eng: and lead you along straight paths. When you walk, your steps will not be hampered;
imn: Yie dorh meih yangh zoux horpc nyei jauv. Meih yangh nyei ziangh hoc ziouc maiv maaih haaix nyungc torngv meih nyei zaux-mbiec.

eng: when you run, you will not stumble. Hold on to instruction, do not let it go;
imn: Se gorngv meih tiux meih yaac maiv ndorpc. Oix zuqc zanc-zanc jangx jienv meih hoqc hiuv nyei jauv, maiv dungx bungx ndortv.

eng: guard it well, for it is your life. Do not set foot on the path of the wicked
imn: Oix zuqc goux longx weic zuqc meih hoqc hiuv nyei jauv bun meih duqv maengc ziangh. Maiv dungx yangh orqv mienh yangh nyei jauv,

eng: or walk in the way of evildoers. Avoid it, do not travel on it;
imn: maiv dungx gan mienh waaic mienh nyei jauv-louc. Oix zuqc simv nqoi, maiv dungx gan naaic mingh,

eng: turn from it and go on your way. For they cannot rest until they do evil;
imn: oix zuqc wingc yangh ganh bung jiex. Weic zuqc orqv mienh maiv duqv zoux orqv sic, ninh mbuo bueix maiv njormh.

eng: they are robbed of sleep till they make someone stumble. They eat the bread of wickedness
imn: Maiv duqv hoic mienh ndiqv zuqc ndorpc, ninh mbuo bueix maiv orn. Ninh mbuo zoux orqv sic weic benx ninh mbuo nyei hnaangx-donx,

eng: and drink the wine of violence. The path of the righteous is like the morning sun,
imn: zoux doqc nyei sic benx ninh mbuo nyei a'ngunc diuv. Mv baac kuv mienh nyei jauv se hnangv lungh ndorm nziouv nyei njang,

eng: shining ever brighter till the full light of day. But the way of the wicked is like deep darkness;
imn: gunv zoux gunv njang taux lungh ziangx aanx. Orqv mienh nyei jauv mapv maengh mapv hmuangx nyei,

eng: they do not know what makes them stumble. My son, pay attention to what I say;
imn: ninh mbuo maiv hiuv duqv ninh mbuo ndiqv zuqc haaix nyungc ndorpc. Yie nyei dorn aah! Muangx longx yie nyei waac,

eng: turn your ear to my words. Do not let them out of your sight,
imn: bungx m'normh muangx yie gorngv nyei nyinh nyouz. Maiv dungx bun ninh mbuo leih nqoi meih nyei m'zing-ndaangc.

eng: keep them within your heart; for they are life to those who find them
imn: Oix zuqc bun yiem meih nyei hnyouv jangx jienv. Weic zuqc haaix dauh lorz buatc naaiv deix waac ziouc duqv maengc ziangh,

eng: and health to one’s whole body. Above all else, guard your heart,
imn: yaac bun ninh nyei sin zaangc yietc zungv wangc siangx. Oix zuqc faix fim, goux longx ganh nyei hnyouv,

eng: for everything you do flows from it. Keep your mouth free of perversity;
imn: weic zuqc ziangh maengc nyei gorn yiem hnyouv cuotv daaih. Meih oix zuqc guangc nzengc gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh nyei waac,

eng: keep corrupt talk far from your lips. Let your eyes look straight ahead;
imn: bun jaav nyei waac leih nqoi meih nyei nzuih. Oix zuqc bun meih nyei m'zing mangc zaqc wuov ndaangc.

eng: fix your gaze directly before you. Give careful thought to the paths for your feet
imn: Oix zuqc bungx m'zing mangc ziangx wuov ndaangc mingh. Oix zuqc bun meih nyei zaux yangh nyei jauv yuonh,

eng: and be steadfast in all your ways. Do not turn to the right or the left;
imn: meih mingh nyei diuh diuh jauv ziouc wuonv. Maiv dungx pien mingh zaaix fai mbiaauc,

eng: keep your foot from evil.
imn: oix zuqc bun meih nyei zaux leih nqoi orqv nyei jauv.

eng: My son, pay attention to my wisdom, turn your ear to my words of insight, that you may maintain discretion
imn: Yie nyei dorn aah! Oix zuqc longc hnyouv zipv yie cong-mengh nyei waac, baeng m'normh muangx yie bieqc hnyouv nyei waac. Hnangv naaic meih haih ei jienv guai nyei jauv,

eng: and your lips may preserve knowledge. For the lips of the adulterous woman drip honey,
imn: meih nyei nzuih meix beu jienv wuonh zaang. Weic zuqc hienx nqox nyei m'sieqv dorn nyei nzuih meix ndiepv jienv mueiz-dorngh.

eng: and her speech is smoother than oil; but in the end she is bitter as gall,
imn: Ninh nyei waac gauh mbiaangc ga'lanv youh, mv baac setv mueiz ninh ndongc yangh meuz im,

eng: sharp as a double-edged sword. Her feet go down to death;
imn: yaac laic hnangv i maengx nzuqc laic. Ninh nyei zaux njiec mingh zuqc daic,

eng: her steps lead straight to the grave. She gives no thought to the way of life;
imn: ninh nyei zaux-mbiec hungx jienv yiemh gen mingh. Ninh yaac maiv hengx lorz duqv maengc ziangh nyei jauv.

eng: her paths wander aimlessly, but she does not know it. Now then, my sons, listen to me;
imn: Ninh nyei jauv youh mingh youh daaih, ninh ganh yaac maiv hiuv. Yie nyei dorn aah! Ih zanc muangx yie maah!

eng: do not turn aside from what I say. Keep to a path far from her,
imn: Maiv dungx bungx ndortv yie nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Meih nyei jauv oix zuqc leih go naaiv dauh m'sieqv dorn,

eng: do not go near the door of her house, lest you lose your honor to others
imn: maiv dungx mingh nitv fatv ninh nyei biauv nyei gaengh. Nziex meih zorqv meih nyei njang-laangc jiu bun ganh dauh,

eng: and your dignity to one who is cruel, lest strangers feast on your wealth
imn: zorqv meih nyei hnyangx-soux bun maiv korv-lienh nyei mienh. Nziex maiv hiuv nyei mienh nyanc nzengc meih nyei qaqv,

eng: and your toil enrich the house of another. At the end of your life you will groan,
imn: meih laauh luic duqv daaih nyei yaac bieqc ganh fingx mienh nyei biauv. Taux meih nyei setv mueiz hnoi,

eng: when your flesh and body are spent. You will say, “How I hated discipline!
imn: orv caux sin yuqc nzengc, meih ziouc njunh jienv yiem. Meih ziouc gorngv, “Zinh ndaangc yie nzorng haic mborqv njaaux nyei jauv,

eng: How my heart spurned correction! I would not obey my teachers
imn: yie nyei hnyouv yaac mangc piex gorngv-njaaux nyei waac. Yie maiv muangx yie nyei fin-saeng nyei waac

eng: or turn my ear to my instructors. And I was soon in serious trouble
imn: yaac maiv bungx m'normh muangx njaaux yie wuov deix. Yie yiem gapv zunv nyei zuangx mienh mbu'ndongx

eng: in the assembly of God’s people.” Drink water from your own cistern,
imn: aav lamh zuqc baaic waaic.” Meih oix zuqc hopv ganh nyei siou wuom-kuotv nyei wuom,

eng: running water from your own well. Should your springs overflow in the streets,
imn: hopv ganh nyei wuom-zingv nyei wuom-daaih. Meih nyei wuom-zingv mienz cuotv ga'nyiec,

eng: your streams of water in the public squares? Let them be yours alone,
imn: meih nyei ndoqv liouc njiec jaai-horngc se horpc nyei fai? Kungx oix zuqc weic meih ganh nduqc dauh hnangv,

eng: never to be shared with strangers. May your fountain be blessed,
imn: maiv dungx bun ga'nyiec nyei mienh juangc jienv longc. Tov bun meih nyei wuom-zingv duqv fuqv,

eng: and may you rejoice in the wife of your youth. A loving doe, a graceful deer—
imn: yaac a'hneiv meih lunx nyei ziangh hoc duqv daaih nyei auv. Ninh se nzueic haic, ziangh duqv sung nyei m'sieqv dorn.

eng: may her breasts satisfy you always, may you ever be intoxicated with her love. Why, my son, be intoxicated with another man’s wife?
imn: Ninh nyei nyorx zanc-zanc bun meih buangv hnyouv. Ninh hnamv haic ziouc bun meih njien-youh taux daauh. Yie nyei dorn aah! Meih fungc oix zuqc bun hienx nqox nyei m'sieqv dorn wakv meih?

eng: Why embrace the bosom of a wayward woman? For your ways are in full view of the Lord ,
imn: Weic haaix diuc qam jienv buangh liouh nyei auv? Weic zuqc Ziouv nyei m'zing mangc jienv mienh nyei jauv,

eng: and he examines all your paths. The evil deeds of the wicked ensnare them;
imn: ninh zaah mangc mienh nyei yietc zungv jauv-louc. Orqv mienh zoux nyei orqv sic hlopv zuqc ninh,

eng: the cords of their sins hold them fast. For lack of discipline they will die,
imn: ninh nyei zuiz hnangv hlaang nor ndoh jienv ninh. Ninh maiv longc mienh njaaux nyei waac ziouc zuqc daic.

eng: led astray by their own great folly.
imn: Laaix ninh ba'laqc hngongx, ninh zuqc mingh dorngc jauv.

eng: My son, if you have put up security for your neighbor, if you have shaken hands in pledge for a stranger, you have been trapped by what you said,
imn: Yie nyei dorn aah! Se gorngv meih laengz waac beu meih nyei juangc laangz mienh nyei zaeqv, fai laengz zoux ndaam-daauh beu ganh dauh mienh nyei zaeqv, se gorngv meih gorngv nyei waac hlopv zuqc meih,

eng: ensnared by the words of your mouth. So do this, my son, to free yourself,
imn: meih nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac ndoh jienv meih, yie nyei dorn aah! Meih oix zuqc hnangv naaiv nor zoux njoux meih ganh,

eng: since you have fallen into your neighbor’s hands: Go—to the point of exhaustion— and give your neighbor no rest! Allow no sleep to your eyes,
imn: weic zuqc meih zuqc yiem meih nyei juangc laangz mienh nyei buoz-ndiev mi'aqv. Mingh aqv, mingh lorz meih nyei juangc laangz mienh aengx nyiemc ganh zoux faix qaqv tov. Maiv dungx bun meih nyei m'zing njipv jienv m'njormh,

eng: no slumber to your eyelids. Free yourself, like a gazelle from the hand of the hunter,
imn: maiv dungx bun m'zing-ndopv nyuix. Oix zuqc njoux ndutv ganh hnangv njaih leih ndutv zaeng hlaang mienh nyei buoz,

eng: like a bird from the snare of the fowler. Go to the ant, you sluggard;
imn: yaac hnangv norqc biaux ndutv zaeng koux mienh nyei buoz-ndiev. Mienh lueic mienh aah! Meih oix zuqc mingh zaah mangc nziouv,

eng: consider its ways and be wise! It has no commander,
imn: hnamv taux nziouv zoux nyei jauv ziouc duqv cong-mengh. Nziouv maiv maaih bieiv zeiv,

eng: no overseer or ruler, yet it stores its provisions in summer
imn: maiv maaih jien, maiv maaih haaix dauh gunv, mv baac nqaai gorng ninh liuc leiz nyanc hopv,

eng: and gathers its food at harvest. How long will you lie there, you sluggard?
imn: gaatv gaeng-zuangx nyei ziangh hoc yaac siou nyanc nyei ga'naaiv. Mienh lueic mienh aah! Meih oix bueix taux haaix zanc?

eng: When will you get up from your sleep? A little sleep, a little slumber,
imn: Meih oix m'njormh taux haaix zanc cingx jiez sin daaih? Aengx bueix dangh, m'njormh dangh,

eng: a little folding of the hands to rest— and poverty will come on you like a thief
imn: qopv jienv buoz m'njormh da'hngatv dangh, jomc nyei jauv ziouc hnangv janx-zaqc liemh zeih taux.

eng: and scarcity like an armed man. A troublemaker and a villain,
imn: Dangx-donx nyei jauv daaih hnangv mienh dorh jienv wuoqc ginc daaih taux. Maiv lamh longc nyei orqv mienh

eng: who goes about with a corrupt mouth, who winks maliciously with his eye,
imn: jiex naaiv jiex wuov gorngv-baeqc. Ninh nyapc m'zing,

eng: signals with his feet and motions with his fingers, who plots evil with deceit in his heart—
imn: fengx zaux, buoz yaac nuqv jienv, hnyouv pien daav orqv nyei za'eix,

eng: he always stirs up conflict. Therefore disaster will overtake him in an instant;
imn: zanc-zanc coqv-huv. Weic naaiv ninh oix liemh zeih zuqc zeqc naanc,

eng: he will suddenly be destroyed—without remedy. There are six things the Lord hates,
imn: nduqc dangh hnangv zuqc baaic waaic nzengc, maiv haih zorc. Ziouv nzorng nyei maaih juqv nyungc,

eng: seven that are detestable to him: haughty eyes,
imn: ninh gamh nziev nyei, youx nyei maaih siec nyungc. Maaih m'zing-jaax hlang,

eng: a lying tongue, hands that shed innocent blood, a heart that devises wicked schemes,
imn: gorngv-baeqc nyei nzuih, buoz daix maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh, hnyouv daav orqv nyei za'eix,

eng: feet that are quick to rush into evil, a false witness who pours out lies
imn: zaux tiux siepv nyei mingh lorz orqv nyei sic, zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei mienh tauv qiex kungx cuotv gorngv-baeqc nyei waac,

eng: and a person who stirs up conflict in the community. My son, keep your father’s command
imn: caux mienh yiem ninh nyei gorx-youz mbu'ndongx coqv lunc mienh. Yie nyei dorn aah! Oix zuqc gan longx meih nyei die hatc nyei waac,

eng: and do not forsake your mother’s teaching. Bind them always on your heart;
imn: yaac maiv dungx guangc meih nyei maa njaaux nyei jauv-louc. Oix zuqc zanc-zanc zaangh jienv meih nyei hnyouv,

eng: fasten them around your neck. When you walk, they will guide you;
imn: yaac kuangx jienv meih nyei jaang. Meih yangh jauv, ninh mbuo ziouc dorh meih,

eng: when you sleep, they will watch over you; when you awake, they will speak to you. For this command is a lamp,
imn: meih bueix nyei ziangh hoc, ninh mbuo oix beu jienv meih. Meih nyie daaih, ninh mbuo yaac caux meih gorngv. Weic zuqc naaiv deix hatc nyei waac zoux norm dang,

eng: this teaching is a light, and correction and instruction are the way to life, keeping you from your neighbor’s wife,
imn: njaaux nyei waac zoux njang. Gorngv-njaaux, mborqv njaaux se benx jauv bun mienh duqv maengc ziangh, weic beu jienv meih, tengx meih simv nqoi orqv nyei m'sieqv dorn,

eng: from the smooth talk of a wayward woman. Do not lust in your heart after her beauty
imn: leih nqoi buangh liouh nyei auv gorngv yuoqc mienh nyei nzuih mbiaangc. Maiv dungx yiem hnyouv hanc ninh nzueic nyei jauv,

eng: or let her captivate you with her eyes. For a prostitute can be had for a loaf of bread,
imn: yaac maiv dungx bun ninh nyei m'zing baeng zuqc meih. Weic zuqc mienh haih longc yietc norm njuov nyei jaax-zinh cingv maaic sin nyei m'sieqv dorn,

eng: but another man’s wife preys on your very life. Can a man scoop fire into his lap
imn: mv baac hienx nqox nyei auv zungv zorqv mienh jaaix mienh nyei maengc. Mienh haih qam jienv douz

eng: without his clothes being burned? Can a man walk on hot coals
imn: yaac maiv bun ninh nyei lui zuqc douz buov duqv nyei fai? Mienh haih yangh zieqc jienv douz nyei douz-taanx gu'nguaaic mingh,

eng: without his feet being scorched? So is he who sleeps with another man’s wife;
imn: yaac maiv zuqc douz buov zaux fai? Haaix dauh mingh caux ganh dauh mienh nyei auv yaac fih hnangv nyei.

eng: no one who touches her will go unpunished. People do not despise a thief if he steals
imn: Maiv maaih haaix dauh hluo liuz ninh yaac maiv zuqc dingc zuiz. Se gorngv mienh hnyouv sie ziouc nimc ga'naaiv tengx ninh beuv,

eng: to satisfy his hunger when he is starving. Yet if he is caught, he must pay sevenfold,
imn: mienh mangc piex ninh maiv zeiz? Se gorngv ninh zuqc zorqv ninh oix zuqc buih siec gouv,

eng: though it costs him all the wealth of his house. But a man who commits adultery has no sense;
imn: zungv bun nzengc ninh nyei biauv zong maaih nyei ga'naaiv. Mv baac mienh hienx auv ninh hnamv duqv hngongx haic.

eng: whoever does so destroys himself. Blows and disgrace are his lot,
imn: Haaix dauh hnangv naaiv zoux zungv bun ninh ganh zuqc mietc. Ninh zuqc mun, zuqc nyaiv,

eng: and his shame will never be wiped away. For jealousy arouses a husband’s fury,
imn: ninh zuqc baaic hmien, yietc liuz maiv haih sortv guangc. Weic zuqc m'jangc dorn hanc, ninh m'daaih qiex jiez,

eng: and he will show no mercy when he takes revenge. He will not accept any compensation;
imn: taux jaauv win nyei ziangh hoc ninh maiv nyaangc zingh aqv. Ninh maiv longc haaix nyungc buih bun ninh.

eng: he will refuse a bribe, however great it is.
imn: Bun zingh nyeic ndongc haaix camv ninh hnyouv maiv nqaai.

eng: My son, keep my words and store up my commands within you. Keep my commands and you will live;
imn: Yie nyei dorn aac, meih oix zuqc ei jienv yie nyei waac, oix zuqc zorqv yie hatc nyei waac siou jienv meih nyei hnyouv. Oix zuqc ei jienv yie hatc nyei waac ziouc duqv maengc ziangh,

eng: guard my teachings as the apple of your eye. Bind them on your fingers;
imn: goux longx yie njaaux nyei waac hnangv goux longx ganh nyei m'zing nor, zorqv daaih ndoh jienv meih nyei buoz-ndoqv,

eng: write them on the tablet of your heart. Say to wisdom, “You are my sister,”
imn: aengx fiev jienv meih nyei hnyouv gu'nyuoz. Oix zuqc gorngv mbuox cong-mengh, “Meih zoux yie nyei dorc,”

eng: and to insight, “You are my relative.” They will keep you from the adulterous woman,
imn: yaac heuc mengh baeqc nyei jauv zoux meih nyei loz-gaeng doic. Naaiv deix i nyungc ziouc tengx meih simv ndutv hienx nqox nyei auv,

eng: from the wayward woman with her seductive words. At the window of my house
imn: yaac biaux ndutv nzuih mbiaangc, buangh liouh nyei m'sieqv dorn. Yie yiem yie nyei biauv nyei fong muonh,

eng: I looked down through the lattice. I saw among the simple,
imn: mangc cuotv laan jienv nyei piaeng nyei kuotv. Yie buatc yiem maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei zuangx mienh gu'nyuoz,

eng: I noticed among the young men, a youth who had no sense. He was going down the street near her corner,
imn: yiem mienh lunx mienh mbu'ndongx, maaih dauh mienh lunx mienh hnamv duqv hngongx haic. Ninh gan jauv mingh taux bieqc wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn nyei biauv nyei jauv-caax,

eng: walking along in the direction of her house at twilight, as the day was fading,
imn: aengx yangh wuov diuh jauv mingh wuov dauh nyei biauv doix lungh maanz-hmuangx, nziemx-yaangh,

eng: as the dark of night set in. Then out came a woman to meet him,
imn: taux lungh muonz zanc hmuangx nyei ziangh hoc. Mangc maah! Maaih dauh m'sieqv dorn daaih buangh ninh,

eng: dressed like a prostitute and with crafty intent. (She is unruly and defiant,
imn: ninh zorng sin hnangv maaic sin nyei m'sieqv dorn yaac maaih guv guaix nyei hnyouv. Ninh liaa haic, maiv hiuv duqv nyaiv,

eng: her feet never stay at home; now in the street, now in the squares,
imn: ninh nyei zaux kungx oix mingh, maiv yiem dingc biauv. Aav dangh yiem jaai-horngc, aav dangh yiem domh zuangx zaamc,

eng: at every corner she lurks.) She took hold of him and kissed him
imn: yiem norm-norm jauv-caax ninh bingx jienv zuov. Ninh zorqv jienv wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh zom ninh,

eng: and with a brazen face she said: “Today I fulfilled my vows,
imn: caux ninh gorngv yaac maiv hiuv duqv nyaiv. Ninh gorngv, “Yie fongc horc ziec weic jiu tong nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: and I have food from my fellowship offering at home. So I came out to meet you;
imn: ih hnoi yie yaac jaauv sung yie laengz jiex nyei ngaengc waac, yie ziouc cuotv daaih lorz meih,

eng: I looked for you and have found you! I have covered my bed
imn: qaqv lorz meih, ziouc lorz buatc aqv. Yie longc yiem I^yipv daaih nyei ziex setv la'maah ndie-muonc,

eng: with colored linens from Egypt. I have perfumed my bed
imn: dimc ziangx yie nyei coux. Yie longc mu^yorc , aa^lo ndie-ndaang ,

eng: with myrrh, aloes and cinnamon. Come, let’s drink deeply of love till morning;
imn: caux jieh louh ndopv bun yie nyei coux ndaang. Daaih maah! Yie mbuo ziangh muonz hnamv taux beuv, yaac hnamv taux lungh ndorm.

eng: let’s enjoy ourselves with love! My husband is not at home;
imn: Yie mbuo haih njien-youh nyei laanh hnamv laanh, weic zuqc yie nyei nqox maiv yiem biauv.

eng: he has gone on a long journey. He took his purse filled with money
imn: Ninh cuotv jauv mingh go. Ninh dorh yietc mbuoqc nyaanh mingh.

eng: and will not be home till full moon.” With persuasive words she led him astray;
imn: Taux hlaax-junh ninh cingx nzuonx.” Naaiv dauh hienx nqox nyei auv longc waac-gaam yuoqc ninh,

eng: she seduced him with her smooth talk. All at once he followed her
imn: longc nzuih mbiaangc baeng ninh mingh. Wuov dauh mienh lunx mienh liemh zeih gan jienv ninh mingh aqv,

eng: like an ox going to the slaughter, like a deer stepping into a noose till an arrow pierces his liver,
imn: hnangv ngongh gouv mingh zuqc daix daic, hnangv njaih zuqc hlaang hlopv jienv zietc nyei, zuov taux forng-cang buonv bieqc ninh nyei hlan,

eng: like a bird darting into a snare, little knowing it will cost him his life. Now then, my sons, listen to me;
imn: fai hnangv norm norqc siepv-siepv nyei ndaix bieqc mungz gu'nyuoz. Ninh liemh maiv hiuv duqv ganh oix zuqc hoic maengc. Dorn aah! Ih zanc oix zuqc muangx yie maah!

eng: pay attention to what I say. Do not let your heart turn to her ways
imn: Oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx yie nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac. Maiv dungx bun meih nyei hnyouv huin mingh wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn nyei jauv,

eng: or stray into her paths. Many are the victims she has brought down;
imn: maiv dungx bieqc ninh nduov nyei jauv-louc. Zuqc wuov dauh m'sieqv dorn hoic nyei mienh maiv zeiz zoqc,

eng: her slain are a mighty throng. Her house is a highway to the grave,
imn: zuqc ninh daix daic nyei mienh za'gengh camv! haic. Ninh nyei biauv yiem mingh yiemh gen nyei jauv,

eng: leading down to the chambers of death.
imn: se dorh mienh njiec zuqc daic nyei mienh yiem nyei dorngx.

eng: Does not wisdom call out? Does not understanding raise her voice? At the highest point along the way,
imn: Cong-mengh heuc jienv maiv zeiz? Mengh baeqc nyei jauv heuc qiex hlo nyei maiv zeiz? Ninh yiem jauv-hlen hlang nyei dorngx,

eng: where the paths meet, she takes her stand; beside the gate leading into the city,
imn: souv jienv jaapv-maaz jauv. Ninh yiem bieqc zingh nyei laatc gaengh ga'hlen,

eng: at the entrance, she cries aloud: “To you, O people, I call out;
imn: yiem bieqc gaengh nyei dorngx heuc mbui nyei gorngv, “Zuangx mienh aah! Yie heuc meih mbuo.

eng: I raise my voice to all mankind. You who are simple, gain prudence;
imn: Yie hungx jienv yietc zungv baamh mienh heuc. Maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh aah!

eng: you who are foolish, set your hearts on it. Listen, for I have trustworthy things to say;
imn: Meih mbuo oix zuqc hoqc guai. Mienh hngongx mienh aah! Meih mbuo nyei hnyouv oix zuqc mengh baeqc. Muangx maah! Yie oix gorngv longx haic nyei waac.

eng: I open my lips to speak what is right. My mouth speaks what is true,
imn: Haaix nyungc horpc nyei oix yiem yie nyei nzuih cuotv, weic zuqc yie nyei nzuih oix gorngv zien leiz,

eng: for my lips detest wickedness. All the words of my mouth are just;
imn: yie nyei nzuih meix gamh nziev haic orqv nyei jauv. Yie nyei nzuih gorngv nyei yietc zungv waac horpc nyei,

eng: none of them is crooked or perverse. To the discerning all of them are right;
imn: maiv maaih yietc deix ngau fai njuotv. Weic haih bieqc hnyouv nyei mienh, naaiv deix yietc zungv waac se zaqc nyei.

eng: they are upright to those who have found knowledge. Choose my instruction instead of silver,
imn: Weic duqv wuonh zaang nyei mienh, naaiv deix waac se horpc nyei. Ginv longc yie njaaux nyei waac maiv zeiz nyaanh,

eng: knowledge rather than choice gold, for wisdom is more precious than rubies,
imn: ginv wuonh zaang maiv zeiz zien jiem, weic zuqc cong-mengh se gauh longx jiex la'bieiv-jaaix,

eng: and nothing you desire can compare with her. “I, wisdom, dwell together with prudence;
imn: dongh meih oix nyei yietc zungv ga'naaiv maiv haih beiv duqv cong-mengh. “Yie se cong-mengh. Yie bun mienh haih hnamv duqv tong,

eng: I possess knowledge and discretion. To fear the Lord is to hate evil;
imn: maaih wuonh zaang yaac guai. Taaih Ziouv nyei jauv se nzorng orqv nyei sic.

eng: I hate pride and arrogance, evil behavior and perverse speech. Counsel and sound judgment are mine;
imn: Yie nzorng ceng-hlo, zoux maux nyei sic, zoux orqv nyei jauv caux gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh nyei waac. Yie haih tengx daav za'eix, maaih cong-mengh longx.

eng: I have insight, I have power. By me kings reign
imn: Yie haih mengh baeqc yaac maaih qaqv. Hungh diex bangc yie gunv.

eng: and rulers issue decrees that are just; by me princes govern,
imn: Zoux hlo nyei mienh bangc yie liepc baengh fim nyei leiz. Mouz dauh bieiv zeiv caux zoux hlo nyei mienh

eng: and nobles—all who rule on earth. I love those who love me,
imn: bangc yie gunv lungh ndiev. Hnamv yie wuov deix, yie yaac hnamv ninh mbuo,

eng: and those who seek me find me. With me are riches and honor,
imn: jienh lorz yie wuov deix yaac lorz duqv buatc. Zinh zoih caux njang-laangc yiem yie,

eng: enduring wealth and prosperity. My fruit is better than fine gold;
imn: yaac maaih yiem duqv wuonv nyei fuqv-loqc caux gong-fim. Meih yiem yie duqv daaih nyei se gauh longx jiex jiem,

eng: what I yield surpasses choice silver. I walk in the way of righteousness,
imn: zungv gauh longx jiex zien haic nyei jiem, yie cuotv nyei yaac gauh longx jiex zien nyaanh. Yie yangh zoux horpc nyei jauv,

eng: along the paths of justice, bestowing a rich inheritance on those who love me
imn: gan baengh fim nyei jauv-louc. Yie bun hnamv yie wuov deix nzipc zinh zoih

eng: and making their treasuries full. “The Lord brought me forth as the first of his works,
imn: bun ninh siou jaaix nyei ga'naaiv nyei dorngx buangv nzengc. “ Ziouv jiez gorn zoux ninh nyei gong wuov zanc, ninh zeix yie ndaangc jiex,

eng: before his deeds of old; I was formed long ages ago,
imn: se ninh loz-hnoi zoux daaih nyei daauh nyungc gong. Yiem loz-hnoi dongh cor wuov,

eng: at the very beginning, when the world came to be. When there were no watery depths, I was given birth,
imn: maiv gaengh maaih baamh gen wuov zanc ninh liepc yie jiez daaih. Maiv gaengh maaih koiv,

eng: when there were no springs overflowing with water; before the mountains were settled in place,
imn: maiv gaengh maaih wuom camv nyei wuom-zingv yie cuotv seix daaih aqv. Domh mbong maiv gaengh duqv yiem dingc,

eng: before the hills, I was given birth, before he made the world or its fields
imn: fiuv-mbong yaac maiv gaengh maaih, yie zungv cuotv seix. Yie cuotv seix ndaangc Tin-Hungh zeix ndau caux lingh deic.

eng: or any of the dust of the earth. I was there when he set the heavens in place,
imn: Lungh ndiev diqv dien nyei nie-mbung yaac maiv gaengh maaih. Ninh liepc lungh

eng: when he marked out the horizon on the face of the deep, when he established the clouds above
imn: yaac guetv huing gormx koiv-minc nyei lungh gorn wuov zanc, yie yiem naaic. Ninh bun lungh gu'nguaaic yiem duqv wuonv,

eng: and fixed securely the fountains of the deep, when he gave the sea its boundary
imn: yaac liepc ndau-ndiev nyei wuom-zingv wuov zanc, ninh dingc koiv nyei gapv-jaaix

eng: so the waters would not overstep his command, and when he marked out the foundations of the earth. Then I was constantly at his side.
imn: weic bun wuom maiv jiex ndaangc ninh hatc nyei waac, ninh yaac liepc dingc ndau nyei gorn-ndoqv, wuov zanc yie yiem ninh nyei ga'hlen hnangv dauh zaangc mienh.

eng: I was filled with delight day after day, rejoicing always in his presence, rejoicing in his whole world
imn: Ninh hnoi-hnoi weic yie a'hneiv, yie yaac zanc-zanc yiem ninh nyei nza'hmien njien-youh haic. Yie a'hneiv ninh nyei baamh gen,

eng: and delighting in mankind. “Now then, my children, listen to me;
imn: yaac a'hneiv haic baamh mienh. “Yie nyei dorn aac, ih zanc muangx yie maah!

eng: blessed are those who keep my ways. Listen to my instruction and be wise;
imn: Ei jienv yie nyei jauv zoux wuov deix maaih orn-lorqc. Oix zuqc muangx yie njaaux nyei waac ziouc duqv cong-mengh,

eng: do not disregard it. Blessed are those who listen to me,
imn: maiv dungx bungx lorx. Muangx yie nyei waac wuov dauh maaih orn-lorqc,

eng: watching daily at my doors, waiting at my doorway. For those who find me find life
imn: ninh hnoi-hnoi yiem yie nyei gaengh ndaangc mangc, yiem yie nyei gaengh ga'hlen zuov. Haaix dauh lorz buatc yie ziouc duqv maengc ziangh.

eng: and receive favor from the Lord . But those who fail to find me harm themselves;
imn: Ziouv yaac horpc hnyouv ninh. Mv baac haaix dauh lorz maiv buatc yie, ziouc hoic zuqc ganh.

eng: all who hate me love death.”
imn: Nzorng yie wuov deix yietc zungv a'hneiv zuqc daic nyei jauv.”

eng: Wisdom has built her house; she has set up its seven pillars. She has prepared her meat and mixed her wine;
imn: Cong-mengh gomv ninh nyei biauv mi'aqv. Ninh liepc ninh nyei siec norm ndiouh. Ninh daix ninh nyei saeng-kuv yaac peux ninh nyei a'ngunc diuv,

eng: she has also set her table. She has sent out her servants, and she calls
imn: aengx mbenc ninh nyei dieh. Ninh paaiv ninh nyei m'sieqv bou cuotv mingh,

eng: from the highest point of the city, “Let all who are simple come to my house!”
imn: yaac yiem zingh gu'nyuoz hlang jiex nyei dorngx heuc gorngv, “Maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh aah! Bieqc yie naaiv daaih maah!”

eng: To those who have no sense she says, “Come, eat my food
imn: Ninh aengx gorngv mbuox mienh hngongx mienh, “Daaih maah! Daaih nyanc yie nyei hnaangx,

eng: and drink the wine I have mixed. Leave your simple ways and you will live;
imn: hopv yie peux nyei a'ngunc diuv. Oix zuqc guangc nqoi meih mbuo maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei jauv,

eng: walk in the way of insight.” Whoever corrects a mocker invites insults;
imn: meih mbuo ziouc duqv ziangh jienv, gan mengh baeqc nyei jauv yangh. “Haaix dauh gorngv-hemx zoux maux, huotv mienh nyei mienh,

eng: whoever rebukes the wicked incurs abuse. Do not rebuke mockers or they will hate you;
imn: ninh ganh oix zuqc mienh mangc piex. Haaix dauh kuinx orqv mienh, ninh ganh oix zuqc mun aqv. Maiv dungx kuinx zoux maux, huotv mienh nyei mienh,

eng: rebuke the wise and they will love you. Instruct the wise and they will be wiser still;
imn: ninh ziouc nzorng meih. Mv baac kuinx cong-mengh mienh nor, ninh ziouc hnamv meih. Njaaux cong-mengh mienh

eng: teach the righteous and they will add to their learning. The fear of the Lord is the beginning of wisdom,
imn: ninh ziouc jaa maaih cong-mengh, njaaux zoux horpc nyei mienh ninh ziouc duqv hoqc hiuv camv jienv faaux. “Cong-mengh nyei gorn se

eng: and knowledge of the Holy One is understanding. For through wisdom your days will be many,
imn: oix zuqc taaih Ziouv. Mienh zieqv duqv Cing-Nzengc Wuov Dauh ziouc haih jaa mengh baeqc. Se gorngv meih kaux yie, meih nyei hnoi-nyieqc ziouc jaa camv,

eng: and years will be added to your life. If you are wise, your wisdom will reward you;
imn: meih nyei hnyangx-soux aengx jaa tipv duqv siouc nyuonh ndaauv. Se gorngv meih maaih cong-mengh, se weic meih ganh maaih lamh longc.

eng: if you are a mocker, you alone will suffer. Folly is an unruly woman;
imn: Se gorngv meih huotv mienh, meih ganh oix zuqc ndaam-dorng.” Hngongx nyei jauv beiv dauh qiex mbui, liaa haic,

eng: she is simple and knows nothing. She sits at the door of her house,
imn: maiv hiuv duqv nyaiv nyei m'sieqv dorn. Ninh zueiz jienv ninh nyei biauv nyei gaengh ndaangc,

eng: on a seat at the highest point of the city, calling out to those who pass by,
imn: zueiz jienv zingh gu'nyuoz hlang nyei dorngx, heuc jienv jiex jauv nyei mienh,

eng: who go straight on their way, “Let all who are simple come to my house!”
imn: dongh baeng zaqc gan ninh mbuo ganh nyei jauv nyei mienh gorngv, “Maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh aah!

eng: To those who have no sense she says, “Stolen water is sweet;
imn: Gunv bieqc yie naaiv daaih maah!” Ninh aengx gorngv mbuox mienh hngongx mienh, “Nimc daaih nyei wuom se gaam nyei,

eng: food eaten in secret is delicious!” But little do they know that the dead are there,
imn: bingx jienv nyanc nyei njuov maaih mueix doc.” Mv baac mienh maiv hiuv duqv zuqc daic nyei mienh yiem naaic.

eng: that her guests are deep in the realm of the dead.
imn: Ninh nyei kaeqv mienh yiem yiemh gen ndo nyei dorngx.

eng: The proverbs of Solomon: A wise son brings joy to his father, but a foolish son brings grief to his mother. Ill-gotten treasures have no lasting value,
imn: Naaiv se Saa^lo^morn nyei cong-mengh waac. Cong-mengh nyei dorn bun die duqv njien-youh, mv baac hngongx nyei dorn hoic maa nzauh. Zoux maiv zingx duqv daaih nyei zinh zoih maiv lamh longc,

eng: but righteousness delivers from death. The Lord does not let the righteous go hungry,
imn: mv baac zoux duqv horpc nyei sic haih njoux mienh maiv zuqc daic. Ziouv maiv bun kuv mienh ngorc,

eng: but he thwarts the craving of the wicked. Lazy hands make for poverty,
imn: mv baac ninh dangv jienv maiv bun orqv mienh duqv ninh mbuo cei nyei. Buoz lueic bun mienh zuqc jomc,

eng: but diligent hands bring wealth. He who gathers crops in summer is a prudent son,
imn: mv baac buoz jienh bun mienh butv zoih. Guai nyei dorn taux nqaai gorng siou cun-gaeng,

eng: but he who sleeps during harvest is a disgraceful son. Blessings crown the head of the righteous,
imn: mv baac gaatv nyei ziangh hoc bueix m'njormh nyei dorn se zuqc nyaiv nyei dorn. Kuv mienh duqv fuqv-loqc,

eng: but violence overwhelms the mouth of the wicked. The name of the righteous is used in blessings,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei nzuih bingx jienv oix zoux doqc nyei sic. Jangx kuv mienh haiz hnangv duqv fuqv,

eng: but the name of the wicked will rot. The wise in heart accept commands,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei mbuox mienh la'kuqv, hnangv benx ga'naaiv-huv nor. Hnyouv cong-mengh nyei mienh oix ei jienv leiz-latc,

eng: but a chattering fool comes to ruin. Whoever walks in integrity walks securely,
imn: mv baac la'guaih gorngv hngongx nyei jauv wuov deix, oix zuqc baaic. Yangh ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv wuov deix duqv baengh orn nyei yangh,

eng: but whoever takes crooked paths will be found out. Whoever winks maliciously causes grief,
imn: gan ngau njuotv nyei jauv wuov deix ziouc biux mengh cuotv daaih aqv. Mienh nyapc m'zing zoux cuotv sic,

eng: and a chattering fool comes to ruin. The mouth of the righteous is a fountain of life,
imn: mv baac bungx laangc nyei kuinx mienh wuov deix, liepc baengh orn. Kuv mienh nyei nzuih benx ziangh maengc nyei wuom-zingv,

eng: but the mouth of the wicked conceals violence. Hatred stirs up conflict,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei nzuih bingx oix zoux doqc nyei sic. Nzorng nyei jauv coqv cuotv nzaeng jaax nyei sic,

eng: but love covers over all wrongs. Wisdom is found on the lips of the discerning,
imn: mv baac se gorngv hnamv mienh ziouc guangc yietc zungv zoux dorngc nyei sic. Mengh baeqc nyei mienh nyei nzuih maaih wuonh zaang,

eng: but a rod is for the back of one who has no sense. The wise store up knowledge,
imn: mv baac maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh puix duqv biaav mborqv diqc daanz. Cong-mengh mienh siou jienv wuonh zaang,

eng: but the mouth of a fool invites ruin. The wealth of the rich is their fortified city,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh gorngv nyei waac bun baaic waaic nyei sic taux fatv. Butv-zoih mienh nyei zinh zoih benx ninh wuonv nyei zingh.

eng: but poverty is the ruin of the poor. The wages of the righteous is life,
imn: Mv baac mienh jomc mienh jomc nyei jauv bun ninh mbuo zuqc baaic waaic. Kuv mienh nyei fin-kouv dorh mienh duqv maengc ziangh,

eng: but the earnings of the wicked are sin and death. Whoever heeds discipline shows the way to life,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh duqv nyei buonc se dorh mienh baamz zuiz. Ei jienv njaaux nyei waac wuov deix yiem ziangh maengc nyei jauv.

eng: but whoever ignores correction leads others astray. Whoever conceals hatred with lying lips
imn: Mv baac haaix dauh ngaengc jienv gorngv-njaaux nyei waac ziouc mingh dorngc jauv aqv. Haaix dauh bingx jienv nzorng nyei sic maaih gorngv-baeqc nyei nzuih.

eng: and spreads slander is a fool. Sin is not ended by multiplying words,
imn: Haaix dauh cuotv nzuih gorngv waac-huv benx mienh hngongx mienh. Gorngv camv waac camv, simv maiv ndutv baamz zuiz nyei jauv,

eng: but the prudent hold their tongues. The tongue of the righteous is choice silver,
imn: mv baac mienh guai mienh nyienz duqv ganh nyei nzuih. Kuv mienh nyei waac hnangv zien nyaanh,

eng: but the heart of the wicked is of little value. The lips of the righteous nourish many,
imn: orqv mienh nyei hnyouv hnamv nyei jauv maiv zic zinh. Kuv mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac yungz mienh camv,

eng: but fools die for lack of sense. The blessing of the Lord brings wealth,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh zuqc daic laaix maiv hiuv haaix nyungc. Se Ziouv ceix fuqv bun mienh butv zoih,

eng: without painful toil for it. A fool finds pleasure in wicked schemes,
imn: ninh yaac maiv jaa you-nzauh. Mienh hngongx mienh zoux dorngc ninh mbuo haiz oix nyei,

eng: but a person of understanding delights in wisdom. What the wicked dread will overtake them;
imn: mv baac mengh baeqc nyei mienh a'hneiv cong-mengh nyei jauv. Orqv mienh gamh nziex nyei zungv oix zunc zaaic ninh,

eng: what the righteous desire will be granted. When the storm has swept by, the wicked are gone,
imn: mv baac kuv mienh oix duqv nyei zungv duqv aqv. Nziaaux-jieqv jiex mingh, ziouc maiv maaih orqv mienh aqv,

eng: but the righteous stand firm forever. As vinegar to the teeth and smoke to the eyes,
imn: mv baac kuv mienh duqv liepc wuonv taux yietc liuz. Paaiv mienh lueic mienh mingh zoux haaix nyungc,

eng: so are sluggards to those who send them. The fear of the Lord adds length to life,
imn: weic paaiv ninh wuov deix ninh se hnangv wuom-sui bun nyaah njienz, yaac hnangv douz-sioux bieqc m'zing. Mienh taaih Ziouv bun ziangh nyei hnoi-nyieqc jaa ndaauv,

eng: but the years of the wicked are cut short. The prospect of the righteous is joy,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei hnyangx-soux nangv njiec. Kuv mienh maaih lamh hnamv nyei setv mueiz se njien-youh,

eng: but the hopes of the wicked come to nothing. The way of the Lord is a refuge for the blameless,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh hnamv oix duqv nyei, setv mueiz maiv duqv haaix nyungc aqv. Ziouv zoux hnyouv zingx nyei mienh kaux wuonv nyei dorngx,

eng: but it is the ruin of those who do evil. The righteous will never be uprooted,
imn: mv baac bun zoux orqv sic nyei mienh zuqc mietc. Kuv mienh yietc liuz maiv zuqc tuix cuotv,

eng: but the wicked will not remain in the land. From the mouth of the righteous comes the fruit of wisdom,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh zungv maiv duqv yiem deic-bung. Kuv mienh nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv cong-mengh nyei waac,

eng: but a perverse tongue will be silenced. The lips of the righteous know what finds favor,
imn: mv baac buv longh buv dangv mienh nyei mbietc zungv oix gaatv guangc. Kuv mienh nyei nzuih gorngv waac longx,

eng: but the mouth of the wicked only what is perverse.
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei nzuih kungx gorngv gorngv-baeqc nyei waac hnangv.

eng: The Lord detests dishonest scales, but accurate weights find favor with him. When pride comes, then comes disgrace,
imn: Ziouv nzorng haic waengc mienh nyei nziangx, mv baac baengh fim nyei nziangx-dorh bun ninh a'hneiv. Mienh zoux maux

eng: but with humility comes wisdom. The integrity of the upright guides them,
imn: ziouc maaih nyaiv nyei sic gan jienv daaih, mv baac nyiemc ganh zoux faix nyei mienh maaih cong-mengh. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh

eng: but the unfaithful are destroyed by their duplicity. Wealth is worthless in the day of wrath,
imn: maaih ziepc zuoqv nyei jauv dorh ninh mbuo, mv baac hnyouv ngau hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh zoux maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei sic bun ganh zuqc mietc. Zuqc Tin-Hungh nouz nyei hnoi,

eng: but righteousness delivers from death. The righteousness of the blameless makes their paths straight,
imn: zinh zoih tengx maiv duqv haaix nyungc, mv baac zoux duqv horpc nyei sic haih njoux mienh biaux ndutv maiv zuqc daic. Maiv maaih dorngx nqemh nyei mienh zoux hnyouv zingx,

eng: but the wicked are brought down by their own wickedness. The righteousness of the upright delivers them,
imn: ziouc dorh ninh yangh zaqc nyei jauv, mv baac orqv mienh laaix ninh zoux nyei orqv sic bun ninh ndorpc. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh zoux duqv horpc

eng: but the unfaithful are trapped by evil desires. Hopes placed in mortals die with them;
imn: ziouc njoux duqv ninh, hnyouv maiv zingx nyei mienh hanc nyei sic hlopv jienv ninh. Orqv mienh daic mingh,

eng: all the promise of their power comes to nothing. The righteous person is rescued from trouble,
imn: ninh maaih lamh hnamv nyei caux jienv zuqc mietc, mienh waaic mienh hnamv oix duqv nyei yaac baaic nzengc mi'aqv. Kuv mienh duqv njoux biaux ndutv kuonx naanh,

eng: and it falls on the wicked instead. With their mouths the godless destroy their neighbors,
imn: daaux nzuonx orqv mienh buangh zuqc kouv naanc. Maiv kaux Tin-Hungh nyei mienh longc nzuih gorngv nyei waac

eng: but through knowledge the righteous escape. When the righteous prosper, the city rejoices;
imn: baaic waaic ninh nyei juangc laangz mienh, mv baac kuv mienh nyei wuonh zaang haih njoux duqv ninh. Kuv mienh duqv longx,

eng: when the wicked perish, there are shouts of joy. Through the blessing of the upright a city is exalted,
imn: zingh nyei mienh njien-youh, orqv mienh zuqc mietc zuangx mienh njien-youh nyei heuc. Weic kuv mienh duqv fuqv,

eng: but by the mouth of the wicked it is destroyed. Whoever derides their neighbor has no sense,
imn: zingh ziouc duqv mienh taaih, mv baac laaix orqv mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac, zingh zuqc mbienv nzengc. Haaix dauh mangc piex juangc laangz mienh

eng: but the one who has understanding holds their tongue. A gossip betrays a confidence,
imn: se hnamv maiv tong haaix nyungc nyei mienh. Mv baac bieqc hnyouv nyei mienh sekv nzieqc nyei. Jiex naaiv jiex wuov gorngv henh waac nyei mienh

eng: but a trustworthy person keeps a secret. For lack of guidance a nation falls,
imn: gorngv cuotv gem jienv nyei jauv, mv baac bungx duqv hnyouv nyei mienh gem jienv maiv horpc zuqc gorngv nyei sic. Maiv maaih mienh dorh,

eng: but victory is won through many advisers. Whoever puts up security for a stranger will surely suffer,
imn: baeqc fingx ziouc zuqc baaic njiec, mv baac maaih caangh laangh nyei mienh camv, ziouc duqv baengh orn nyei yiem. Haaix dauh beu ganh dauh mienh

eng: but whoever refuses to shake hands in pledge is safe. A kindhearted woman gains honor,
imn: zungv oix zuqc kouv aqv. Mv baac haaix dauh nzorng beu mienh nyei jauv ziouc yiem duqv wuonv. Hnyouv longx, nzueic nyei m'sieqv dorn duqv mienh taaih,

eng: but ruthless men gain only wealth. Those who are kind benefit themselves,
imn: zoux doqc nyei m'jangc dorn kungx duqv butv zoih. Korv-lienh mienh nyei mienh

eng: but the cruel bring ruin on themselves. A wicked person earns deceptive wages,
imn: tengx ganh duqv longx, mv baac zoux doqc nyei mienh hoic zuqc ganh. Orqv mienh nyei gong-zinh

eng: but the one who sows righteousness reaps a sure reward. Truly the righteous attain life,
imn: setv mueiz se maiv duqv haaix nyungc, mv baac mienh zoux horpc nyei jauv, ndongc haaix zungv duqv zingh nyeic. Haaix dauh liepc hnyouv zoux kuv sic ziouc duqv maengc ziangh,

eng: but whoever pursues evil finds death. The Lord detests those whose hearts are perverse,
imn: haaix dauh lorz orqv nyei sic ziouc zuqc daic. Hnyouv buv longh buv dangv nyei mienh,

eng: but he delights in those whose ways are blameless. Be sure of this: The wicked will not go unpunished,
imn: Ziouv youx haic, mv baac zoux duqv horpc nyei mienh bun ninh a'hneiv. Oix zuqc hiuv dingc,

eng: but those who are righteous will go free. Like a gold ring in a pig’s snout
imn: orqv mienh maiv haih biaux maiv ndutv zuqc dingc zuiz, mv baac kuv mienh zungv oix duqv njoux. M'sieqv dorn nzueic mv baac zieqv maiv duqv haaix nyungc horpc

eng: is a beautiful woman who shows no discretion. The desire of the righteous ends only in good,
imn: se hnangv norm jiem-kuing cunx jienv dungz nyei mba'zorng. Kuv mienh oix nyei, setv mueiz duqv longx,

eng: but the hope of the wicked only in wrath. One person gives freely, yet gains even more;
imn: orqv mienh maaih lamh hnamv nyei, setv mueiz zuqc Tin-Hungh nouz. Maaih laanh mienh zoux hnyouv jangv

eng: another withholds unduly, but comes to poverty. A generous person will prosper;
imn: yaac gunv zoux gunv butv zoih. Maaih laanh zoux hnyouv hepc, horpc zuqc bun nyei ninh maiv bun, mv baac gunv zoux gunv jomc. Hnyouv jangv nyei mienh

eng: whoever refreshes others will be refreshed. People curse the one who hoards grain,
imn: oix duqv bungx-zuoqc. Haaix dauh bun wuom mienh hopv, mienh ziouc bun wuom ninh hopv. Haaix dauh ngaengc jienv maiv maaic laangh ziqc,

eng: but they pray God’s blessing on the one who is willing to sell. Whoever seeks good finds favor,
imn: ninh zuqc mienh zioux. Haaix dauh laengz maaic ziouc duqv mienh buang waac. Haaix dauh jienh lorz zoux longx nyei jauv

eng: but evil comes to one who searches for it. Those who trust in their riches will fall,
imn: ziouc duqv mienh taaih, mv baac haaix dauh lorz orqv nyei sic wuov dauh ziouc zuqc orqv sic. Haaix dauh kaux ninh ganh nyei zinh zoih

eng: but the righteous will thrive like a green leaf. Whoever brings ruin on their family will inherit only wind,
imn: zungv zuqc ndorpc, mv baac kuv mienh oix wangc siangx hnangv ndiangx-normh nyiemz. Haaix dauh zoux bun ganh nyei hmuangv doic zuqc kouv,

eng: and the fool will be servant to the wise. The fruit of the righteous is a tree of life,
imn: setv mueiz maiv duqv haaix nyungc, mienh hngongx mienh yaac oix zuqc zoux cong-mengh mienh nyei bou. Kuv mienh zoux nyei sic se bun mienh maaih maengc ziangh,

eng: and the one who is wise saves lives. If the righteous receive their due on earth,
imn: mv baac mienh baamz leiz-latc ziouc hoic mienh guangc maengc. Se gorngv kuv mienh yiem baamh gen

eng: how much more the ungodly and the sinner!
imn: ziux zoux nyei winh bun ninh, orqv mienh caux zuiz-mienh ziux zoux nyei zuqc winh bun ndongc haaix camv!

eng: Whoever loves discipline loves knowledge, but whoever hates correction is stupid. Good people obtain favor from the Lord ,
imn: Haaix dauh a'hneiv muangx gorngv-njaaux nyei waac, wuov dauh hnamv wuonh zaang, mv baac haaix dauh nzorng gorngv-hemx nyei waac se hngongx nyei. Kuv mienh bun Ziouv a'hneiv,

eng: but he condemns those who devise wicked schemes. No one can be established through wickedness,
imn: mv baac daav orqv za'eix nyei mienh, Ziouv oix dingc zuiz. Zoux orqv sic maiv tengx mienh liepc duqv wuonv,

eng: but the righteous cannot be uprooted. A wife of noble character is her husband’s crown,
imn: mv baac kuv mienh liepc duqv wuonv hnangv njiec nzungh ndo nor. Ziangh horngh nyei auv se hnangv nqox nyei ningv,

eng: but a disgraceful wife is like decay in his bones. The plans of the righteous are just,
imn: mv baac maiv hiuv duqv nyaiv nyei auv, se hnangv zoux bun ninh nyei nqox nyei mbungv latv. Kuv mienh hnamv cuotv nyei jauv se baengh fim nyei,

eng: but the advice of the wicked is deceitful. The words of the wicked lie in wait for blood,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh caangh laangh nyei waac se guv guaix nyei sic. Orqv mienh nyei waac zuov jienv daix mienh,

eng: but the speech of the upright rescues them. The wicked are overthrown and are no more,
imn: mv baac hnyouv zingx mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac njoux duqv mienh. Orqv mienh zuqc mietc ziouc baac mi'aqv,

eng: but the house of the righteous stands firm. A person is praised according to their prudence,
imn: mv baac kuv mienh nyei zeiv-fun yiem duqv wuonv. Mienh ziux ninh nyei cong-mengh duqv mienh ceng,

eng: and one with a warped mind is despised. Better to be a nobody and yet have a servant
imn: mv baac hnyouv ngau hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh zuqc mienh mangc piex. Benx pou-tong mienh weic ganh zoux gong yungz maengc,
