eng: than pretend to be somebody and have no food. The righteous care for the needs of their animals,
imn: se gauh longx ceng ganh hlo mv baac maiv maaih hnaangx nyanc. Kuv mienh korv-lienh ninh mbuo nyei saeng-kuv nyei maengc,

eng: but the kindest acts of the wicked are cruel. Those who work their land will have abundant food,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh korv-lienh nyei jauv se doqc nyei. Haaix dauh laih ganh nyei lingh deic duqv laangh ziqc nyanc beuv,

eng: but those who chase fantasies have no sense. The wicked desire the stronghold of evildoers,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh gan maiv lamh longc nyei jauv hnamv maiv tong haaix nyungc. Orqv mienh oix longc mienh waaic mienh caangv daaih nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: but the root of the righteous endures. Evildoers are trapped by their sinful talk,
imn: mv baac kuv mienh nyei gorn yiem duqv wuonv. Orqv mienh nyei nzuih gorngv dorngc nyei waac zoux koux hlopv zuqc ninh ganh,

eng: and so the innocent escape trouble. From the fruit of their lips people are filled with good things,
imn: mv baac kuv mienh biaux ndutv zuqc kouv nyei jauv. Mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac bun ganh duqv longx buangv hnyouv,

eng: and the work of their hands brings them reward. The way of fools seems right to them,
imn: mienh nyei buoz zoux nyei gong yaac winh bun ganh. Mienh hngongx mienh zoux nyei sic ziux ganh nyei m'zing mangc zoux duqv horpc,

eng: but the wise listen to advice. Fools show their annoyance at once,
imn: mv baac cong-mengh mienh a'hneiv muangx mienh njaaux. Mienh hngongx mienh yietv qiex jiez liemh zeih zieqv duqv aqv,

eng: but the prudent overlook an insult. An honest witness tells the truth,
imn: mv baac guai nyei mienh zuqc mienh gorngv doqc corc hnangv maiv haiz nor. Haaix dauh gorngv ziepc zuoqv nyei waac kungx gorngv duqv zingx nyei hnangv,

eng: but a false witness tells lies. The words of the reckless pierce like swords,
imn: mv baac zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei mienh gorngv gorngv-baeqc nduov nyei waac. Mienh nzuih siepv gorngv waac hnangv nzuqc ndaauv baqv mienh,

eng: but the tongue of the wise brings healing. Truthful lips endure forever,
imn: mv baac cong-mengh mienh nyei waac haih hnangv ndie zorc mienh. Mienh gorngv zien nyei waac, waac yietc liuz yiem,

eng: but a lying tongue lasts only a moment. Deceit is in the hearts of those who plot evil,
imn: mv baac mienh gorngv gorngv-baeqc nyei waac se yiem nduqc dangh hnangv. Daav orqv za'eix nyei mienh maaih gorngv-baeqc nduov mienh nyei hnyouv,

eng: but those who promote peace have joy. No harm overtakes the righteous,
imn: mv baac daav longx nyei za'eix wuov deix duqv njien-youh. Kuv mienh maiv zuqc haaix nyungc zeqc naanc hoic,

eng: but the wicked have their fill of trouble. The Lord detests lying lips,
imn: orqv mienh zungv zuqc zeqc naanc camv aqv. Mienh nyei nzuih gorngv-baeqc, Ziouv gamh nziev haic,

eng: but he delights in people who are trustworthy. The prudent keep their knowledge to themselves,
imn: mv baac ziepc zuoqv nyei zoux wuov deix, ninh a'hneiv haic. Mienh guai mienh gem jienv ninh maaih nyei wuonh zaang,

eng: but a fool’s heart blurts out folly. Diligent hands will rule,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh zunh cuotv hngongx nyei sic. Mienh jienh mienh nyei buoz duqv gunv,

eng: but laziness ends in forced labor. Anxiety weighs down the heart,
imn: mv baac mienh lueic mienh zuqc aapv zoux gong. Mienh hnyouv nzauh faanh haiz hnangv ga'naaiv ngatv jienv hniev nyei,

eng: but a kind word cheers it up. The righteous choose their friends carefully,
imn: mv baac yietc joux longx nyei waac bun ninh haiz hnyouv longx. Kuv mienh dorh ninh nyei juangc laangz mienh,

eng: but the way of the wicked leads them astray. The lazy do not roast any game,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei jauv bun mienh mingh dorngc. Mienh lueic mienh maiv mingh buonv orv,

eng: but the diligent feed on the riches of the hunt. In the way of righteousness there is life;
imn: mienh jienh mienh duqv jaaix nyei zinh zoih. Yiem zoux horpc nyei jauv bun mienh maaih maengc ziangh,

eng: along that path is immortality.
imn: mv baac orqv nyei jauv bun mienh mingh zuqc daic.

eng: A wise son heeds his father’s instruction, but a mocker does not respond to rebukes. From the fruit of their lips people enjoy good things,
imn: Cong-mengh nyei dorn muangx ninh nyei die njaaux nyei waac, mv baac huotv mienh nyei mienh maiv muangx mienh gorngv-hemx ninh. Weic mienh longx mienh gorngv nyei waac ninh duqv longx nyei jauv,

eng: but the unfaithful have an appetite for violence. Those who guard their lips preserve their lives,
imn: mv baac oix hoic mienh nyei mienh kungx maaih hnyouv oix zoux doqc. Haaix dauh goux ninh nyei nzuih duqv goux ganh nyei maengc,

eng: but those who speak rashly will come to ruin. A sluggard’s appetite is never filled,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh la'guaih gorngv, maiv hnamv ndaangc, zungv oix zuqc baaic aqv. Mienh lueic mienh cei yaac maiv duqv haaix nyungc,

eng: but the desires of the diligent are fully satisfied. The righteous hate what is false,
imn: mv baac mienh jienh mienh ziux ninh oix nyei duqv daaih buangv hnyouv. Kuv mienh nzorng haic gorngv-baeqc nyei waac,

eng: but the wicked make themselves a stench and bring shame on themselves. Righteousness guards the person of integrity,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh zoux duqv nyaiv, gamh nziev haic. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh maaih zoux horpc nyei jauv beu jienv,

eng: but wickedness overthrows the sinner. One person pretends to be rich, yet has nothing;
imn: mv baac zuiz bun orqv mienh zuqc baaic. Maaih dauh zoux hnangv butv-zoih mv baac maiv maaih haaix nyungc,

eng: another pretends to be poor, yet has great wealth. A person’s riches may ransom their life,
imn: maaih dauh zoux hnangv jomc, mv baac maaih zinh zoih camv. Mienh nyei zinh zoih haih zuoqc ninh nyei maengc,

eng: but the poor cannot respond to threatening rebukes. The light of the righteous shines brightly,
imn: mv baac mienh jomc mienh maiv haiz mienh gorngv haeqv nyei waac. Kuv mienh hnangv njang haic nyei njang,

eng: but the lamp of the wicked is snuffed out. Where there is strife, there is pride,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh hnangv oix zuqc biomv daic nyei dang. Zoux maux nyei jauv kungx zoux cuotv nzaeng jaax nyei sic,

eng: but wisdom is found in those who take advice. Dishonest money dwindles away,
imn: mv baac muangx kuinx nyei waac wuov deix maaih cong-mengh. Hungh hec duqv nyaanh siepv ziouc zitc jienv njiec,

eng: but whoever gathers money little by little makes it grow. Hope deferred makes the heart sick,
imn: mv baac yietc nzunc siou deix, yietc nzunc siou deix, ziouc maaih camv jienv faaux. Maaih lamh hnamv oix duqv nyei, yaac maiv gaengh duqv, ziouc bun mienh hnyouv nzauh kouv,

eng: but a longing fulfilled is a tree of life. Whoever scorns instruction will pay for it,
imn: mv baac duqv daaih ziux hnyouv hnamv oix duqv nyei, se hnangv diuh ziangh maengc nyei ndiangx. Haaix dauh mangc piex njaaux nyei waac ziouc hoic ninh ganh zuqc mietc,

eng: but whoever respects a command is rewarded. The teaching of the wise is a fountain of life,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh taaih leiz-latc, wuov dauh ziouc duqv zingh nyeic. Cong-mengh mienh njaaux nyei waac se ziangh maengc nyei wuom-zingv,

eng: turning a person from the snares of death. Good judgment wins favor,
imn: bun mienh simv nqoi zuqc daic nyei koux. Mienh hnamv duqv tong, hnamv duqv longx, ziouc duqv mienh taaih,

eng: but the way of the unfaithful leads to their destruction. All who are prudent act with knowledge,
imn: mv baac maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh nyei jauv se mingh zuqc baaic. Mienh guai mienh longc ninh nyei wuonh zaang zoux nyungc-nyungc,

eng: but fools expose their folly. A wicked messenger falls into trouble,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh ceng ninh ganh hngongx nyei jauv. Waaic nyei douc fienx mienh hoic mienh zuqc kouv,

eng: but a trustworthy envoy brings healing. Whoever disregards discipline comes to poverty and shame,
imn: mv baac ziepc zuoqv nyei gong-zoh hnangv ndie zorc mienh longx. Maiv longc mienh njaaux nyei waac wuov dauh zuqc benx mienh jomc mienh yaac zuqc nyaiv,

eng: but whoever heeds correction is honored. A longing fulfilled is sweet to the soul,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh muangx mienh gorngv-njaaux nyei waac duqv mienh taaih. Za'gengh duqv daaih ziux hnamv oix duqv nyei, haiz za'gengh! longx haic,

eng: but fools detest turning from evil. Walk with the wise and become wise,
imn: mv baac weic mienh hngongx mienh, simv nqoi orqv sic se youx haic nyei sic. Haaix dauh caux cong-mengh mienh juangc jauv yangh ziouc benx cong-mengh mienh,

eng: for a companion of fools suffers harm. Trouble pursues the sinner,
imn: mv baac caux mienh hngongx mienh zoux doic zungv oix zuqc kouv aqv. Zeqc naanc zunc jienv zuiz-mienh mingh

eng: but the righteous are rewarded with good things. A good person leaves an inheritance for their children’s children,
imn: mv baac kuv mienh duqv longx weic zoux ninh mbuo nyei zingh nyeic. Mienh longx mienh liouh nzipc nyei buonc bun ninh nyei zeiv-fun,

eng: but a sinner’s wealth is stored up for the righteous. An unplowed field produces food for the poor,
imn: mv baac zuiz-mienh nyei zinh zoih siou daaih bun kuv mienh. Mienh jomc mienh nyei ndeic duqv gaeng-zuangx camv,

eng: but injustice sweeps it away. Whoever spares the rod hates their children,
imn: mv baac laaix maiv baengh fim nyei jauv zuqc guaatv mingh mi'aqv. Haaix dauh nyienz jienv maiv longc biaav mborqv njaaux, wuov dauh maiv hnamv ninh nyei dorn,

eng: but the one who loves their children is careful to discipline them. The righteous eat to their hearts’ content,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh hnamv dorn se jienh mborqv njaaux. Kuv mienh duqv nyanc beuv,

eng: but the stomach of the wicked goes hungry.
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei ga'sie ngorc jienv yiem.

eng: The wise woman builds her house, but with her own hands the foolish one tears hers down. Whoever fears the Lord walks uprightly,
imn: Cong-mengh nyei m'sieqv dorn ceix jiez ninh nyei jaa-dingh, mv baac hngongx nyei m'sieqv dorn longc ninh ganh nyei buoz caeqv njiec. Hnyouv zingx nyei mienh taaih Ziouv,

eng: but those who despise him are devious in their ways. A fool’s mouth lashes out with pride,
imn: mv baac zoux hnyouv maiv zingx nyei mienh mangc piex ninh. Mienh hngongx mienh bungx nyei waac-maux se hnangv biaav mborqv ganh nyei diqc daanz,

eng: but the lips of the wise protect them. Where there are no oxen, the manger is empty,
imn: mv baac cong-mengh mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac beu jienv ganh. Haaix norm dorngx maiv maaih ngongh, wuov norm dorngx maiv maaih laangh ziqc,

eng: but from the strength of an ox come abundant harvests. An honest witness does not deceive,
imn: mv baac duqv laangh ziqc camv se bangc ngongh nyei qaqv. Ziepc zuoqv nyei zorng-zengx mienh maiv gorngv-baeqc,

eng: but a false witness pours out lies. The mocker seeks wisdom and finds none,
imn: mv baac jaav zorng-zengx mienh tauv qiex cuotv gorngv-baeqc nyei waac hnangv. Huotv nyei mienh lorz cong-mengh yaac lorz maiv duqv,

eng: but knowledge comes easily to the discerning. Stay away from a fool,
imn: mv baac weic bieqc hnyouv nyei mienh hec duqv lorz wuonh zaang. Oix zuqc simv nqoi mienh hngongx mienh nyei nza'hmien,

eng: for you will not find knowledge on their lips. The wisdom of the prudent is to give thought to their ways,
imn: weic zuqc yiem wuov meih maiv haiz ninh nyei nzuih maaih wuonh zaang nyei waac. Mienh guai mienh nyei cong-mengh se ninh haih mengh baeqc ninh nyei jauv-louc,

eng: but the folly of fools is deception. Fools mock at making amends for sin,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh hngongx nyei jauv se nduov ganh hnangv. Tin-Hungh huotv orqv mienh,

eng: but goodwill is found among the upright. Each heart knows its own bitterness,
imn: mv baac hnyouv zingx nyei mienh a'hneiv duqv ninh horpc hnyouv ninh mbuo. Ganh hiuv duqv ganh nyei hnyouv kouv.

eng: and no one else can share its joy. The house of the wicked will be destroyed,
imn: Hnyouv njien-youh yaac maiv maaih ganh dauh haih caux jienv njien-youh. Orqv mienh nyei biauv oix zuqc mietc,

eng: but the tent of the upright will flourish. There is a way that appears to be right,
imn: mv baac hnyouv zingx mienh yiem nyei dorngx zungv liepc longx jienv faaux. Maaih diuh jauv mienh buatc hnangv horpc nyei,

eng: but in the end it leads to death. Even in laughter the heart may ache,
imn: mv baac setv mueiz benx zuqc daic nyei jauv. Maiv gunv mienh jatv, hnyouv gu'nyuoz haih nzauh nyei.

eng: and rejoicing may end in grief. The faithless will be fully repaid for their ways,
imn: Mienh maaih orn-lorqc mv baac nqa'haav haih nzauh kouv. Hnyouv ngaengc doz nyei mienh ziux ninh zoux nyei zungv zuqc winh bun ninh.

eng: and the good rewarded for theirs. The simple believe anything,
imn: Mienh longx mienh ziux ninh zoux nyei duqv longx. Maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh sienx nyungc-nyungc,

eng: but the prudent give thought to their steps. The wise fear the Lord and shun evil,
imn: mv baac mienh guai mienh mangc longx ninh mingh nyei jauv. Cong-mengh mienh mbungh jienv yaac simv nqoi orqv nyei sic,

eng: but a fool is hotheaded and yet feels secure. A quick-tempered person does foolish things,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh maiv gunv ganh, oix zoux haaix nyungc ziouc zoux aqv. Hungh hec qiex jiez siepv nyei mienh zoux sic hngongx,

eng: and the one who devises evil schemes is hated. The simple inherit folly,
imn: daav guv guaix za'eix nyei mienh zuqc mienh nzorng. Maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh duqv hngongx nyei jauv benx ninh mbuo nyei buonc,

eng: but the prudent are crowned with knowledge. Evildoers will bow down in the presence of the good,
imn: mv baac mienh guai mienh duqv wuonh zaang zoux ningv . Mienh waaic mienh gueic njiec mienh longx mienh nyei nza'hmien,

eng: and the wicked at the gates of the righteous. The poor are shunned even by their neighbors,
imn: orqv mienh gueic njiec kuv mienh nyei gaengh ndaangc. Mienh jomc mienh, liemh juangc laangz mienh yaac youx ninh,

eng: but the rich have many friends. It is a sin to despise one’s neighbor,
imn: mv baac butv-zoih mienh maaih gorx-youz doic camv. Haaix dauh mangc piex juangc laangz mienh, wuov dauh benx zuiz-mienh,

eng: but blessed is the one who is kind to the needy. Do not those who plot evil go astray?
imn: mv baac korv-lienh mienh jomc mienh wuov dauh, maaih orn-lorqc. Daav orqv za'eix nyei mienh mingh dorngc jauv maiv zeiz?

eng: But those who plan what is good find love and faithfulness. All hard work brings a profit,
imn: Daav longx nyei za'eix wuov deix, duqv mienh ziepc zuoqv nyei gan longx. Mienh laauh luic zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc maaih lamh longc,

eng: but mere talk leads only to poverty. The wealth of the wise is their crown,
imn: mv baac nzuih kungx gorngv waac hnangv bun mienh oix zuqc jomc aqv. Cong-mengh mienh duqv nyei ningv se ninh mbuo nyei zinh zoih.

eng: but the folly of fools yields folly. A truthful witness saves lives,
imn: Mienh hngongx mienh hngongx nyei jauv m'daaih cuotv hngongx nyei sic. Zoux zien zorng-zengx nyei mienh njoux mienh nyei maengc,

eng: but a false witness is deceitful. Whoever fears the Lord has a secure fortress,
imn: mv baac gorngv gorngv-baeqc nyei waac wuov dauh hoic mienh. Haaix dauh taaih Ziouv, maaih wuonv nyei dorngx kaux,

eng: and for their children it will be a refuge. The fear of the Lord is a fountain of life,
imn: ninh nyei naamh nyouz ziouc maaih ndaauh kaux nyei dorngx. Mienh taaih Ziouv se ziangh maengc nyei wuom-zingv,

eng: turning a person from the snares of death. A large population is a king’s glory,
imn: weic bun mienh simv nqoi zuqc daic nyei koux. Baeqc fingx camv, hungh diex ziouc maaih njang-laangc,

eng: but without subjects a prince is ruined. Whoever is patient has great understanding,
imn: maiv maaih baeqc fingx, hungh dorn ziouc zuqc baaic mi'aqv. Maiv qiex jiez siepv nyei mienh bieqc hnyouv camv,

eng: but one who is quick-tempered displays folly. A heart at peace gives life to the body,
imn: mv baac qiex jiez siepv nyei mienh taaih hngongx nyei jauv. Hnyouv baengh orn bun sin kuh yiem,

eng: but envy rots the bones. Whoever oppresses the poor shows contempt for their Maker,
imn: mv baac mueic jieqv hanc bun mbungv latv. Haaix dauh zeix mienh jomc mienh se mangc piex Zeix Ninh Daaih Wuov Dauh,

eng: but whoever is kind to the needy honors God. When calamity comes, the wicked are brought down,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh korv-lienh mienh jomc mienh, wuov dauh taaih Tin-Hungh. Orqv mienh zuqc ninh zoux nyei orqv sic bun ninh zuqc baaic,

eng: but even in death the righteous seek refuge in God. Wisdom reposes in the heart of the discerning
imn: mv baac kuv mienh daic corc maaih lamh kaux dorngx. Cong-mengh yiem haih hnamv duqv tong nyei mienh nyei hnyouv,

eng: and even among fools she lets herself be known. Righteousness exalts a nation,
imn: mv baac yiem mienh hngongx mienh nyei hnyouv maiv buatc maaih aqv. Zoux horpc nyei jauv bun guoqv zaangc henv,

eng: but sin condemns any people. A king delights in a wise servant,
imn: mv baac haaix fingx zoux zuiz, wuov fingx ziouc zuqc nyaiv aqv. Cong-mengh nyei bou bun hungh diex a'hneiv,

eng: but a shameful servant arouses his fury.
imn: mv baac zoux duqv nyaiv nyei bou zuqc ninh nouz.

eng: A gentle answer turns away wrath, but a harsh word stirs up anger. The tongue of the wise adorns knowledge,
imn: Longc suonc nyei waac dau bun qiex jiez nyei jauv fiu, mv baac longc ciouv nyei waac cuoqv mienh qiex jiez. Cong-mengh mienh nyei nzuih gorngv cuotv longx nyei wuonh zaang,

eng: but the mouth of the fool gushes folly. The eyes of the Lord are everywhere,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh gorngv cuotv hngongx nyei waac. Ziouv nyei m'zing mangc jienv norm-norm dorngx,

eng: keeping watch on the wicked and the good. The soothing tongue is a tree of life,
imn: zuov mangc jienv orqv mienh caux kuv mienh. Nzuih gorngv suonc nyei waac bun mienh maaih maengc ziangh,

eng: but a perverse tongue crushes the spirit. A fool spurns a parent’s discipline,
imn: mv baac gorngv buv longh buv dangv nyei waac bun mienh nyei mba'nziu mbaaix. Mienh hngongx mienh mangc piex die njaaux nyei waac,

eng: but whoever heeds correction shows prudence. The house of the righteous contains great treasure,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh muangx gorngv-hemx nyei waac se guai nyei. Kuv mienh nyei biauv maaih zinh zoih camv,

eng: but the income of the wicked brings ruin. The lips of the wise spread knowledge,
imn: orqv mienh duqv daaih nyei leic bun ninh zuqc kouv. Cong-mengh mienh nyei nzuih zunh cuotv wuonh zaang nyei waac,

eng: but the hearts of fools are not upright. The Lord detests the sacrifice of the wicked,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh nyei hnyouv zungv maiv hnangv naaic. Ziouv gamh nziev haic orqv mienh fongc horc ziec nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: but the prayer of the upright pleases him. The Lord detests the way of the wicked,
imn: mv baac hnyouv zingx mienh daux gaux nyei waac bun ninh a'hneiv. Ziouv gamh nziev haic orqv mienh nyei jauv-louc,

eng: but he loves those who pursue righteousness. Stern discipline awaits anyone who leaves the path;
imn: mv baac ninh hnamv gan zoux horpc nyei jauv wuov deix. Haaix dauh guangc longx nyei jauv ziouc zuqc dingc zuiz hniev.

eng: the one who hates correction will die. Death and Destruction lie open before the Lord —
imn: Haaix dauh nzorng gorngv-njaaux nyei waac ziouc zuqc daic aqv. Yiemh gen caux zuqc mietc nyei mienh yiem nyei dorngx, Ziouv nyei m'zing mangc duqv buatc nyei,

eng: how much more do human hearts! Mockers resent correction,
imn: baamh mienh nyei hnyouv ninh gauh mangc duqv buatc ndongc haaix camv. Huotv mienh nyei mienh maiv oix mienh gorngv-hemx,

eng: so they avoid the wise. A happy heart makes the face cheerful,
imn: ninh yaac maiv mingh lorz cong-mengh mienh. Hnyouv njien-youh, hmien ziouc njang,

eng: but heartache crushes the spirit. The discerning heart seeks knowledge,
imn: mv baac hnyouv nzauh kouv, mba'nziu haih mbaaix. Haih mengh baeqc nyei mienh longc hnyouv lorz wuonh zaang,

eng: but the mouth of a fool feeds on folly. All the days of the oppressed are wretched,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh longc hngongx nyei jauv dorngx nyanc hopv. Zuqc kouv naanc nyei mienh hnoi-hnoi nzauh,

eng: but the cheerful heart has a continual feast. Better a little with the fear of the Lord
imn: mv baac hnyouv njien-youh nyei mienh se hnangv zanc-zanc zoux jorm. Maaih zinh zoih zoqc yaac taaih Ziouv se gauh longx

eng: than great wealth with turmoil. Better a small serving of vegetables with love
imn: maaih zinh zoih camv mv baac nzauh faanh. Juangc jienv nyanc lai-maeng, laanh yaac hnamv laanh se gauh longx

eng: than a fattened calf with hatred. A hot-tempered person stirs up conflict,
imn: juangc jienv nyanc ngongh dorn-junc nyei orv mv baac laanh nzorng laanh. Ga'qiex beqv nyei mienh coqv cuotv nzaeng jaax nyei sic,

eng: but the one who is patient calms a quarrel. The way of the sluggard is blocked with thorns,
imn: mv baac nyienz jienv ga'qiex nyei mienh bun nzaeng jaax nyei jauv dingh njiec. Mienh lueic mienh nyei jauv hnangv maaih njimv mbiorngz buangv,

eng: but the path of the upright is a highway. A wise son brings joy to his father,
imn: mv baac hnyouv zingx mienh nyei jauv se hlo yaac yuonh nyei. Cong-mengh nyei dorn bun ninh nyei die a'hneiv,

eng: but a foolish man despises his mother. Folly brings joy to one who has no sense,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh mangc piex ninh nyei maa. Maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh a'hneiv ninh hngongx nyei sic,

eng: but whoever has understanding keeps a straight course. Plans fail for lack of counsel,
imn: mv baac haih mengh baeqc nyei mienh gan jienv zoux horpc nyei jauv mingh. Maiv duqv caangh laangh ndaangc, daav nyei za'eix zoux maiv cuotv aqv,

eng: but with many advisers they succeed. A person finds joy in giving an apt reply—
imn: mv baac maaih caangh laangh nyei mienh camv, ziouc zoux duqv cuotv. Dau duqv mienh horpc ziouc haiz njien-youh nyei,

eng: and how good is a timely word! The path of life leads upward for the prudent
imn: gorngv duqv joux waac horpc ziangh hoc za'gengh longx haic. Cong-mengh mienh yangh ziangh maengc nyei jauv faaux,

eng: to keep them from going down to the realm of the dead. The Lord tears down the house of the proud,
imn: weic tengx ninh simv nqoi njiec ga'ndiev yiemh gen. Ziouv caeqv zoux maux mienh nyei biauv,

eng: but he sets the widow’s boundary stones in place. The Lord detests the thoughts of the wicked,
imn: mv baac liepc wuonv auv-guaav nyei deic-jaaix. Ziouv youx haic orqv mienh hnamv nyei sic,

eng: but gracious words are pure in his sight. The greedy bring ruin to their households,
imn: mv baac Ziouv a'hneiv haic cing-nzengc mienh gorngv nyei waac. Haaix dauh mauv duqv maiv baengh fim nyei leic ziouc bun ninh nyei biauv zong mienh zuqc kouv,

eng: but the one who hates bribes will live. The heart of the righteous weighs its answers,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh nzorng nyaanh hmuangx nyei sic ziouc duqv maengc ziangh. Kuv mienh nyei hnyouv hnamv ziangx hnangv haaix nor dau,

eng: but the mouth of the wicked gushes evil. The Lord is far from the wicked,
imn: mv baac orqv mienh nyei nzuih kungx gorngv cuotv orqv nyei waac. Ziouv leih orqv mienh go,

eng: but he hears the prayer of the righteous. Light in a messenger’s eyes brings joy to the heart,
imn: mv baac ninh muangx haiz kuv mienh nyei waac. M'zing njang bun mienh nyei hnyouv a'hneiv,

eng: and good news gives health to the bones. Whoever heeds life-giving correction
imn: kuv fienx yaac bun mbungv nyiemz. Haaix dauh baeng m'normh muangx bun mienh duqv maengc ziangh nyei gorngv-hemx waac,

eng: will be at home among the wise. Those who disregard discipline despise themselves,
imn: wuov dauh ziouc yiem cong-mengh mienh mbu'ndongx. Haaix dauh maiv kangv muangx njaaux nyei waac ziouc mangc piex ninh ganh,

eng: but the one who heeds correction gains understanding. Wisdom’s instruction is to fear the Lord ,
imn: mv baac haaix dauh a'hneiv muangx kuinx nyei waac ziouc duqv bieqc hnyouv aqv. Taaih Ziouv ziouc njaaux mienh maaih cong-mengh.

eng: and humility comes before honor.
imn: Oix zuqc nyiemc ganh zoux faix cingx daaih haih duqv mienh taaih.

eng: To humans belong the plans of the heart, but from the Lord comes the proper answer of the tongue. All a person’s ways seem pure to them,
imn: Mienh yiem hnyouv daav za'eix, mv baac nzuih dau nyei waac se yiem Ziouv daaih. Mienh zoux nyei yietc zungv ziux ganh nyei m'zing mangc se cing-nzengc nyei,

eng: but motives are weighed by the Lord . Commit to the Lord whatever you do,
imn: mv baac Ziouv zaah mangc hnyouv. Oix zuqc zorqv meih zoux nyei nyungc-nyungc jiu bun Ziouv,

eng: and he will establish your plans. The Lord works out everything to its proper end—
imn: meih daav nyei za'eix ziouc liepc duqv jiez. Ziouv zeix nyungc-nyungc weic wuov nyungc nyei eix leiz,

eng: even the wicked for a day of disaster. The Lord detests all the proud of heart.
imn: liemh orqv mienh se weic zeqc naanc nyei hnoi. Da'faanh hnyouv maux nyei mienh Ziouv youx haic,

eng: Be sure of this: They will not go unpunished. Through love and faithfulness sin is atoned for;
imn: oix zuqc hiuv dingc, ninh zungv biaux maiv ndutv, oix zuqc dingc zuiz. Mienh ziepc zuoqv gan longx Tin-Hungh ziouc duqv zuiz guangc liuz,

eng: through the fear of the Lord evil is avoided. When the Lord takes pleasure in anyone’s way,
imn: mienh taaih Ziouv ziouc duqv simv nqoi orqv sic. Se gorngv mienh zoux nyei jauv bun Ziouv a'hneiv,

eng: he causes their enemies to make peace with them. Better a little with righteousness
imn: Ziouv yaac bun wuov dauh nyei win-wangv caux ninh horpc. Maaih ga'naaiv zoqc mv baac zoux duqv zingx,

eng: than much gain with injustice. In their hearts humans plan their course,
imn: se gauh longx maaih ga'naaiv camv mv baac zoux maiv baengh fim. Mienh nyei hnyouv daav za'eix lorz ganh nyei jauv,

eng: but the Lord establishes their steps. The lips of a king speak as an oracle,
imn: mv baac Ziouv yienz ninh yangh nyei zaux-mbiec. Hungh diex gorngv waac maaih Tin-Hungh nyei hatc maaz.

eng: and his mouth does not betray justice. Honest scales and balances belong to the Lord ;
imn: Siemv dingc nyei ziangh hoc ninh nyei nzuih yaac maiv gorngv dorngc. Horpc nyei tin-baengh dangv caux nziangx benx Ziouv nyei,

eng: all the weights in the bag are of his making. Kings detest wrongdoing,
imn: yiem mbuoqc nyei yietc zungv dangv-dorh, nziangx-dorh se ninh zoux nyei. Hungh diex zoux orqv se gamh nziev haic nyei sic,

eng: for a throne is established through righteousness. Kings take pleasure in honest lips;
imn: weic zuqc hungh weic bangc baengh fim nyei leiz liepc daaih. Mienh nyei nzuih gorngv zien nyei waac hungh diex a'hneiv,

eng: they value the one who speaks what is right. A king’s wrath is a messenger of death,
imn: ninh yaac hnamv gorngv zingx nyei waac nyei mienh. Hungh diex qiex jiez bun cing mienh oix zuqc daic,

eng: but the wise will appease it. When a king’s face brightens, it means life;
imn: mv baac cong-mengh mienh haih donv hungh diex nyei ga'qiex. Hungh diex nyei hmien njang ziouc bun mienh haih duqv maengc ziangh,

eng: his favor is like a rain cloud in spring. How much better to get wisdom than gold,
imn: hungh diex horpc hnyouv se hnangv mbuonx dorh jienv cun-gen nyei mbiungc daaih nor. Duqv cong-mengh se gauh longx jiex duqv jiem,

eng: to get insight rather than silver! The highway of the upright avoids evil;
imn: ginv duqv wuonh zaang se gauh longx ginv duqv nyaanh. Hnyouv zingx mienh gan nyei jauv-louc simv nqoi orqv sic.

eng: those who guard their ways preserve their lives. Pride goes before destruction,
imn: Haaix dauh goux longx ganh nyei jauv ziouc goux ganh nyei maengc. Zoux maux nyei jauv dorh mienh mingh zuqc mietc,

eng: a haughty spirit before a fall. Better to be lowly in spirit along with the oppressed
imn: hnyouv ceng-hlo bun mienh zuqc ndorpc. Nyiemc ganh zoux faix caux mienh jomc mienh yiem,

eng: than to share plunder with the proud. Whoever gives heed to instruction prospers,
imn: gauh longx zorqv guaatv daaih nyei ga'naaiv caux zoux maux nyei mienh bun nqoi. Haaix dauh gan longx njaaux nyei waac ziouc duqv longx,

eng: and blessed is the one who trusts in the Lord . The wise in heart are called discerning,
imn: haaix dauh kaux Ziouv yaac duqv orn-lorqc. Maaih cong-mengh nyei hnyouv, mienh heuc benx bieqc hnyouv nyei mienh.

eng: and gracious words promote instruction. Prudence is a fountain of life to the prudent,
imn: Gorngv waac longx, jaa baeng duqv mienh. Weic maaih cong-mengh nyei mienh, cong-mengh benx ziangh maengc nyei wuom-zingv,

eng: but folly brings punishment to fools. The hearts of the wise make their mouths prudent,
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh zuqc ninh mbuo hngongx nyei jauv dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz. Cong-mengh mienh nyei hnyouv njaaux ninh gorngv waac horpc,

eng: and their lips promote instruction. Gracious words are a honeycomb,
imn: ninh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac yaac gauh haih baeng duqv mienh. Gorngv waac longx se hnangv mueiz-dorngh gaam nyei,

eng: sweet to the soul and healing to the bones. There is a way that appears to be right,
imn: bun hnyouv kuh yiem, sin yaac wangc siangx. Maaih diuh jauv mienh funx se horpc nyei,

eng: but in the end it leads to death. The appetite of laborers works for them;
imn: mv baac naaiv diuh jauv setv mueiz dorh mienh mingh zuqc daic. Mienh kouv laaix sung nzuih,

eng: their hunger drives them on. A scoundrel plots evil,
imn: ninh nyei nzuih zunc ninh mingh. Maiv lamh longc nyei mienh daav za'eix zoux orqv sic,

eng: and on their lips it is like a scorching fire. A perverse person stirs up conflict,
imn: ninh gorngv nyei waac hnangv douz ziqv mienh. Buv longh buv dangv nyei mienh coqv mienh nzaeng jaax.

eng: and a gossip separates close friends. A violent person entices their neighbor
imn: Gorngv waac-huv nyei mienh hoic loz-gaeng doic bun nqoi. Mienh doqc mienh yuoqc ninh nyei juangc laangz mienh,

eng: and leads them down a path that is not good. Whoever winks with their eye is plotting perversity;
imn: yaac dorh ninh yangh maiv benx nyei jauv. Mienh nyapc m'zing ninh daav nduov mienh nyei za'eix,

eng: whoever purses their lips is bent on evil. Gray hair is a crown of splendor;
imn: nqapc nzuih meix wuov dauh bun orqv sic cuotv daaih. Mba'biei baeqc se njang-laangc nyei ningv,

eng: it is attained in the way of righteousness. Better a patient person than a warrior,
imn: se weic mienh yiem seix zaangc gan zoux horpc nyei jauv duqv daaih. Maiv qiex jiez siepv nyei mienh se gauh longx henv nyei mienh,

eng: one with self-control than one who takes a city. The lot is cast into the lap,
imn: haih gunv duqv ganh nyei hnyouv se gauh longx mborqv duqv yietc norm zingh. Mienh dingc maengc mangc,

eng: but its every decision is from the Lord .
imn: mv baac dingc nyei se yiem Ziouv daaih.

eng: Better a dry crust with peace and quiet than a house full of feasting, with strife. A prudent servant will rule over a disgraceful son
imn: Nduqc aax hnaangx-nqaai, biauv yaac baengh orn sekv nyei, se gauh longx maaih orv diuv buangv dieh yaac maaih nzaeng jaax nyei sic. Zoux duqv gong longx, cong-mengh nyei bou duqv gunv ninh nyei ziouv zoux sic nyaiv nyei dorn,

eng: and will share the inheritance as one of the family. The crucible for silver and the furnace for gold,
imn: ziouc duqv nzipc buonc ndongc yietc dauh wuov deix muoz-dorn doic. Nyaanh korqv se weic sinx nyaanh, louh se weic sinx jiem,

eng: but the Lord tests the heart. A wicked person listens to deceitful lips;
imn: se Ziouv seix mienh nyei hnyouv. Zoux orqv nyei mienh muangx mienh waaic mienh nyei nzuih gorngv.

eng: a liar pays attention to a destructive tongue. Whoever mocks the poor shows contempt for their Maker;
imn: Gorngv-baeqc mienh muangx gorngv-baeqc mienh nyei waac. Haaix dauh huotv mienh jomc mienh se mangc piex Zeix Ninh Daaih Nyei Tin-Hungh.

eng: whoever gloats over disaster will not go unpunished. Children’s children are a crown to the aged,
imn: Haaix dauh a'hneiv mienh zuqc zeqc naanc, wuov dauh biaux maiv ndutv dingc zuiz. Fu'jueiv-fun benx mienh gox mienh nyei ningv,

eng: and parents are the pride of their children. Eloquent lips are unsuited to a godless fool—
imn: diex maac benx fu'jueiv nyei njang-laangc. Mienh hngongx mienh bungx waac-maux se maiv puix.

eng: how much worse lying lips to a ruler! A bribe is seen as a charm by the one who gives it;
imn: Zoux hlo nyei mienh gorngv-baeqc se gauh fatv maiv puix. Ziux bun nyei mienh nyei m'zing buatc, nyaanh hmuangx benx buv aqv,

eng: they think success will come at every turn. Whoever would foster love covers over an offense,
imn: maiv gunv huin haaix bung yaac haih duqv longx. Haaix dauh guangc nqoi mienh zoux dorngc nyei sic ziouc duqv mienh hnamv,

eng: but whoever repeats the matter separates close friends. A rebuke impresses a discerning person
imn: mv baac haaix dauh nzamc zoux dorngc nyei jauv ziouc caeqv nqoi loz-gaeng doic. Yietc joux gorngv-hemx nyei waac haih tengx hnyouv mengh baeqc nyei mienh

eng: more than a hundred lashes a fool. Evildoers foster rebellion against God;
imn: gauh camv mienh hngongx mienh zuqc mborqv yietc baeqv biaav. Orqv mienh kungx oix lorz jauv faanv lunc,

eng: the messenger of death will be sent against them. Better to meet a bear robbed of her cubs
imn: mv baac zungv maaih dauh doqc haic nyei douc fienx mienh oix daaih mborqv ninh. Mienh mingh buangh dauh zuqc guangc dorn nyei jiepv-nyeiz,

eng: than a fool bent on folly. Evil will never leave the house
imn: se gauh longx buangh mienh hngongx mienh zoux jienv ninh hngongx nyei sic. Haaix dauh zoux orqv sic winh mienh zoux nyei kuv sic,

eng: of one who pays back evil for good. Starting a quarrel is like breaching a dam;
imn: orqv nyei sic ziouc maiv leih nqoi ninh nyei biauv. Jiez gorn nzaeng jaax se hnangv bungx wuom liouc cuotv.

eng: so drop the matter before a dispute breaks out. Acquitting the guilty and condemning the innocent—
imn: Hnangv naaic oix zuqc guangc nqoi ndaangc maaih nzaeng jaax nyei sic cuotv. Haaix dauh bungx zoux dorngc nyei mienh,

eng: the Lord detests them both. Why should fools have money in hand to buy wisdom,
imn: yaac bun maiv zoux dorngx nyei mienh zuqc dingc zuiz, naaiv deix i nyungc zungv fih hnangv nyei, Ziouv youx haic. Mienh hngongx mienh nyei buoz weic haaix diuc oix nanv jienv nyaanh maaiz cong-mengh?

eng: when they are not able to understand it? A friend loves at all times,
imn: Ninh zungv maiv maaih hnyouv hoqc hiuv. Loz-gaeng doic zanc-zanc hnamv jaax,

eng: and a brother is born for a time of adversity. One who has no sense shakes hands in pledge
imn: muoz-doic cuotv seix weic tengx jienv ndaam kouv naanc. Samx maiv cuotv haaix nyungc nyei mienh laengz beu mienh nyei zaeqv,

eng: and puts up security for a neighbor. Whoever loves a quarrel loves sin;
imn: yaac dorng jienv ninh nyei juangc laangz mienh laengz zoux ndaam-daauh. Haaix dauh a'hneiv zoux waaic sic, ninh a'hneiv nzaeng jaax.

eng: whoever builds a high gate invites destruction. One whose heart is corrupt does not prosper;
imn: Haaix dauh zoux biauv nyei gaengh hlang ziouc lorz jauv bun ganh zuqc mietc. Hnyouv njuotv nyei mienh maiv haih duqv longx,

eng: one whose tongue is perverse falls into trouble. To have a fool for a child brings grief;
imn: gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh zungv zuqc zeqc naanc. Die maaih dorn hngongx ziouc bun die nzauh,

eng: there is no joy for the parent of a godless fool. A cheerful heart is good medicine,
imn: mienh hngongx mienh nyei die maiv maaih njien-youh. Hnyouv njien-youh se longx haic nyei ndie.

eng: but a crushed spirit dries up the bones. The wicked accept bribes in secret
imn: Hnyouv kouv hoic sin kouv jienv njiec. Orqv mienh beic ndiev zipv nyaanh hmuangx

eng: to pervert the course of justice. A discerning person keeps wisdom in view,
imn: weic zoux waaic baengh fim nyei jauv. Mienh guai mienh nyei hmien hungx jienv cong-mengh nyei jauv mingh,

eng: but a fool’s eyes wander to the ends of the earth. A foolish son brings grief to his father
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh nyei m'zing mangc lungh gorn. Hngongx nyei dorn bun ninh nyei die zuqc nzauh,

eng: and bitterness to the mother who bore him. If imposing a fine on the innocent is not good,
imn: yaac bun ninh nyei maa hnyouv mun. Baatc kuv mienh se maiv benx,

eng: surely to flog honest officials is not right. The one who has knowledge uses words with restraint,
imn: mborqv hnyouv longx nyei mienh yaac maiv horpc. Haaix dauh haih nyienz duqv ninh nyei waac maaih wuonh zaang,

eng: and whoever has understanding is even-tempered. Even fools are thought wise if they keep silent,
imn: haih zanv duqv hnyouv nyei mienh se haih mengh baeqc nyei mienh. Liemh mienh hngongx mienh sekv nzieqc, maiv ko lo, ziouc funx maaih cong-mengh,

eng: and discerning if they hold their tongues.
imn: ninh nqapc jienv nzuih maiv gorngv waac ziouc funx guai.

eng: An unfriendly person pursues selfish ends and against all sound judgment starts quarrels. Fools find no pleasure in understanding
imn: Haaix dauh leih nqoi maiv caux mienh, kungx ziux ganh nyei hnyouv zoux, ninh ngaengc jienv mienh longc cong-mengh dingc daaih nyei jauv. Mienh hngongx mienh maiv a'hneiv mengh baeqc haaix nyungc,

eng: but delight in airing their own opinions. When wickedness comes, so does contempt,
imn: kungx a'hneiv gorngv ninh ganh hnamv cuotv nyei jauv hnangv. Orqv mienh daaih taux, mangc piex nyei sic gan jienv daaih,

eng: and with shame comes reproach. The words of the mouth are deep waters,
imn: aengx maaih maiv taaih nyei sic caux zuqc baaic hmien nyei jauv taux. Mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac hnangv ndo nyei wuom,

eng: but the fountain of wisdom is a rushing stream. It is not good to be partial to the wicked
imn: cong-mengh nyei zingv se hnangv ndoqv nyei wuom liouc mingh. Bouc orqv mienh se maiv benx,

eng: and so deprive the innocent of justice. The lips of fools bring them strife,
imn: fai bun maiv zoux dorngc nyei mienh maiv duqv baengh fim nyei jauv yaac maiv horpc. Mienh hngongx mienh nyei waac coqv cuotv nzaeng jaax nyei sic.

eng: and their mouths invite a beating. The mouths of fools are their undoing,
imn: Ninh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac yuoqc mienh mborqv jaax. Mienh hngongx mienh nyei nzuih bun ganh zuqc baaic.

eng: and their lips are a snare to their very lives. The words of a gossip are like choice morsels;
imn: Ninh gorngv nyei waac zoux koux hlopv ninh ganh. Gorngv waac-sapv daanh mienh se hnangv duqv nyanc aax kuv nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: they go down to the inmost parts. One who is slack in his work
imn: naqv njiec taux ga'sie. Zoux gong ndanh nyei mienh

eng: is brother to one who destroys. The name of the Lord is a fortified tower;
imn: caux zoux mietc nyei mienh benx muoz-doic. Ziouv nyei mengh se hnangv wuonv haic nyei laauh,

eng: the righteous run to it and are safe. The wealth of the rich is their fortified city;
imn: kuv mienh tiux bieqc mingh ziouc baengh orn aqv. Butv-zoih mienh nyei zinh zoih se ninh wuonv haic nyei zingh,

eng: they imagine it a wall too high to scale. Before a downfall the heart is haughty,
imn: ninh hnamv daaih benx hlang nyei zingh laatc beu jienv ninh. Mienh nyei hnyouv maux ndaangc cingx daaih zuqc mietc,

eng: but humility comes before honor. To answer before listening—
imn: mv baac mienh nyiemc ganh zoux faix ziouc duqv mienh taaih. Haaix dauh maiv gaengh muangx longx ziouc dau ndaangc,

eng: that is folly and shame. The human spirit can endure in sickness,
imn: ninh zoux hngongx nyei sic yaac zuqc nyaiv. Mienh butv baengc, ninh nyei hnyouv tengx ninh diev duqv,

eng: but a crushed spirit who can bear? The heart of the discerning acquires knowledge,
imn: mv baac hnyouv mun kouv, haaix dauh haih diev? Mienh guai mienh nyei hnyouv duqv wuonh zaang.

eng: for the ears of the wise seek it out. A gift opens the way
imn: Cong-mengh mienh nyei hnyouv lorz wuonh zaang. Zingh nyeic tengx fungx nyei mienh koi jauv

eng: and ushers the giver into the presence of the great. In a lawsuit the first to speak seems right,
imn: dorh ninh bieqc taux zoux hlo nyei mienh nyei nza'hmien. Haaix dauh gorngv ninh nyei sic ndaangc, buatc hnangv horpc wuov bung,

eng: until someone comes forward and cross-examines. Casting the lot settles disputes
imn: mv baac zuov taux caux ninh doix-dekc wuov dauh cuotv daaih zaah naaic. Dingc maengc mangc haih bun nzaeng nyei jauv dingh,

eng: and keeps strong opponents apart. A brother wronged is more unyielding than a fortified city;
imn: yaac haih yiem i bung henv nyei mienh mbu'ndongx dunx sic. Ziqc zuiz liuz gorx-youz, ninh se aqc haic, hnangv norm wuonv haic nyei zingh.

eng: disputes are like the barred gates of a citadel. From the fruit of their mouth a person’s stomach is filled;
imn: Nzaeng jaax nyei sic yaac hnangv wuonv haic nyei dorngx nyei gaengh sorn. Mienh nyei nzuih gorngv nyei waac bun ga'sie beuv,

eng: with the harvest of their lips they are satisfied. The tongue has the power of life and death,
imn: yiem ninh nyei nzuih cuotv nyei waac ninh duqv buangv hnyouv aqv. Nzuih nyei hatc maaz haih bun mienh ziangh fai daic.

eng: and those who love it will eat its fruit. He who finds a wife finds what is good
imn: Ziux ninh a'hneiv gorngv nyei waac ziouc winh nzuonx bun ninh. Haaix dauh lorz duqv dauh auv se duqv longx nyei ga'naaiv

eng: and receives favor from the Lord . The poor plead for mercy,
imn: yaac duqv Ziouv ceix fuqv. Mienh jomc mienh qaqv tov tengx,

eng: but the rich answer harshly. One who has unreliable friends soon comes to ruin,
imn: mv baac butv-zoih mienh dau duqv ciouv nyei. Maaih a'nziaauc doic zoux hnangv benx loz-gaeng doic,

eng: but there is a friend who sticks closer than a brother.
imn: mv baac maaih dauh loz-gaeng doic, beiv ganh nyei cien muoz-doic, ninh zungv gauh nitv mbuo.

eng: Better the poor whose walk is blameless than a fool whose lips are perverse. Desire without knowledge is not good—
imn: Zoux duqv zingx nyei mienh jomc mienh zungv gauh longx mienh hngongx mienh gorngv-baeqc. Mienh maiv maaih wuonh zaang se maiv benx.

eng: how much more will hasty feet miss the way! A person’s own folly leads to their ruin,
imn: Hnyouv beqv nyei mienh yaac haih zoux dorngc sic. Mienh laaix ganh hngongx zuqc baaic,

eng: yet their heart rages against the Lord . Wealth attracts many friends,
imn: ninh nyei hnyouv qiex jiez haic Ziouv. Maaih zinh maaih nyaanh ziouc maaih gorx-youz camv,

eng: but even the closest friend of the poor person deserts them. A false witness will not go unpunished,
imn: mv baac maiv maaih zinh nyaanh nyei mienh zuqc gorx-youz guangc. Zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei mienh simv maiv ndutv zuqc dingc zuiz.

eng: and whoever pours out lies will not go free. Many curry favor with a ruler,
imn: Gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh setv mueiz yaac biaux maiv ndutv. Hnyouv jangv nyei mienh maaih mienh camv tov ninh tengx.

eng: and everyone is the friend of one who gives gifts. The poor are shunned by all their relatives—
imn: Fungx zingh nyeic nyei mienh duqv dauh dauh zoux ninh nyei doic. Mienh jomc mienh nyei yietc zungv muoz-doic youx ninh,

eng: how much more do their friends avoid them! Though the poor pursue them with pleading, they are nowhere to be found. The one who gets wisdom loves life;
imn: ninh nyei loz-gaeng gauh fatv simv. Ninh gan jienv ninh mbuo longc waac tov mv baac ninh mbuo mingh mi'aqv. Duqv cong-mengh nyei mienh hnamv ganh,

eng: the one who cherishes understanding will soon prosper. A false witness will not go unpunished,
imn: goux jienv wuonh zaang nyei mienh oix duqv longx. Zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei mienh simv maiv ndutv zuqc dingc zuiz,

eng: and whoever pours out lies will perish. It is not fitting for a fool to live in luxury—
imn: gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh yaac oix zuqc mietc. Mienh hngongx mienh hnangv butv-zoih mienh yiem se maiv puix,

eng: how much worse for a slave to rule over princes! A person’s wisdom yields patience;
imn: zoux nouh nyei mienh gunv zoux ziouv nyei mienh gauh fatv maiv puix. Hnamv duqv tong nyei mienh maiv qiex jiez siepv,

eng: it is to one’s glory to overlook an offense. A king’s rage is like the roar of a lion,
imn: guangc nqoi zuqc mienh zoux dorngc nyei jauv se bun ganh duqv mienh taaih. Hungh diex qiex jiez se hnangv sienh njunh nor,

eng: but his favor is like dew on the grass. A foolish child is a father’s ruin,
imn: mv baac ninh nyei en hnangv mbiungc-suiv pinx miev. Hngongx nyei fu'jueiv haih bun domh mienh zuqc baaic.

eng: and a quarrelsome wife is like the constant dripping of a leaky roof. Houses and wealth are inherited from parents,
imn: Auv hengx nzaeng jaax se hnangv mbiungc maiv dingh liouh nyei ndiepv jienv yiem. Biauv caux zinh zoih yiem die nzipc daaih,

eng: but a prudent wife is from the Lord . Laziness brings on deep sleep,
imn: mv baac guai nyei auv se Ziouv ceix bun. Zoux lueic nyei jauv bun mienh m'njormh duqv ndo.

eng: and the shiftless go hungry. Whoever keeps commandments keeps their life,
imn: Kungx oix henh nyei mienh oix zuqc ngorc. Gan leiz-latc nyei mienh goux ninh nyei maengc,

eng: but whoever shows contempt for their ways will die. Whoever is kind to the poor lends to the Lord ,
imn: mv baac ngaengc Tin-Hungh nyei doz wuov dauh oix zuqc daic. Haaix dauh korv-lienh mienh jomc mienh se hnangv gaav ga'naaiv bun Ziouv.

eng: and he will reward them for what they have done. Discipline your children, for in that there is hope;
imn: Weic ninh zoux longx nyei jauv Ziouv oix winh bun ninh. Dongh maaih lamh hnamv nyei ziangh hoc oix zuqc mborqv njaaux meih nyei fu'jueiv.

eng: do not be a willing party to their death. A hot-tempered person must pay the penalty;
imn: Maiv dungx dingc sueih ninh zuqc mietc. Ga'qiex beqv nyei mienh oix zuqc dingc zuiz,

eng: rescue them, and you will have to do it again. Listen to advice and accept discipline,
imn: se gorngv meih njoux ninh meih zungv oix zuqc aengx njoux. Oix zuqc muangx mienh kuinx, muangx mienh njaaux,

eng: and at the end you will be counted among the wise. Many are the plans in a person’s heart,
imn: weic bun meih nqa'haav hingv haih maaih cong-mengh. Mienh nyei hnyouv daav za'eix camv,

eng: but it is the Lord ’s purpose that prevails. What a person desires is unfailing love ;
imn: mv baac Ziouv nyei za'eix oix duqv liepc jiez. Mienh gauh oix jiex nyei se maaih hnyouv ziepc zuoqv nyei hnamv.

eng: better to be poor than a liar. The fear of the Lord leads to life;
imn: Mienh jomc mienh corc gauh longx gorngv-baeqc nyei mienh. Taaih Ziouv ziouc bun mienh duqv maengc ziangh,

eng: then one rests content, untouched by trouble. A sluggard buries his hand in the dish;
imn: duqv daaih nyei mienh buangv hnyouv nyei hitv kuonx, yaac maiv zuqc haaix nyungc hoic. Mienh lueic mienh nyei buoz lom bieqc nzormc,

eng: he will not even bring it back to his mouth! Flog a mocker, and the simple will learn prudence;
imn: zungv maiv kangv bouh faaux ganh nyei nzuih. Oix zuqc mborqv huotv nyei mienh,

eng: rebuke the discerning, and they will gain knowledge. Whoever robs their father and drives out their mother
imn: maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh ziouc haih hoqc duqv guai. Oix zuqc kuinx haih mengh baeqc nyei mienh, ninh ziouc haih maaih wuonh zaang. Zoux doqc ninh nyei die yaac zunc ninh nyei maa guangc nyei mienh,

eng: is a child who brings shame and disgrace. Stop listening to instruction, my son,
imn: se zuqc nyaiv, zuqc mienh mangc piex nyei dorn. Yie nyei dorn aac, se gorngv meih guangc, maiv muangx njaaux nyei jauv,

eng: and you will stray from the words of knowledge. A corrupt witness mocks at justice,
imn: meih ziouc leih nqoi maaih wuonh zaang nyei waac. Maiv lamh longc nyei zorng-zengx mienh jatv baengh fim nyei jauv,

eng: and the mouth of the wicked gulps down evil. Penalties are prepared for mockers,
imn: orqv mienh nyei nzuih kungx naqv zoux dorngc nyei zuiz. Maaih dingc zuiz nyei jauv liuc leiz ziangx weic huotv nyei mienh,

eng: and beatings for the backs of fools.
imn: yaac liuc leiz ziangx mborqv mienh hngongx mienh nyei diqc daanz.

eng: Wine is a mocker and beer a brawler; whoever is led astray by them is not wise. A king’s wrath strikes terror like the roar of a lion;
imn: A'ngunc diuv zoux bun laanh huotv laanh, diuv-kuv bun mienh nzaeng jaax. Da'faanh hopv diuv nquin nyei mienh maiv maaih cong-mengh. Hungh diex nyei ga'qiex baetv cuotv haeqv mienh gamh nziex se hnangv sienh njunh nor.

eng: those who anger him forfeit their lives. It is to one’s honor to avoid strife,
imn: Haaix dauh cuoqv ninh qiex jiez zungv zuqc guangc maengc. Simv nqoi nzaeng jaax nyei jauv se puix duqv taaih nyei,

eng: but every fool is quick to quarrel. Sluggards do not plow in season;
imn: mv baac dauh dauh mienh hngongx mienh oix nzaeng jaax siepv. Mienh lueic mienh taux laih lingh nyei ziangh hoc maiv oix laih.

eng: so at harvest time they look but find nothing. The purposes of a person’s heart are deep waters,
imn: Taux siou nyei ziangh hoc ninh lorz mv baac maiv buatc maaih haaix nyungc. Yiem mienh nyei hnyouv hnamv nyei za'eix hnangv wuom-ndo nor,

eng: but one who has insight draws them out. Many claim to have unfailing love,
imn: mv baac haih mengh baeqc nyei mienh haih baeng duqv cuotv. Mienh camv nyei zunh gorngv ganh ziepc zuoqv nyei,

eng: but a faithful person who can find? The righteous lead blameless lives;
imn: mv baac haaix dauh za'gengh haih lorz buatc ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh? Zoux duqv zingx nyei kuv mienh,

eng: blessed are their children after them. When a king sits on his throne to judge,
imn: ninh nyei dorn-jueiv duqv fuqv. Hungh zueiz jienv weic siemv zuiz,

eng: he winnows out all evil with his eyes. Who can say, “I have kept my heart pure;
imn: ninh longc m'zing samx duqv cuotv orqv sic. Haaix dauh haih gorngv, “Yie bun yie nyei hnyouv cing-nzengc nyei.

eng: I am clean and without sin”? Differing weights and differing measures—
imn: Yie cing-nzengc, biaux ndutv yie nyei zuiz”? Waengc mienh nyei nziangx-dorh caux pienx nyei ga'naaiv-hlaau,

eng: the Lord detests them both. Even small children are known by their actions,
imn: i nyungc zungv fih hnangv nyei, Ziouv youx haic. Liemh fu'jueiv ziux ninh zoux nyei sic bun cing ninh hnangv haaix nor,

eng: so is their conduct really pure and upright? Ears that hear and eyes that see—
imn: se ninh zoux cing-nzengc, horpc nyei zeiz fai maiv zeiz. Se Ziouv bun yie mbuo maaih m'zing mangc duqv buatc,

eng: the Lord has made them both. Do not love sleep or you will grow poor;
imn: maaih m'normh muangx duqv haiz. Maiv dungx kungx hnamv m'njormh, nziex meih oix zuqc jomc aqv.

eng: stay awake and you will have food to spare. “It’s no good, it’s no good!” says the buyer—
imn: Oix zuqc nungx nqoi m'zing meih ziouc duqv nyanc beuv. Maaiz ga'naaiv nyei mienh gorngv, “Maiv benx, maiv benx,”

eng: then goes off and boasts about the purchase. Gold there is, and rubies in abundance,
imn: mv baac maaiz mingh ninh bungx waac-maux aqv. Maaih jiem caux la'bieiv-jaaix camv nyei,

eng: but lips that speak knowledge are a rare jewel. Take the garment of one who puts up security for a stranger;
imn: mv baac maaih nzuih gorngv wuonh zaang nyei waac zungv gauh jaaix. Se gorngv mienh beu ga'nyiec nyei mienh, oix zuqc zorqv laengz beu nyei mienh nyei lui daaih dorngx.

eng: hold it in pledge if it is done for an outsider. Food gained by fraud tastes sweet,
imn: Se gorngv ninh beu ganh fingx mienh, zungv oix zuqc zorqv ninh nyei lui dorngx jienv. Nduov duqv daaih nyei nyanc hopv, mienh haiz gaam nyei,

eng: but one ends up with a mouth full of gravel. Plans are established by seeking advice;
imn: mv baac nqa'haav ninh nyei nzuih hnangv maaih saa-ziou buangv nzengc. Oix zuqc caangh laangh weic daav cuotv za'eix,

eng: so if you wage war, obtain guidance. A gossip betrays a confidence;
imn: oix mborqv domh jaax oix zuqc longc cong-mengh dorh. Gorngv waac-huv nyei mienh sing gem jienv nyei sic.

eng: so avoid anyone who talks too much. If someone curses their father or mother,
imn: Hnangv naaic maiv dungx caux nzuih piatv nyei mienh zoux doic. Se gorngv mienh zioux ninh nyei diex maac,

eng: their lamp will be snuffed out in pitch darkness. An inheritance claimed too soon
imn: ninh ziouc daic hnangv dang yiem hmuangx nyei dorngx daic nor. Siepv-siepv duqv nzipc nyei ga'naaiv daaih,

eng: will not be blessed at the end. Do not say, “I’ll pay you back for this wrong!”
imn: setv mueiz maiv tengx nzipc nyei mienh duqv fuqv-loqc. Maiv dungx gorngv, “Yie oix longc orqv winh orqv.”

eng: Wait for the Lord , and he will avenge you. The Lord detests differing weights,
imn: Oix zuqc zuov Ziouv, ninh ziouc tengx meih. Waengc mienh nyei nziangx-dorh, Ziouv youx haic.

eng: and dishonest scales do not please him. A person’s steps are directed by the Lord .
imn: Pienx nyei nziangx fih hnangv nyei maiv benx. Baamh mienh nyei zaux-mbiec se Ziouv dingc daaih,

eng: How then can anyone understand their own way? It is a trap to dedicate something rashly
imn: mienh fungc haih mengh baeqc ganh nyei jauv? Mienh la'guaih gorngv, “Naaiv se cing-nzengc nyei ga'naaiv.”

eng: and only later to consider one’s vows. A wise king winnows out the wicked;
imn: Laengz liuz ngaengc waac cingx hnamv-nzuonx benx koux hlopv zuqc ganh. Cong-mengh nyei hungh diex samx cuotv haaix dauh zoux orqv,

eng: he drives the threshing wheel over them. The human spirit is the lamp of the Lord
imn: ziouc dingc ninh mbuo nyei zuiz yaac maiv korv-lienh. Mienh nyei hnyouv se Ziouv nyei dang,

eng: that sheds light on one’s inmost being. Love and faithfulness keep a king safe;
imn: zaah mangc gu'nyuoz ndo jiex nyei dorngx. Hungh diex korv-lienh mienh, ziepc zuoqv nyei gunv ziouc beu jienv ninh ganh.

eng: through love his throne is made secure. The glory of young men is their strength,
imn: Zoux baengh fim nyei jauv yaac liepc wuonv ninh nyei weic. Mienh lunx mienh nyei qaqv benx ninh mbuo nyei njang-laangc,

eng: gray hair the splendor of the old. Blows and wounds scrub away evil,
imn: mv baac mienh gox mienh nzueic se weic ninh mbuo nyei mba'biei baeqc. Mborqv mun zorc zoux orqv nyei mienh,

eng: and beatings purge the inmost being.
imn: fitv mun bun gu'nyuoz ndo jiex nyei dorngx cing-nzengc.

eng: In the Lord ’s hand the king’s heart is a stream of water that he channels toward all who please him. A person may think their own ways are right,
imn: Hungh diex nyei hnyouv se hnangv diuh ndoqv yiem Ziouv nyei buoz, sueih Ziouv nyei eix bun ninh huin mingh haaix bung. Mienh zoux nyei sic ziux ganh nyei m'zing mangc ninh zoux duqv horpc,

eng: but the Lord weighs the heart. To do what is right and just
imn: mv baac Ziouv zaah mienh nyei hnyouv. Ziouv a'hneiv mienh zoux duqv horpc, baengh fim nyei,

eng: is more acceptable to the Lord than sacrifice. Haughty eyes and a proud heart—
imn: gauh camv dorh ga'naaiv fongc horc ziec. Orqv mienh m'zing-jaax hlang, hnyouv yaac maux,

eng: the unplowed field of the wicked—produce sin. The plans of the diligent lead to profit
imn: naaiv se benx zuiz aqv. Mienh jienh mienh nyei za'eix ndongc haaix zungv bun ninh mbuo duqv kuh yiem,

eng: as surely as haste leads to poverty. A fortune made by a lying tongue
imn: mv baac zoux sic beqv nyei mienh kungx zuqc jomc hnangv. Nzuih gorngv-baeqc nduov duqv daaih nyei zinh zoih,

eng: is a fleeting vapor and a deadly snare. The violence of the wicked will drag them away,
imn: se hnangv buonc mingh nyei mouc yaac zoux koux hlopv ganh daic. Orqv mienh zoux doqc nyei sic oix guaatv ninh mbuo ganh mingh,

eng: for they refuse to do what is right. The way of the guilty is devious,
imn: laaix ninh mbuo maiv kangv zoux baengh fim nyei jauv. Dorngc zuiz nyei mienh nyei jauv se ngau njuotv,

eng: but the conduct of the innocent is upright. Better to live on a corner of the roof
imn: mv baac cing-nzengc mienh zoux nyei sic se horpc nyei. Yiem biauv-ngorh gu'nguaaic nyei gorqv

eng: than share a house with a quarrelsome wife. The wicked crave evil;
imn: corc gauh longx caux zanc-zanc nzaeng jaax nyei m'sieqv dorn juangc biauv yiem. Orqv mienh nyei hnyouv kungx oix orqv sic hnangv,

eng: their neighbors get no mercy from them. When a mocker is punished, the simple gain wisdom;
imn: ziux ninh nyei m'zing mangc duqv jiex mueic, maiv korv-lienh juangc laangz mienh. Huotv mienh nyei mienh zuqc dingc zuiz,

eng: by paying attention to the wise they get knowledge. The Righteous One takes note of the house of the wicked
imn: maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh duqv cong-mengh. Cong-mengh mienh duqv mienh njaaux, ninh jaa duqv wuonh zaang. Gong-Fim nyei Tin-Hungh samx mangc orqv mienh nyei biauv,

eng: and brings the wicked to ruin. Whoever shuts their ears to the cry of the poor
imn: orqv mienh zuqc zoi njiec bun ninh zuqc mietc. Haaix dauh zotv jienv m'normh maiv muangx mienh jomc mienh heuc jienv tov nyei qiex,

eng: will also cry out and not be answered. A gift given in secret soothes anger,
imn: ninh ganh heuc jienv tov nyei ziangh hoc yaac maiv maaih haaix dauh dau. Bingx jienv fungx zingh nyeic haih donv jienv qiex jiez nyei jauv,

eng: and a bribe concealed in the cloak pacifies great wrath. When justice is done, it brings joy to the righteous
imn: beic ndiev nzuiz nyaanh hmuangx haih tengx ciouv nyei ga'qiex fiu. Haaix zanc zoux baengh fim nyei jauv, kuv mienh maaih orn-lorqc,

eng: but terror to evildoers. Whoever strays from the path of prudence
imn: mv baac orqv mienh zuqc mietc. Haaix dauh leih nqoi bieqc hnyouv nyei jauv,

eng: comes to rest in the company of the dead. Whoever loves pleasure will become poor;
imn: ziouc caux daic mingh nyei mienh gapv zunv yiem. Haaix dauh kungx hnamv njien-youh nyei jauv, zungv oix zuqc jomc.

eng: whoever loves wine and olive oil will never be rich. The wicked become a ransom for the righteous,
imn: Haaix dauh oix haic a'ngunc diuv caux ga'lanv youh maiv haih butv zoih. Orqv mienh zuqc kouv div kuv mienh,

eng: and the unfaithful for the upright. Better to live in a desert
imn: maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh yaac zuqc kouv div hnyouv zingx nyei mienh. Yiem deic-bung-huaang zungv gauh longx

eng: than with a quarrelsome and nagging wife. The wise store up choice food and olive oil,
imn: caux nzaeng jaax la'ngopv nyei m'sieqv dorn yiem. Cong-mengh mienh nyei biauv maaih jaaix nyei ga'naaiv caux ga'lanv youh,

eng: but fools gulp theirs down. Whoever pursues righteousness and love
imn: mv baac mienh hngongx mienh naqv nzengc ninh maaih nyei yietc zungv. Zimh lorz zoux horpc zoux longx nyei jauv nyei mienh

eng: finds life, prosperity and honor. One who is wise can go up against the city of the mighty
imn: duqv maengc ziangh yaac duqv mienh taaih. Cong-mengh mienh nyorng faaux mienh henv mienh nyei zingh laatc,

eng: and pull down the stronghold in which they trust. Those who guard their mouths and their tongues
imn: yaac baaic waaic mienh kaux wuonv nyei dorngx. Haaix dauh goux ganh nyei nzuih caux mbietc,

eng: keep themselves from calamity. The proud and arrogant person—“Mocker” is his name—
imn: beu duqv ganh maiv zuqc sic. Zoux maux, ceng-hlo nyei mienh duqv mbuox heuc, “Ga'naaiv-huotv.”

eng: behaves with insolent fury. The craving of a sluggard will be the death of him,
imn: Ninh kungx zoux maux, ceng-hlo hnangv. Mienh lueic mienh nyei hnyouv oix nyei se hnangv daix ninh ganh,

eng: because his hands refuse to work. All day long he craves for more,
imn: weic zuqc ninh nyei buoz maiv kangv zoux gong. Ninh ziangh hnoi mauv oix duqv ga'naaiv,

eng: but the righteous give without sparing. The sacrifice of the wicked is detestable—
imn: mv baac kuv mienh bun yaac maiv korv-fiqv. Orqv mienh ziec nyei ga'naaiv se gamh nziev nyei,

eng: how much more so when brought with evil intent! A false witness will perish,
imn: ninh longc orqv nyei za'eix dorh daaih zungv gauh fatv kouv. Zoux jaav zorng-zengx nyei mienh oix zuqc mietc,

eng: but a careful listener will testify successfully. The wicked put up a bold front,
imn: mv baac muangx zien zorng-zengx nyei waac wuov dauh, ninh nyei waac yietc liuz yiem. Orqv mienh zoux hmien hoz, maiv hiuv duqv nyaiv,

eng: but the upright give thought to their ways. There is no wisdom, no insight, no plan
imn: mv baac hnyouv zingx nyei mienh longx-longx nyei hnamv taux ganh nyei jauv. Maiv maaih haaix nyungc cong-mengh fai wuonh zaang fai caangh laangh nyei waac

eng: that can succeed against the Lord . The horse is made ready for the day of battle,
imn: haih hingh jiex Ziouv. Maaz liuc leiz ziangx weic mborqv jaax nyei hnoi,

eng: but victory rests with the Lord .
imn: mv baac se Ziouv bun duqv hingh.

eng: A good name is more desirable than great riches; to be esteemed is better than silver or gold. Rich and poor have this in common:
imn: Ginv mengh dauh longx se gauh longx ginv zinh zoih camv, duqv mienh taaih se gauh longx jiem nyaanh. Mienh maaih mienh caux mienh jomc mienh maaih yietc diuc fih hnangv,

eng: The Lord is the Maker of them all. The prudent see danger and take refuge,
imn: se Ziouv zeix ninh mbuo yietc zungv daaih. Mienh guai mienh buatc haih maaih sic cuotv ziouc simv nqoi,

eng: but the simple keep going and pay the penalty. Humility is the fear of the Lord ;
imn: mv baac maiv hiuv haaix nyungc nyei mienh hungx jienv mingh ziouc zuqc kouv aqv. Nyiemc ganh zoux faix yaac taaih Ziouv

eng: its wages are riches and honor and life. In the paths of the wicked are snares and pitfalls,
imn: bun mienh duqv zinh zoih, duqv mienh taaih yaac duqv maengc ziangh. Buv longh buv dangv mienh nyei jauv maaih njimv caux koux,

eng: but those who would preserve their life stay far from them. Start children off on the way they should go,
imn: haaix dauh goux duqv ganh zungv leih nqoi naaiv deix ga'naaiv go. Njaaux fu'jueiv gan ninh horpc zuqc yangh nyei jauv,

eng: and even when they are old they will not turn from it. The rich rule over the poor,
imn: gox daaih ninh ziouc maiv leih nqoi. Butv-zoih mienh gunv mienh jomc mienh,

eng: and the borrower is slave to the lender. Whoever sows injustice reaps calamity,
imn: gaav zaeqv nyei mienh benx zaeqv-ziouv nyei nouh. Mienh zuangx orqv nyei jauv ziouc siou zeqc naanc,

eng: and the rod they wield in fury will be broken. The generous will themselves be blessed,
imn: Tin-Hungh nouz mienh nyei biaav yaac oix bun ninh zuqc mietc. Haaix dauh mangc maiv jiex mueic, zoux hnyouv jangv, ziouc duqv fuqv,

eng: for they share their food with the poor. Drive out the mocker, and out goes strife;
imn: weic zuqc ninh zorqv buonc ganh nyei nyanc hopv bun mienh jomc mienh. Oix zuqc zunc cuotv huotv mienh nyei mienh, nzaeng jaax nyei jauv ziouc baac mi'aqv.

eng: quarrels and insults are ended. One who loves a pure heart and who speaks with grace
imn: Nzaeng jaax, gorngv doqc nyei jauv yaac sekv nzengc. Haaix dauh a'hneiv maaih cing-nzengc hnyouv, ninh nyei waac yaac maaih en-zingh,

eng: will have the king for a friend. The eyes of the Lord keep watch over knowledge,
imn: wuov dauh ziouc duqv hungh diex zoux ninh nyei doic. Ziouv nyei m'zing goux jienv wuonh zaang,

eng: but he frustrates the words of the unfaithful. The sluggard says, “There’s a lion outside!
imn: mv baac ninh mbienv maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh nyei waac. Mienh lueic mienh gorngv, “Ga'nyiec maengx maaih dauh sienh.

eng: I’ll be killed in the public square!” The mouth of an adulterous woman is a deep pit;
imn: Nziex yiem wuov jaai-horngc yie haih zuqc ninh ngaatc daic.” Hienx nqox nyei m'sieqv dorn nyei nzuih hnangv ndo haic nyei kuotv,

eng: a man who is under the Lord ’s wrath falls into it. Folly is bound up in the heart of a child,
imn: Ziouv qiex jiez nyei mienh zungv zuqc ndortv bieqc gu'nyuoz. Hngongx nyei jauv m'daaih yiem fu'jueiv nyei hnyouv,

eng: but the rod of discipline will drive it far away. One who oppresses the poor to increase his wealth
imn: mv baac longc biaav mborqv njaaux haih zunc cuotv leih ninh go. Haaix dauh zeix mienh jomc mienh weic douh ganh butv zoih,

eng: and one who gives gifts to the rich—both come to poverty. Pay attention and turn your ear to the sayings of the wise;
imn: fai fungx zingh nyeic bun butv-zoih mienh, setv mueiz ninh ganh jomc mi'aqv. Meih oix zuqc baeng m'normh muangx cong-mengh mienh nyei waac.

eng: apply your heart to what I teach, for it is pleasing when you keep them in your heart
imn: Yie njaaux nyei waac oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx. Se gorngv meih zaangh jienv naaiv deix waac yiem hnyouv,

eng: and have all of them ready on your lips. So that your trust may be in the Lord ,
imn: yaac liuc leiz ziangx zanc-zanc haih gorngv, ziouc tengx meih horpc hnyouv aqv. Yie ih hnoi njaaux nyei se dongh meih, meih ziouc haih hiuv duqv naaiv deix waac

eng: I teach you today, even you. Have I not written thirty sayings for you,
imn: weic bun meih kaux Ziouv. Yie weic meih fiev faah ziepc ginc kuinx nyei waac

eng: sayings of counsel and knowledge, teaching you to be honest and to speak the truth,
imn: caux wuonh zaang nyei waac maiv zeiz? Yie oix bun meih hiuv duqv haaix nyungc horpc, haaix nyungc zien,

eng: so that you bring back truthful reports to those you serve? Do not exploit the poor because they are poor
imn: weic bun meih haih longc zien waac dau paaiv meih mingh nyei mienh. Maiv dungx caangv mienh jomc mienh nyei ga'naaiv weic zuqc ninh jomc,

eng: and do not crush the needy in court, for the Lord will take up their case
imn: yaac maiv dungx yiem zingh gaengh zeix doh naanc mienh, weic zuqc Ziouv oix tengx ninh mbuo caengx sic.

eng: and will exact life for life. Do not make friends with a hot-tempered person,
imn: Haaix dauh hoic ninh mbuo, Ziouv oix hoic wuov dauh nyei maengc. Maiv dungx caux hungh hec qiex jiez siepv nyei mienh daav loz-gaeng,

eng: do not associate with one easily angered, or you may learn their ways
imn: yaac maiv dungx caux ga'qiex beqv nyei mienh mingh. Nziex meih haih zuotc ninh nyei nyungc zoux,

eng: and get yourself ensnared. Do not be one who shakes hands in pledge
imn: yaac zuqc koux hlopv zuqc ganh. Maiv dungx hnangv mienh laengz nzuih beu mienh nyei zaeqv,

eng: or puts up security for debts; if you lack the means to pay,
imn: yaac maiv dungx laengz zoux ndaam-daauh. Se gorngv meih maiv maaih haaix nyungc jaauv sung,

eng: your very bed will be snatched from under you. Do not move an ancient boundary stone
imn: liemh meih bueix jienv nyei coux ninh mbuo ziouc zorqv mingh. Meih nyei ong-taaix liepc nyei deic-jaaix,

eng: set up by your ancestors. Do you see someone skilled in their work?
imn: meih maiv dungx suiv. Meih buatc maaih banh zeic zoux gong longx nyei mienh,

eng: They will serve before kings; they will not serve before officials of low rank.
imn: ninh duqv souv jienv hungh diex nyei nza'hmien, maiv zeiz souv maiv maaih mengh dauh nyei mienh nyei nza'hmien.

eng: When you sit to dine with a ruler, note well what is before you, and put a knife to your throat
imn: Meih caux zoux hlo nyei mienh juangc dieh nyanc hnaangx, oix zuqc samx longx haaix nyungc yiem meih nyei nza'hmien. Se gorngv meih zoux mauv nyanc nyei mienh,

eng: if you are given to gluttony. Do not crave his delicacies,
imn: oix zuqc zorqv nzuqc zaeng jienv ganh nyei jaang-ndiev. Maiv dungx mauv nyanc ninh kuv haic nyei ga'naaiv,

eng: for that food is deceptive. Do not wear yourself out to get rich;
imn: weic zuqc se nduov mienh nyei lai-hnaangx. Maiv dungx laauh luic weic lorz zinh zoih,

eng: do not trust your own cleverness. Cast but a glance at riches, and they are gone,
imn: oix zuqc maaih cong-mengh gaux haih dingh njiec. Meih kungx bungx m'zing mangc maiv lamh longc nyei zinh zoih fai?

eng: for they will surely sprout wings and fly off to the sky like an eagle. Do not eat the food of a begrudging host,
imn: Weic zuqc zinh zoih liemh zeih hnangv cuotv ndaatv, yaac hnangv domh jaangv nor, ndaix faaux lungh. Maiv dungx nyanc mienh njapv mienh nyei lai-hnaangx,

eng: do not crave his delicacies; for he is the kind of person
imn: yaac maiv dungx mauv ninh kuv nyei ga'naaiv. Weic zuqc ninh se hnangv dauh yiem hnyouv gu'nyuoz saauv jienv nyei mienh.

eng: who is always thinking about the cost. “Eat and drink,” he says to you, but his heart is not with you. You will vomit up the little you have eaten
imn: Ninh heuc meih, “Gunv nyanc gunv hopv,” mv baac ninh nyei hnyouv maiv hnangv naaic. Meih nyanc liuz wuov deix diqv dien lai-hnaangx zungv zuqc lov cuotv,

eng: and will have wasted your compliments. Do not speak to fools,
imn: meih gorngv nyei waac-longx yaac ndortv mi'aqv. Maiv dungx gorngv waac bun mienh hngongx mienh muangx,

eng: for they will scorn your prudent words. Do not move an ancient boundary stone
imn: weic zuqc ninh oix mangc piex meih nyei cong-mengh waac. Maiv dungx suiv loz-hnoi deic-jaaix nyei dongc,

eng: or encroach on the fields of the fatherless, for their Defender is strong;
imn: fai zorqv guh hanh fu'jueiv nyei lingh deic, weic zuqc Zuoqc Ninh Mbuo Wuov Dauh Ziouv se henv haic.

eng: he will take up their case against you. Apply your heart to instruction
imn: Ninh mbuo gox meih, Ziouv oix tengx ninh mbuo caengx sic. Oix zuqc longc hnyouv muangx mienh njaaux,

eng: and your ears to words of knowledge. Do not withhold discipline from a child;
imn: baeng m'normh muangx wuonh zaang nyei waac. Meih oix zuqc mborqv njaaux fu'jueiv, maiv dungx guangc.

eng: if you punish them with the rod, they will not die. Punish them with the rod
imn: Meih longc biaav fitv ninh, ninh maiv daic. Se gorngv meih longc biaav fitv,

eng: and save them from death. My son, if your heart is wise,
imn: meih ziouc tengx njoux ninh nyei maengc maiv zuqc mingh yiem yiemh gen. Yie nyei dorn aah! Se gorngv meih nyei hnyouv maaih cong-mengh,

eng: then my heart will be glad indeed; my inmost being will rejoice
imn: yie nyei hnyouv yaac a'hneiv. Se gorngv meih nyei nzuih gorngv zien nyei waac,

eng: when your lips speak what is right. Do not let your heart envy sinners,
imn: yie nyei hnyouv ziouc orn-lorqc haic. Maiv dungx maaih hnyouv mueic jieqv zuiz-mienh,

eng: but always be zealous for the fear of the Lord . There is surely a future hope for you,
imn: oix zuqc hnoi-hnoi taaih Ziouv. Hnangv naaic meih nqa'haav hingv nyei jauv ndongc haaix zungv maaih lamh hnamv nyei,

eng: and your hope will not be cut off. Listen, my son, and be wise,
imn: yaac maiv zuqc jamv guangc. Yie nyei dorn aah! Meih oix zuqc muangx yaac oix zuqc maaih cong-mengh,

eng: and set your heart on the right path: Do not join those who drink too much wine
imn: aengx bun meih nyei hnyouv mingh wuov diuh jauv. Maiv dungx caux hengx hopv a'ngunc diuv

eng: or gorge themselves on meat, for drunkards and gluttons become poor,
imn: fai mauv nyanc orv nyei mienh yiem, weic zuqc mauv nyanc hopv nquin nyei mienh oix jomc.

eng: and drowsiness clothes them in rags. Listen to your father, who gave you life,
imn: Mauv m'njormh nyei mienh ziouc zuqv lui-houx-huv. Meih nyei die bun meih maaih maengc, meih oix zuqc muangx ninh.

eng: and do not despise your mother when she is old. Buy the truth and do not sell it—
imn: Meih nyei maa gox daaih, maiv dungx mangc piex. Oix zuqc maaiz zien leiz yaac maiv dungx maaic.

eng: wisdom, instruction and insight as well. The father of a righteous child has great joy;
imn: Oix zuqc maaiz cong-mengh, njaaux nyei waac caux wuonh zaang. Kuv mienh nyei die za'gengh! orn-lorqc haic.

eng: a man who fathers a wise son rejoices in him. May your father and mother rejoice;
imn: Haaix dauh duqv cong-mengh nyei dorn oix weic ninh a'hneiv. Oix zuqc bun meih nyei diex maac a'hneiv,

eng: may she who gave you birth be joyful! My son, give me your heart
imn: bun meih nyei maa nyorx orn-lorqc. Yie nyei dorn aac, longc hnyouv muangx yie,

eng: and let your eyes delight in my ways, for an adulterous woman is a deep pit,
imn: bun meih nyei m'zing mangc yie nyei jauv, weic zuqc maaic sin nyei m'sieqv dorn se hnangv ndo haic nyei kuotv,

eng: and a wayward wife is a narrow well. Like a bandit she lies in wait
imn: buangh liouh nyei m'sieqv dorn hnangv hepc nyei wuom-kuotv. Ninh mei jienv zuov hnangv janx-zaqc,

eng: and multiplies the unfaithful among men. Who has woe? Who has sorrow?
imn: yaac yiem baamh mienh mbu'ndongx bun maiv ziepc zuoqv nyei mienh camv jienv faaux. Haaix dauh maaih kuonx naanh?

eng: Who has strife? Who has complaints? Who has needless bruises? Who has bloodshot eyes? Those who linger over wine,
imn: Haaix dauh maaih you-nzauh? Haaix dauh maaih nzaeng jaax nyei sic? Haaix dauh maaih la'ngopv nyei jauv? Haaix dauh zuqc mun yaac maiv maaih gorn-baengx? Haaix dauh m'zing siqv? Se dongh liouh linh hopv a'ngunc diuv

eng: who go to sample bowls of mixed wine. Do not gaze at wine when it is red,
imn: caux mingh seix hopv peux daaih nyei diuv wuov deix mienh. Maiv dungx mangc a'ngunc diuv-siqv

eng: when it sparkles in the cup, when it goes down smoothly! In the end it bites like a snake
imn: yiem gu'nyuoz zaanv aengv njang, hopv njiec se mbiaangc nyei. Setv mueiz naaiv nyungc diuv doqc haic hnangv naang-doqc nyorqv nor,

eng: and poisons like a viper. Your eyes will see strange sights,
imn: yaac hoic hnangv naang-jieqv nyorqv. Meih nyei m'zing ziouc buatc guv guaix nyei sic.

eng: and your mind will imagine confusing things. You will be like one sleeping on the high seas,
imn: Meih nyei hnyouv yaac lunc, gorngv buv longh buv dangv nyei waac. Meih ziouc hnangv bueix jienv koiv gu'nyuoz nyei mienh,

eng: lying on top of the rigging. “They hit me,” you will say, “but I’m not hurt!
imn: yaac hnangv bueix jienv corng ndie-mbuangh nyei ndiouh gu'nguaaic. Meih ziouc gorngv, “Mienh mborqv yie mv baac yie maiv mun.

eng: They beat me, but I don’t feel it! When will I wake up so I can find another drink?”
imn: Ninh mbuo qaqv mborqv yie, yie yaac maiv haiz fungc. Yie haaix zanc cingx nyie? Yie aengx mingh lorz diuv hopv.”

eng: Do not envy the wicked, do not desire their company; for their hearts plot violence,
imn: Maiv dungx mueic jieqv orqv mienh, yaac maiv dungx maaih hnyouv oix caux ninh mbuo yiem, weic zuqc ninh mbuo nyei hnyouv daav doqc nyei za'eix.

eng: and their lips talk about making trouble. By wisdom a house is built,
imn: Ninh mbuo nyei nzuih gorngv orqv haic nyei waac. Zoux biauv oix zuqc longc cong-mengh,

eng: and through understanding it is established; through knowledge its rooms are filled
imn: yaac longc mengh baeqc nyei za'eix liepc daaih. Maaih wuonh zaang, biauv ziouc maaih longx haic,

eng: with rare and beautiful treasures. The wise prevail through great power,
imn: jaaix haic nyei ga'naaiv buangv. Cong-mengh mienh maaih qaqv hlo.

eng: and those who have knowledge muster their strength. Surely you need guidance to wage war,
imn: Maaih wuonh zaang nyei mienh jaa henv jienv faaux, weic zuqc meih mingh mborqv jaax oix zuqc bangc cong-mengh nyei za'eix,

eng: and victory is won through many advisers. Wisdom is too high for fools;
imn: maaih caangh laangh nyei mienh camv ziouc duqv hingh jiex. Cong-mengh nyei jauv weic mienh hngongx mienh ba'laqc hlang haic.

eng: in the assembly at the gate they must not open their mouths. Whoever plots evil
imn: Yiem zingh gaengh ninh maiv gorngv haaix nyungc aqv. Daav za'eix zoux orqv sic wuov dauh

eng: will be known as a schemer. The schemes of folly are sin,
imn: ziouc duqv mienh heuc cuoqv sic mienh. Hnamv cuotv zoux hngongx nyei sic benx zuiz.

eng: and people detest a mocker. If you falter in a time of trouble,
imn: Mienh yaac youx huotv mienh nyei mienh. Se gorngv meih zuqc sic nyei hnoi meih hnyouv mau,

eng: how small is your strength! Rescue those being led away to death;
imn: meih nyei qaqv faix haic. Oix zuqc njoux dorh mingh daix daic nyei mienh,

eng: hold back those staggering toward slaughter. If you say, “But we knew nothing about this,”
imn: yaac dangv jienv lorpc lorpc ndorpc ndorpc nyei mingh zuqc daix daic wuov deix. Se gorngv meih gorngv, “Naaiv deix sic yie mbuo maiv hiuv,”

eng: does not he who weighs the heart perceive it? Does not he who guards your life know it? Will he not repay everyone according to what they have done? Eat honey, my son, for it is good;
imn: Tin-Hungh, dongh nziang mienh nyei hnyouv wuov dauh, mangc duqv buatc maiv zeiz? Goux meih wuov dauh hiuv duqv meih nyei hnyouv maiv zeiz? Ninh yaac maiv zeiz oix ziux mienh zoux nyei winh bun ninh mbuo fai? Yie nyei dorn aah! Gunv nyanc mueiz-dorngh weic zuqc mueiz-dorngh se longx haic.

eng: honey from the comb is sweet to your taste. Know also that wisdom is like honey for you:
imn: Nyanc mueiz-pengx ndiepv njiec nyei mueiz-dorngh haiz mueix doc gaam. Oix zuqc hiuv duqv meih nyei hnyouv duqv cong-mengh se hnangv wuov nor.

eng: If you find it, there is a future hope for you, and your hope will not be cut off. Do not lurk like a thief near the house of the righteous,
imn: Se gorngv meih lorz buatc cong-mengh, meih nqa'haav hingv nyei jauv ziouc maaih lamh hnamv nyei, yaac maiv zuqc jamv guangc. Maiv dungx mbaapv jienv zuov hnangv orqv mienh zuov jienv hoic kuv mienh nyei biauv.

eng: do not plunder their dwelling place; for though the righteous fall seven times, they rise again,
imn: Maiv dungx zoux doqc, zoux waaic ninh yiem nyei dorngx, weic zuqc kuv mienh ndorpc siec nzunc corc haih jiez sin daaih,

eng: but the wicked stumble when calamity strikes. Do not gloat when your enemy falls;
imn: mv baac orqv mienh zungv zuqc zeqc naanc mbienv njiec. Meih nyei win-wangv ndorpc, meih maiv dungx a'hneiv.

eng: when they stumble, do not let your heart rejoice, or the Lord will see and disapprove
imn: Ninh ndiqv zuqc ndorpc, maiv dungx orn-lorqc. Nziex Ziouv buatc ziouc maiv a'hneiv,

eng: and turn his wrath away from them. Do not fret because of evildoers
imn: yaac huin mingh ganh bung, maiv qiex jiez win-wangv. Maiv dungx weic orqv mienh guaax hnyouv,

eng: or be envious of the wicked, for the evildoer has no future hope,
imn: yaac maiv dungx mueic jieqv mienh waaic mienh, weic zuqc orqv mienh maiv maaih hoz nqaang.

eng: and the lamp of the wicked will be snuffed out. Fear the Lord and the king, my son,
imn: Mienh waaic mienh nyei dang yaac oix zuqc biomv daic. Yie nyei dorn aac, oix zuqc taaih Ziouv yaac taaih hungh diex,

eng: and do not join with rebellious officials, for those two will send sudden destruction on them,
imn: maiv dungx ngaengc maiv muangx ninh mbuo i dauh nyei waac, weic zuqc maaih zeqc naanc oix liemh zeih yiem ninh mbuo i dauh daaih.

eng: and who knows what calamities they can bring? These also are sayings of the wise:
imn: Haaix dauh hiuv duqv ninh mbuo i dauh oix hnangv haaix nor bun mienh zuqc baaic? Aengx jiex mingh maaih cong-mengh mienh gorngv nyei waac.

eng: To show partiality in judging is not good: Whoever says to the guilty, “You are innocent,”
imn: Dunx sic nyei ziangh hoc mangc mienh nyei hmien se maiv horpc. Haaix dauh gorngv mbuox orqv mienh, “Meih maiv maaih dorngc nyei dorngx,”

eng: will be cursed by peoples and denounced by nations. But it will go well with those who convict the guilty,
imn: wuov dauh ziouc zuqc maanc fingx zioux, zuqc maanc guoqv mienh youx. Mv baac haaix dauh bun ninh zuqc dingc zuiz, wuov dauh ziouc a'hneiv,

eng: and rich blessing will come on them. An honest answer
imn: yaac oix duqv longx haic nyei fuqv. Haaix dauh longc zien nyei waac dau,

eng: is like a kiss on the lips. Put your outdoor work in order
imn: bun cing benx zien loz-gaeng doic. Oix zuqc zoux ziangx ga'nyiec nyei gong ndaangc,

eng: and get your fields ready; after that, build your house. Do not testify against your neighbor without cause—
imn: liuc leiz ziangx meih nyei lingh deic, nqa'haav cingx daaih gomv biauv. Maiv dungx zoux maiv maaih gorn-baengx nyei zorng-zengx hoic juangc laangz mienh,

eng: would you use your lips to mislead? Do not say, “I’ll do to them as they have done to me;
imn: yaac maiv dungx longc meih nyei nzuih nduov mienh. Maiv dungx gorngv, “Yie oix zoux bun ninh hnangv ninh zoux bun yie.

eng: I’ll pay them back for what they did.” I went past the field of a sluggard,
